authors_text: Yee-Fan Tan,Chee-Ming Ting,Fuad Noman,Raphaël C. -W. Phan,Hernando Ombao
title: Graph-Regularized Manifold-Aware Conditional Wasserstein GAN for Brain Functional Connectivity Generation
title_zh: 用于大脑功能连接生成的图正则流形感知条件 Wasserstein GAN
abstract: Common measures of brain functional connectivity (FC) including covariance and correlation matrices are semi-positive definite (SPD) matrices residing on a cone-shape Riemannian manifold. Despite its remarkable success for Euclidean-valued data generation, use of standard generative adversarial networks (GANs) to generate manifold-valued FC data neglects its inherent SPD structure and hence the inter-relatedness of edges in real FC. We propose a novel graph-regularized manifold-aware conditional Wasserstein GAN (GR-SPD-GAN) for FC data generation on the SPD manifold that can preserve the global FC structure. Specifically, we optimize a generalized Wasserstein distance between the real and generated SPD data under an adversarial training, conditioned on the class labels. The resulting generator can synthesize new SPD-valued FC matrices associated with different classes of brain networks, e.g., brain disorder or healthy control. Furthermore, we introduce additional population graph-based regularization terms on both the SPD manifold and its tangent space to encourage the generator to respect the inter-subject similarity of FC patterns in the real data. This also helps in avoiding mode collapse and produces more stable GAN training. Evaluated on resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data of major depressive disorder (MDD), qualitative and quantitative results show that the proposed GR-SPD-GAN clearly outperforms several state-of-the-art GANs in generating more realistic fMRI-based FC samples. When applied to FC data augmentation for MDD identification, classification models trained on augmented data generated by our approach achieved the largest margin of improvement in classification accuracy among the competing GANs over baselines without data augmentation.
summary: Common measures of brain functional connectivity (FC) including covariance and correlation matrices are semi-positive definite (SPD) matrices residing on a cone-shape Riemannian manifold. Despite its remarkable success for Euclidean-valued data generation, use of standard generative adversarial networks (GANs) to generate manifold-valued FC data neglects its inherent SPD structure and hence the inter-relatedness of edges in real FC. We propose a novel graph-regularized manifold-aware conditional Wasserstein GAN (GR-SPD-GAN) for FC data generation on the SPD manifold that can preserve the global FC structure. Specifically, we optimize a generalized Wasserstein distance between the real and generated SPD data under an adversarial training, conditioned on the class labels. The resulting generator can synthesize new SPD-valued FC matrices associated with different classes of brain networks, e.g., brain disorder or healthy control. Furthermore, we introduce additional population graph-based regularization terms on both the SPD manifold and its tangent space to encourage the generator to respect the inter-subject similarity of FC patterns in the real data. This also helps in avoiding mode collapse and produces more stable GAN training. Evaluated on resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data of major depressive disorder (MDD), qualitative and quantitative results show that the proposed GR-SPD-GAN clearly outperforms several state-of-the-art GANs in generating more realistic fMRI-based FC samples. When applied to FC data augmentation for MDD identification, classification models trained on augmented data generated by our approach achieved the largest margin of improvement in classification accuracy among the competing GANs over baselines without data augmentation.
abstract_zh: 大脑功能连接 (FC) 的常见度量（包括协方差和相关矩阵）是位于锥形黎曼流形上的半正定 (SPD) 矩阵。尽管在欧几里德值数据生成方面取得了巨大成功，但使用标准生成对抗网络（GAN）生成流形值 FC 数据却忽略了其固有的 SPD 结构，从而忽略了实际 FC 中边的相互关联性。我们提出了一种新颖的图正则化流形感知条件 Wasserstein GAN (GR-SPD-GAN)，用于在 SPD 流形上生成 FC 数据，可以保留全局 FC 结构。具体来说，我们在对抗性训练下以类别标签为条件，优化真实 SPD 数据和生成的 SPD 数据之间的广义 Wasserstein 距离。由此产生的生成器可以合成与不同类别的大脑网络（例如大脑疾病或健康控制）相关的新的 SPD 值 FC 矩阵。此外，我们在 SPD 流形及其切线空间上引入了额外的基于总体图的正则化项，以鼓励生成器尊重真实数据中 FC 模式的主体间相似性。这也有助于避免模式崩溃并产生更稳定的 GAN 训练。对重度抑郁症 (MDD) 的静息态功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 数据进行评估，定性和定量结果表明，所提出的 GR-SPD-GAN 在生成更真实的基于 fMRI 的 FC 样本方面明显优于几种最先进的 GAN。当应用于 MDD 识别的 FC 数据增强时，在我们的方法生成的增强数据上训练的分类模型在没有数据增强的竞争 GAN 中实现了分类准确性的最大提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图正则化和流形感知的条件Wasserstein GAN（GR-SPD-GAN），用于生成符合脑功能连接（FC）数据半正定矩阵特性的样本。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN在生成脑功能连接数据时忽略其半正定矩阵（SPD）在黎曼流形上的结构特性，导致生成数据无法保留真实FC的全局结构和边间相关性。
AI.method: 在条件Wasserstein GAN框架下，通过优化生成数据与真实SPD数据间的广义Wasserstein距离，并引入基于群体图的正则化项，分别作用于SPD流形及其切空间，以增强生成器对跨被试FC模式相似性的学习能力。
AI.result: 在重大抑郁障碍（MDD）的静息态fMRI数据上，GR-SPD-GAN生成的FC样本在定性和定量指标上均优于现有GAN方法，且基于其数据增强的分类模型在MDD识别任务中准确率提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的GR-SPD-GAN有效解决了传统GAN在生成流形结构数据时的模式崩溃问题，能够生成更符合真实脑功能连接特性的样本，提升后续分类任务性能。

authors_text: Lior Talker,Aviad Cohen,Erez Yosef,Alexandra Dana,Michael Dinerstein
title: Mind The Edge: Refining Depth Edges in Sparsely-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 注意边缘：细化稀疏监督单目深度估计中的深度边缘
abstract: Monocular Depth Estimation (MDE) is a fundamental problem in computer vision with numerous applications. Recently, LIDAR-supervised methods have achieved remarkable per-pixel depth accuracy in outdoor scenes. However, significant errors are typically found in the proximity of depth discontinuities, i.e., depth edges, which often hinder the performance of depth-dependent applications that are sensitive to such inaccuracies, e.g., novel view synthesis and augmented reality. Since direct supervision for the location of depth edges is typically unavailable in sparse LIDAR-based scenes, encouraging the MDE model to produce correct depth edges is not straightforward. To the best of our knowledge this paper is the first attempt to address the depth edges issue for LIDAR-supervised scenes. In this work we propose to learn to detect the location of depth edges from densely-supervised synthetic data, and use it to generate supervision for the depth edges in the MDE training. To quantitatively evaluate our approach, and due to the lack of depth edges GT in LIDAR-based scenes, we manually annotated subsets of the KITTI and the DDAD datasets with depth edges ground truth. We demonstrate significant gains in the accuracy of the depth edges with comparable per-pixel depth accuracy on several challenging datasets. Code and datasets are available at \url{https://github.com/liortalker/MindTheEdge}.
summary: Monocular Depth Estimation (MDE) is a fundamental problem in computer vision with numerous applications. Recently, LIDAR-supervised methods have achieved remarkable per-pixel depth accuracy in outdoor scenes. However, significant errors are typically found in the proximity of depth discontinuities, i.e., depth edges, which often hinder the performance of depth-dependent applications that are sensitive to such inaccuracies, e.g., novel view synthesis and augmented reality. Since direct supervision for the location of depth edges is typically unavailable in sparse LIDAR-based scenes, encouraging the MDE model to produce correct depth edges is not straightforward. To the best of our knowledge this paper is the first attempt to address the depth edges issue for LIDAR-supervised scenes. In this work we propose to learn to detect the location of depth edges from densely-supervised synthetic data, and use it to generate supervision for the depth edges in the MDE training. To quantitatively evaluate our approach, and due to the lack of depth edges GT in LIDAR-based scenes, we manually annotated subsets of the KITTI and the DDAD datasets with depth edges ground truth. We demonstrate significant gains in the accuracy of the depth edges with comparable per-pixel depth accuracy on several challenging datasets. Code and datasets are available at \url{https://github.com/liortalker/MindTheEdge}.
abstract_zh: 单目深度估计（MDE）是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，具有广泛的应用。最近，激光雷达监督方法在室外场景中实现了显着的每像素深度精度。然而，通常会在深度不连续性（即深度边缘）附近发现重大错误，这通常会阻碍对此类不准确性敏感的深度相关应用程序的性能，例如新颖的视图合成和增强现实。由于在基于 LIDAR 的稀疏场景中通常无法直接监督深度边缘的位置，因此鼓励 MDE 模型生成正确的深度边缘并不简单。据我们所知，本文是解决激光雷达监督场景的深度边缘问题的首次尝试。在这项工作中，我们建议学习从密集监督的合成数据中检测深度边缘的位置，并用它来生成 MDE 训练中深度边缘的监督。为了定量评估我们的方法，并且由于基于 LIDAR 的场景中缺乏深度边缘 GT，我们使用深度边缘地面实况手动注释了 KITTI 和 DDAD 数据集的子集。我们在几个具有挑战性的数据集上展示了深度边缘精度的显着提高，以及可比的每像素深度精度。代码和数据集可在 \url{https://github.com/liortalker/MindTheEdge} 获取。

AI.tldr: 在稀疏监督的单目深度估计中优化深度边缘以提高精度
AI.motivation: 现有方法在深度边缘处存在显著误差，影响相关应用，而稀疏LIDAR场景缺乏深度边缘监督，需改进
AI.method: 利用密集监督的合成数据学习检测深度边缘，并生成监督信号用于MDE模型训练
AI.result: 显著提升深度边缘精度，同时保持像素级深度准确率，在多个数据集上验证
AI.conclusion: 首次解决LIDAR监督场景的深度边缘问题，方法有效提升边缘精度

authors_text: Chen Chen,Yuchen Hu,Qiang Zhang,Heqing Zou,Beier Zhu,Eng Siong Chng
title: Leveraging Modality-specific Representations for Audio-visual Speech Recognition via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习利用特定模态表示进行视听语音识别
abstract: Audio-visual speech recognition (AVSR) has gained remarkable success for ameliorating the noise-robustness of speech recognition. Mainstream methods focus on fusing audio and visual inputs to obtain modality-invariant representations. However, such representations are prone to over-reliance on audio modality as it is much easier to recognize than video modality in clean conditions. As a result, the AVSR model underestimates the importance of visual stream in face of noise corruption. To this end, we leverage visual modality-specific representations to provide stable complementary information for the AVSR task. Specifically, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) based framework called MSRL, where the agent dynamically harmonizes modality-invariant and modality-specific representations in the auto-regressive decoding process. We customize a reward function directly related to task-specific metrics (i.e., word error rate), which encourages the MSRL to effectively explore the optimal integration strategy. Experimental results on the LRS3 dataset show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art in both clean and various noisy conditions. Furthermore, we demonstrate the better generality of MSRL system than other baselines when test set contains unseen noises.
summary: Audio-visual speech recognition (AVSR) has gained remarkable success for ameliorating the noise-robustness of speech recognition. Mainstream methods focus on fusing audio and visual inputs to obtain modality-invariant representations. However, such representations are prone to over-reliance on audio modality as it is much easier to recognize than video modality in clean conditions. As a result, the AVSR model underestimates the importance of visual stream in face of noise corruption. To this end, we leverage visual modality-specific representations to provide stable complementary information for the AVSR task. Specifically, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) based framework called MSRL, where the agent dynamically harmonizes modality-invariant and modality-specific representations in the auto-regressive decoding process. We customize a reward function directly related to task-specific metrics (i.e., word error rate), which encourages the MSRL to effectively explore the optimal integration strategy. Experimental results on the LRS3 dataset show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art in both clean and various noisy conditions. Furthermore, we demonstrate the better generality of MSRL system than other baselines when test set contains unseen noises.
abstract_zh: 视听语音识别（AVSR）在改善语音识别的噪声鲁棒性方面取得了显着的成功。主流方法侧重于融合音频和视觉输入以获得模态不变的表示。然而，这种表示很容易过度依赖音频模态，因为在干净的条件下它比视频模态更容易识别。因此，AVSR 模型低估了视觉流在噪声损坏面前的重要性。为此，我们利用特定于视觉模态的表示来为 AVSR 任务提供稳定的补充信息。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的框架，称为 MSRL，其中代理在自回归解码过程中动态协调模态不变和特定模态表示。我们定制了一个与特定任务指标（即单词错误率）直接相关的奖励函数，这鼓励 MSRL 有效地探索最优集成策略。 LRS3 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在干净和各种噪声条件下均​​达到了最先进的水平。此外，当测试集包含看不见的噪声时，我们证明了 MSRL 系统比其他基线具有更好的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的框架MSRL，通过结合模态不变与模态特定表示，提升音频-视觉语音识别在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有AVSR方法过度依赖音频模态，导致在噪声环境下忽视视觉信息的重要性，而模态特定表示可提供稳定补充信息以解决此问题。
AI.method: 设计强化学习框架MSRL，在自回归解码中动态协调模态不变与特定表示，并定制以词错误率为导向的奖励函数优化融合策略。
AI.result: 在LRS3数据集上，MSRL在干净和多种噪声条件下均达到最先进水平，且在未见过的噪声测试集上展现更优泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MSRL通过有效整合模态特定表示，显著提升了AVSR模型的噪声鲁棒性和泛化能力，优于现有基线方法。

authors_text: Thomas Schnürer,Malte Probst,Horst-Michael Gross
title: Relate to Predict: Towards Task-Independent Knowledge Representations for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 与预测相关：面向强化学习的任务独立知识表示
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) can enable agents to learn complex tasks. However, it is difficult to interpret the knowledge and reuse it across tasks. Inductive biases can address such issues by explicitly providing generic yet useful decomposition that is otherwise difficult or expensive to learn implicitly. For example, object-centered approaches decompose a high dimensional observation into individual objects. Expanding on this, we utilize an inductive bias for explicit object-centered knowledge separation that provides further decomposition into semantic representations and dynamics knowledge. For this, we introduce a semantic module that predicts an objects' semantic state based on its context. The resulting affordance-like object state can then be used to enrich perceptual object representations. With a minimal setup and an environment that enables puzzle-like tasks, we demonstrate the feasibility and benefits of this approach. Specifically, we compare three different methods of integrating semantic representations into a model-based RL architecture. Our experiments show that the degree of explicitness in knowledge separation correlates with faster learning, better accuracy, better generalization, and better interpretability.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) can enable agents to learn complex tasks. However, it is difficult to interpret the knowledge and reuse it across tasks. Inductive biases can address such issues by explicitly providing generic yet useful decomposition that is otherwise difficult or expensive to learn implicitly. For example, object-centered approaches decompose a high dimensional observation into individual objects. Expanding on this, we utilize an inductive bias for explicit object-centered knowledge separation that provides further decomposition into semantic representations and dynamics knowledge. For this, we introduce a semantic module that predicts an objects' semantic state based on its context. The resulting affordance-like object state can then be used to enrich perceptual object representations. With a minimal setup and an environment that enables puzzle-like tasks, we demonstrate the feasibility and benefits of this approach. Specifically, we compare three different methods of integrating semantic representations into a model-based RL architecture. Our experiments show that the degree of explicitness in knowledge separation correlates with faster learning, better accuracy, better generalization, and better interpretability.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）可以使代理学习复杂的任务。然而，解释知识并跨任务重用它是很困难的。归纳偏差可以通过显式提供通用但有用的分解来解决此类问题，否则隐式学习很难或昂贵。例如，以对象为中心的方法将高维观察分解为单个对象。在此基础上进行扩展，我们利用归纳偏差来进行显式的以对象为中心的知识分离，从而进一步分解语义表示和动态知识。为此，我们引入了一个语义模块，可以根据对象的上下文来预测对象的语义状态。由此产生的类似可供性的对象状态可以用来丰富感知对象表示。通过最少的设置和支持类似谜题任务的环境，我们展示了这种方法的可行性和好处。具体来说，我们比较了将语义表示集成到基于模型的 RL 架构中的三种不同方法。我们的实验表明，知识分离的明确程度与更快的学习速度、更好的准确性、更好的泛化性和更好的可解释性相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于任务无关知识表示的强化学习方法，通过显式分解语义和动态知识提升学习效率与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习难以跨任务复用知识且可解释性差，需通过归纳偏置实现更通用的知识分解与表示。
AI.method: 引入语义模块预测物体上下文相关的语义状态，结合显式物体中心分解，构建语义表征与动态知识分离框架，并在类拼图环境中验证三种集成方法。
AI.result: 实验表明显式知识分离显著提升学习速度、准确率、泛化性及可解释性，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 显式分解语义与动态知识的框架可有效增强强化学习的跨任务适应性，为通用智能体设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Shengshi Yao,Zixuan Xiao,Sixian Wang,Jincheng Dai,Kai Niu,Ping Zhang
title: Variational Speech Waveform Compression to Catalyze Semantic Communications
title_zh: 变分语音波形压缩促进语义通信
abstract: We propose a novel neural waveform compression method to catalyze emerging speech semantic communications. By introducing nonlinear transform and variational modeling, we effectively capture the dependencies within speech frames and estimate the probabilistic distribution of the speech feature more accurately, giving rise to better compression performance. In particular, the speech signals are analyzed and synthesized by a pair of nonlinear transforms, yielding latent features. An entropy model with hyperprior is built to capture the probabilistic distribution of latent features, followed with quantization and entropy coding. The proposed waveform codec can be optimized flexibly towards arbitrary rate, and the other appealing feature is that it can be easily optimized for any differentiable loss function, including perceptual loss used in semantic communications. To further improve the fidelity, we incorporate residual coding to mitigate the degradation arising from quantization distortion at the latent space. Results indicate that achieving the same performance, the proposed method saves up to 27% coding rate than widely used adaptive multi-rate wideband (AMR-WB) codec as well as emerging neural waveform coding methods.
summary: We propose a novel neural waveform compression method to catalyze emerging speech semantic communications. By introducing nonlinear transform and variational modeling, we effectively capture the dependencies within speech frames and estimate the probabilistic distribution of the speech feature more accurately, giving rise to better compression performance. In particular, the speech signals are analyzed and synthesized by a pair of nonlinear transforms, yielding latent features. An entropy model with hyperprior is built to capture the probabilistic distribution of latent features, followed with quantization and entropy coding. The proposed waveform codec can be optimized flexibly towards arbitrary rate, and the other appealing feature is that it can be easily optimized for any differentiable loss function, including perceptual loss used in semantic communications. To further improve the fidelity, we incorporate residual coding to mitigate the degradation arising from quantization distortion at the latent space. Results indicate that achieving the same performance, the proposed method saves up to 27% coding rate than widely used adaptive multi-rate wideband (AMR-WB) codec as well as emerging neural waveform coding methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的神经波形压缩方法来催化新兴的语音语义通信。通过引入非线性变换和变分建模，我们有效地捕获语音帧内的依赖性，并更准确地估计语音特征的概率分布，从而产生更好的压缩性能。特别是，通过一对非线性变换对语音信号进行分析和合成，产生潜在特征。建立具有超先验的熵模型来捕获潜在特征的概率分布，然后进行量化和熵编码。所提出的波形编解码器可以灵活地针对任意速率进行优化，另一个吸引人的功能是它可以轻松地针对任何可微的损失函数进行优化，包括语义通信中使用的感知损失。为了进一步提高保真度，我们采用残差编码来减轻潜在空间量化失真引起的退化。结果表明，在实现相同性能的情况下，该方法比广泛使用的自适应多速率宽带（AMR-WB）编解码器以及新兴的神经波形编码方法节省高达 27% 的编码率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非线性变换和变分模型的新型语音波形压缩方法，以提升语义通信的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有语音编码方法在压缩率和语义通信适应性上存在不足，需开发更高效且支持任意速率优化的压缩技术。
AI.method: 通过非线性变换提取潜在特征，结合超先验熵模型与残差编码技术，实现概率分布建模、量化及熵编码，并支持可微分损失函数优化。
AI.result: 在保持相同性能的前提下，该方法相比AMR-WB及神经波形编码方法节省高达27%的编码速率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在压缩效率和语义通信适配性上显著优于现有技术，为未来语音通信系统提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非线性变换和变分模型的新型语音波形压缩方法，以提升语义通信的效率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有语音编码方法在压缩率和语义通信适应性上存在不足，需开发更高效且支持任意速率优化的压缩技术。

ai_content.result: 在保持相同性能的前提下，该方法相比AMR-WB及神经波形编码方法节省高达27%的编码速率。

search_text: Variational Speech Waveform Compression to Catalyze Semantic Communications 变分语音波形压缩促进语义通信 We propose a novel neural waveform compression method to catalyze emerging speech semantic communications. By introducing nonlinear transform and variational modeling, we effectively capture the dependencies within speech frames and estimate the probabilistic distribution of the speech feature more accurately, giving rise to better compression performance. In particular, the speech signals are analyzed and synthesized by a pair of nonlinear transforms, yielding latent features. An entropy model with hyperprior is built to capture the probabilistic distribution of latent features, followed with quantization and entropy coding. The proposed waveform codec can be optimized flexibly towards arbitrary rate, and the other appealing feature is that it can be easily optimized for any differentiable loss function, including perceptual loss used in semantic communications. To further improve the fidelity, we incorporate residual coding to mitigate the degradation arising from quantization distortion at the latent space. Results indicate that achieving the same performance, the proposed method saves up to 27% coding rate than widely used adaptive multi-rate wideband (AMR-WB) codec as well as emerging neural waveform coding methods. 我们提出了一种新颖的神经波形压缩方法来催化新兴的语音语义通信。通过引入非线性变换和变分建模，我们有效地捕获语音帧内的依赖性，并更准确地估计语音特征的概率分布，从而产生更好的压缩性能。特别是，通过一对非线性变换对语音信号进行分析和合成，产生潜在特征。建立具有超先验的熵模型来捕获潜在特征的概率分布，然后进行量化和熵编码。所提出的波形编解码器可以灵活地针对任意速率进行优化，另一个吸引人的功能是它可以轻松地针对任何可微的损失函数进行优化，包括语义通信中使用的感知损失。为了进一步提高保真度，我们采用残差编码来减轻潜在空间量化失真引起的退化。结果表明，在实现相同性能的情况下，该方法比广泛使用的自适应多速率宽带（AMR-WB）编解码器以及新兴的神经波形编码方法节省高达 27% 的编码率。 本文提出一种基于非线性变换和变分模型的新型语音波形压缩方法，以提升语义通信的效率。 Shengshi Yao,Zixuan Xiao,Sixian Wang,Jincheng Dai,Kai Niu,Ping Zhang cs.SD,cs.IT,eess.AS

authors_text: Abhinav Dahiya,Alexander M. Aroyo,Kerstin Dautenhahn,Stephen L. Smith
title: A Survey of Multi-Agent Human-Robot Interaction Systems
title_zh: 多智能体人机交互系统综述
abstract: This article presents a survey of literature in the area of Human-Robot Interaction (HRI), specifically on systems containing more than two agents (i.e., having multiple humans and/or multiple robots). We identify three core aspects of ``Multi-agent" HRI systems that are useful for understanding how these systems differ from dyadic systems and from one another. These are the Team structure, Interaction style among agents, and the system's Computational characteristics. Under these core aspects, we present five attributes of HRI systems, namely Team size, Team composition, Interaction model, Communication modalities, and Robot control. These attributes are used to characterize and distinguish one system from another. We populate resulting categories with examples from recent literature along with a brief discussion of their applications and analyze how these attributes differ from the case of dyadic human-robot systems. We summarize key observations from the current literature, and identify challenges and promising areas for future research in this domain. In order to realize the vision of robots being part of the society and interacting seamlessly with humans, there is a need to expand research on multi-human -- multi-robot systems. Not only do these systems require coordination among several agents, they also involve multi-agent and indirect interactions which are absent from dyadic HRI systems. Adding multiple agents in HRI systems requires advanced interaction schemes, behavior understanding and control methods to allow natural interactions among humans and robots. In addition, research on human behavioral understanding in mixed human-robot teams also requires more attention. This will help formulate and implement effective robot control policies in HRI systems with large numbers of heterogeneous robots and humans; a team composition reflecting many real-world scenarios.
summary: This article presents a survey of literature in the area of Human-Robot Interaction (HRI), specifically on systems containing more than two agents (i.e., having multiple humans and/or multiple robots). We identify three core aspects of ``Multi-agent" HRI systems that are useful for understanding how these systems differ from dyadic systems and from one another. These are the Team structure, Interaction style among agents, and the system's Computational characteristics. Under these core aspects, we present five attributes of HRI systems, namely Team size, Team composition, Interaction model, Communication modalities, and Robot control. These attributes are used to characterize and distinguish one system from another. We populate resulting categories with examples from recent literature along with a brief discussion of their applications and analyze how these attributes differ from the case of dyadic human-robot systems. We summarize key observations from the current literature, and identify challenges and promising areas for future research in this domain. In order to realize the vision of robots being part of the society and interacting seamlessly with humans, there is a need to expand research on multi-human -- multi-robot systems. Not only do these systems require coordination among several agents, they also involve multi-agent and indirect interactions which are absent from dyadic HRI systems. Adding multiple agents in HRI systems requires advanced interaction schemes, behavior understanding and control methods to allow natural interactions among humans and robots. In addition, research on human behavioral understanding in mixed human-robot teams also requires more attention. This will help formulate and implement effective robot control policies in HRI systems with large numbers of heterogeneous robots and humans; a team composition reflecting many real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 本文对人机交互 (HRI) 领域的文献进行了调查，特别是关于包含两个以上智能体（即具有多个人和/或多个机器人）的系统。我们确定了“多代理”HRI 系统的三个核心方面，它们有助于理解这些系统与二元系统以及彼此之间的区别。这些是团队结构、代理之间的交互风格以及系统的计算特征。在这些核心方面，我们提出了 HRI 系统的五个属性，即团队规模、团队组成、交互模型、通信方式和机器人控制。这些属性用于表征和区分一个系统与另一个系统。我们用最近文献中的示例填充结果类别我们简要讨论了它们的应用，并分析了这些属性与二元人类机器人系统的不同之处，并总结了当前文献中的主要观察结果，并确定了该领域未来研究的挑战和有前景的领域。在 HRI 系统中添加多个代理需要先进的交互方案、行为理解和控制方法，以允许人类和机器人之间的自然交互。此外，也需要更多地关注混合人类机器人团队中的人类行为理解，这将有助于在具有大量异构机器人和人类的团队组成中制定和实施有效的机器人控制策略。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多智能体人机交互系统领域的研究，重点分析了包含多个人类和/或机器人的系统，并通过团队结构、交互方式和计算特性等核心维度进行分类。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注单对单的人机交互，而多智能体系统涉及更复杂的协作与交互模式，需明确其区别并探索未来研究方向。
AI.method: 通过系统文献综述，提出三个核心维度（团队结构、交互方式、计算特性）和五个属性（团队规模、组成、交互模型、通信方式、机器人控制）对系统进行分类，并结合案例分析其应用差异。
AI.result: 总结了多智能体系统与单对单系统的差异，识别出协调机制、行为理解与控制方法等关键挑战，并提出未来需关注混合团队中人类行为研究与异构机器人控制策略。
AI.conclusion: 为实现机器人无缝融入社会的目标，需加强多人类-多机器人系统的交互机制与控制方法研究，尤其关注复杂团队组成下的行为理解与政策制定。

authors_text: Haoxiang Ma,Di Huang
title: Towards Scale Balanced 6-DoF Grasp Detection in Cluttered Scenes
title_zh: 在杂乱场景中实现尺度平衡的 6-DoF 抓取检测
abstract: In this paper, we focus on the problem of feature learning in the presence of scale imbalance for 6-DoF grasp detection and propose a novel approach to especially address the difficulty in dealing with small-scale samples. A Multi-scale Cylinder Grouping (MsCG) module is presented to enhance local geometry representation by combining multi-scale cylinder features and global context. Moreover, a Scale Balanced Learning (SBL) loss and an Object Balanced Sampling (OBS) strategy are designed, where SBL enlarges the gradients of the samples whose scales are in low frequency by apriori weights while OBS captures more points on small-scale objects with the help of an auxiliary segmentation network. They alleviate the influence of the uneven distribution of grasp scales in training and inference respectively. In addition, Noisy-clean Mix (NcM) data augmentation is introduced to facilitate training, aiming to bridge the domain gap between synthetic and raw scenes in an efficient way by generating more data which mix them into single ones at instance-level. Extensive experiments are conducted on the GraspNet-1Billion benchmark and competitive results are reached with significant gains on small-scale cases. Besides, the performance of real-world grasping highlights its generalization ability. Our code is available at https://github.com/mahaoxiang822/Scale-Balanced-Grasp.
summary: In this paper, we focus on the problem of feature learning in the presence of scale imbalance for 6-DoF grasp detection and propose a novel approach to especially address the difficulty in dealing with small-scale samples. A Multi-scale Cylinder Grouping (MsCG) module is presented to enhance local geometry representation by combining multi-scale cylinder features and global context. Moreover, a Scale Balanced Learning (SBL) loss and an Object Balanced Sampling (OBS) strategy are designed, where SBL enlarges the gradients of the samples whose scales are in low frequency by apriori weights while OBS captures more points on small-scale objects with the help of an auxiliary segmentation network. They alleviate the influence of the uneven distribution of grasp scales in training and inference respectively. In addition, Noisy-clean Mix (NcM) data augmentation is introduced to facilitate training, aiming to bridge the domain gap between synthetic and raw scenes in an efficient way by generating more data which mix them into single ones at instance-level. Extensive experiments are conducted on the GraspNet-1Billion benchmark and competitive results are reached with significant gains on small-scale cases. Besides, the performance of real-world grasping highlights its generalization ability. Our code is available at https://github.com/mahaoxiang822/Scale-Balanced-Grasp.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们重点关注 6-DoF 抓取检测中存在尺度不平衡的特征学习问题，并提出了一种新方法来特别解决处理小规模样本的困难。提出了多尺度圆柱分组（MsCG）模块，通过结合多尺度圆柱特征和全局上下文来增强局部几何表示。此外，还设计了尺度平衡学习（SBL）损失和对象平衡采样（OBS）策略，其中SBL通过先验权重放大低频尺度样本的梯度，而OBS借助辅助分割网络捕获更多小尺度物体上的点。它们分别减轻了训练和推理中掌握尺度分布不均匀的影响。此外，还引入了噪声清洁混合（NcM）数据增强来促进训练，旨在通过生成更多数据并在实例级别将它们混合为单个数据，以有效的方式弥合合成场景和原始场景之间的域差距。在 GraspNet-1Billion 基准上进行了广泛的实验，并在小规模案例上取得了显着的成果，取得了有竞争力的结果。此外，现实世界抓取的表现凸显了其泛化能力。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/mahaoxiang822/Scale-Balanced-Grasp 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对杂乱场景中6-DoF抓取检测的尺度平衡方法，解决小尺度样本检测困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取检测方法在处理尺度不平衡数据时，小尺度物体检测效果较差，导致整体性能受限。
AI.method: 提出多尺度圆柱体分组模块（MsCG）增强局部几何表征，设计尺度平衡损失（SBL）和物体平衡采样（OBS）策略，并引入噪声-干净混合（NcM）数据增强方法。
AI.result: 在GraspNet-1Billion基准测试中取得竞争力结果，小尺度案例性能显著提升，实际抓取任务验证了方法的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模块协同优化，有效缓解了尺度分布不均衡问题，提升了杂乱场景下6-DoF抓取检测的鲁棒性。

search_text: Towards Scale Balanced 6-DoF Grasp Detection in Cluttered Scenes 在杂乱场景中实现尺度平衡的 6-DoF 抓取检测 In this paper, we focus on the problem of feature learning in the presence of scale imbalance for 6-DoF grasp detection and propose a novel approach to especially address the difficulty in dealing with small-scale samples. A Multi-scale Cylinder Grouping (MsCG) module is presented to enhance local geometry representation by combining multi-scale cylinder features and global context. Moreover, a Scale Balanced Learning (SBL) loss and an Object Balanced Sampling (OBS) strategy are designed, where SBL enlarges the gradients of the samples whose scales are in low frequency by apriori weights while OBS captures more points on small-scale objects with the help of an auxiliary segmentation network. They alleviate the influence of the uneven distribution of grasp scales in training and inference respectively. In addition, Noisy-clean Mix (NcM) data augmentation is introduced to facilitate training, aiming to bridge the domain gap between synthetic and raw scenes in an efficient way by generating more data which mix them into single ones at instance-level. Extensive experiments are conducted on the GraspNet-1Billion benchmark and competitive results are reached with significant gains on small-scale cases. Besides, the performance of real-world grasping highlights its generalization ability. Our code is available at https://github.com/mahaoxiang822/Scale-Balanced-Grasp. 在本文中，我们重点关注 6-DoF 抓取检测中存在尺度不平衡的特征学习问题，并提出了一种新方法来特别解决处理小规模样本的困难。提出了多尺度圆柱分组（MsCG）模块，通过结合多尺度圆柱特征和全局上下文来增强局部几何表示。此外，还设计了尺度平衡学习（SBL）损失和对象平衡采样（OBS）策略，其中SBL通过先验权重放大低频尺度样本的梯度，而OBS借助辅助分割网络捕获更多小尺度物体上的点。它们分别减轻了训练和推理中掌握尺度分布不均匀的影响。此外，还引入了噪声清洁混合（NcM）数据增强来促进训练，旨在通过生成更多数据并在实例级别将它们混合为单个数据，以有效的方式弥合合成场景和原始场景之间的域差距。在 GraspNet-1Billion 基准上进行了广泛的实验，并在小规模案例上取得了显着的成果，取得了有竞争力的结果。此外，现实世界抓取的表现凸显了其泛化能力。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/mahaoxiang822/Scale-Balanced-Grasp 获取。 本文提出了一种针对杂乱场景中6-DoF抓取检测的尺度平衡方法，解决小尺度样本检测困难的问题。 Haoxiang Ma,Di Huang cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Desh Raj,Daniel Povey,Sanjeev Khudanpur
title: GPU-accelerated Guided Source Separation for Meeting Transcription
title_zh: 用于会议转录的 GPU 加速引导源分离
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures. To appear at InterSpeech 2023. Code available at https://github.com/desh2608/gss
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures. To appear at InterSpeech 2023. Code available at https://github.com/desh2608/gss
abstract: Guided source separation (GSS) is a type of target-speaker extraction method that relies on pre-computed speaker activities and blind source separation to perform front-end enhancement of overlapped speech signals. It was first proposed during the CHiME-5 challenge and provided significant improvements over the delay-and-sum beamforming baseline. Despite its strengths, however, the method has seen limited adoption for meeting transcription benchmarks primarily due to its high computation time. In this paper, we describe our improved implementation of GSS that leverages the power of modern GPU-based pipelines, including batched processing of frequencies and segments, to provide 300x speed-up over CPU-based inference. The improved inference time allows us to perform detailed ablation studies over several parameters of the GSS algorithm -- such as context duration, number of channels, and noise class, to name a few. We provide end-to-end reproducible pipelines for speaker-attributed transcription of popular meeting benchmarks: LibriCSS, AMI, and AliMeeting. Our code and recipes are publicly available: https://github.com/desh2608/gss.
summary: Guided source separation (GSS) is a type of target-speaker extraction method that relies on pre-computed speaker activities and blind source separation to perform front-end enhancement of overlapped speech signals. It was first proposed during the CHiME-5 challenge and provided significant improvements over the delay-and-sum beamforming baseline. Despite its strengths, however, the method has seen limited adoption for meeting transcription benchmarks primarily due to its high computation time. In this paper, we describe our improved implementation of GSS that leverages the power of modern GPU-based pipelines, including batched processing of frequencies and segments, to provide 300x speed-up over CPU-based inference. The improved inference time allows us to perform detailed ablation studies over several parameters of the GSS algorithm -- such as context duration, number of channels, and noise class, to name a few. We provide end-to-end reproducible pipelines for speaker-attributed transcription of popular meeting benchmarks: LibriCSS, AMI, and AliMeeting. Our code and recipes are publicly available: https://github.com/desh2608/gss.
abstract_zh: 引导源分离（GSS）是一种目标说话人提取方法，依靠预先计算的说话人活动和盲源分离来对重叠语音信号进行前端增强。 It was first proposed during the CHiME-5 challenge and provided significant improvements over the delay-and-sum beamforming baseline.然而，尽管有其优势，但该方法在满足转录基准方面的采用有限，主要是由于其计算时间长。在本文中，我们描述了 GSS 的改进实现，它利用了基于 GPU 的现代管道的强大功能，包括频率和段的批量处理，与基于 CPU 的推理相比，速度提高了 300 倍。推理时间的改进使我们能够对 GSS 算法的多个参数进行详细的消融研究，例如上下文持续时间、通道数量和噪声类别等。 We provide end-to-end reproducible pipelines for speaker-attributed transcription of popular meeting benchmarks: LibriCSS, AMI, and AliMeeting. Our code and recipes are publicly available: https://github.com/desh2608/gss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GPU加速的引导源分离方法，用于会议转录任务。
AI.motivation: 引导源分离方法在会议转录任务中表现出色，但由于计算时间过长，限制了其应用。因此，需要一种更高效的实现方式。
AI.method: 本文通过利用现代GPU的计算能力，改进了引导源分离算法，包括对频率和片段的批量处理，从而显著提高了推理速度。
AI.result: 该方法实现了比CPU推理快300倍的速度提升，并提供了可复现的端到端管道用于会议转录基准测试。
AI.conclusion: 通过GPU加速，引导源分离方法在会议转录任务中的应用变得更加可行，并为相关参数的深入研究提供了支持。

authors_text: Shaoqing Xu,Fang Li,Ziying Song,Jin Fang,Sifen Wang,Zhi-Xin Yang
title: Multi-Sem Fusion: Multimodal Semantic Fusion for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: Multi-Sem Fusion：用于 3D 物体检测的多模态语义融合
abstract: LiDAR and camera fusion techniques are promising for achieving 3D object detection in autonomous driving. Most multi-modal 3D object detection frameworks integrate semantic knowledge from 2D images into 3D LiDAR point clouds to enhance detection accuracy. Nevertheless, the restricted resolution of 2D feature maps impedes accurate re-projection and often induces a pronounced boundary-blurring effect, which is primarily attributed to erroneous semantic segmentation. To well handle this limitation, we propose a general multi-modal fusion framework Multi-Sem Fusion (MSF) to fuse the semantic information from both the 2D image and 3D points scene parsing results. Specifically, we employ 2D/3D semantic segmentation methods to generate the parsing results for 2D images and 3D point clouds. The 2D semantic information is further reprojected into the 3D point clouds with calibration parameters. To handle the misalignment between the 2D and 3D parsing results, we propose an Adaptive Attention-based Fusion (AAF) module to fuse them by learning an adaptive fusion score. Then the point cloud with the fused semantic label is sent to the following 3D object detectors. Furthermore, we propose a Deep Feature Fusion (DFF) module to aggregate deep features at different levels to boost the final detection performance. The effectiveness of the framework has been verified on two public large-scale 3D object detection benchmarks by comparing them with different baselines. The experimental results show that the proposed fusion strategies can significantly improve the detection performance compared to the methods using only point clouds and the methods using only 2D semantic information. Most importantly, the proposed approach significantly outperforms other approaches and sets state-of-the-art results on the nuScenes testing benchmark.
summary: LiDAR and camera fusion techniques are promising for achieving 3D object detection in autonomous driving. Most multi-modal 3D object detection frameworks integrate semantic knowledge from 2D images into 3D LiDAR point clouds to enhance detection accuracy. Nevertheless, the restricted resolution of 2D feature maps impedes accurate re-projection and often induces a pronounced boundary-blurring effect, which is primarily attributed to erroneous semantic segmentation. To well handle this limitation, we propose a general multi-modal fusion framework Multi-Sem Fusion (MSF) to fuse the semantic information from both the 2D image and 3D points scene parsing results. Specifically, we employ 2D/3D semantic segmentation methods to generate the parsing results for 2D images and 3D point clouds. The 2D semantic information is further reprojected into the 3D point clouds with calibration parameters. To handle the misalignment between the 2D and 3D parsing results, we propose an Adaptive Attention-based Fusion (AAF) module to fuse them by learning an adaptive fusion score. Then the point cloud with the fused semantic label is sent to the following 3D object detectors. Furthermore, we propose a Deep Feature Fusion (DFF) module to aggregate deep features at different levels to boost the final detection performance. The effectiveness of the framework has been verified on two public large-scale 3D object detection benchmarks by comparing them with different baselines. The experimental results show that the proposed fusion strategies can significantly improve the detection performance compared to the methods using only point clouds and the methods using only 2D semantic information. Most importantly, the proposed approach significantly outperforms other approaches and sets state-of-the-art results on the nuScenes testing benchmark.
abstract_zh: LiDAR 和相机融合技术有望在自动驾驶中实现 3D 物体检测。大多数多模态 3D 物体检测框架将 2D 图像的语义知识集成到 3D LiDAR 点云中，以提高检测精度。然而，二维特征图的有限分辨率阻碍了准确的重新投影，并且经常引起明显的边界模糊效应，这主要归因于错误的语义分割。为了很好地解决这个限制，我们提出了一种通用的多模态融合框架 Multi-Sem Fusion (MSF) 来融合来自 2D 图像和 3D 点场景解析结果的语义信息。具体来说，我们采用 2D/3D 语义分割方法来生成 2D 图像和 3D 点云的解析结果。 2D 语义信息进一步通过校准参数重新投影到 3D 点云中。为了处理 2D 和 3D 解析结果之间的不一致，我们提出了一种基于自适应注意力的融合（AAF）模块，通过学习自适应融合分数来融合它们。然后将具有融合语义标签的点云发送到以下 3D 对象检测器。此外，我们提出了深度特征融合（DFF）模块来聚合不同级别的深度特征，以提高最终的检测性能。通过与不同基线的比较，该框架的有效性已在两个公共大型 3D 对象检测基准上得到验证。实验结果表明，与仅使用点云的方法和仅使用2D语义信息的方法相比，所提出的融合策略可以显着提高检测性能。最重要的是，所提出的方法明显优于其他方法，并在 nuScenes 测试基准上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态语义融合框架Multi-Sem Fusion（MSF），通过融合2D图像和3D点云的语义信息提升自动驾驶中的3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因2D语义特征图分辨率限制导致重投影误差和边界模糊问题，难以有效融合2D与3D语义信息，亟需更鲁棒的多模态融合策略。
AI.method: 采用2D/3D语义分割生成解析结果，通过标定参数将2D语义重投影至3D点云，并设计自适应注意力融合模块（AAF）处理对齐误差，结合深度特征融合模块（DFF）增强多层级特征表达。
AI.result: 在nuScenes等基准测试中显著优于仅使用点云或仅使用2D语义的方法，达到当时最先进的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多模态语义融合框架有效解决了2D-3D语义对齐难题，为自动驾驶中的3D目标检测提供了新思路。

Most multi-modal 3D object detection frameworks integrate semantic knowledge from 2D images into 3D LiDAR point clouds to enhance detection accuracy. Nevertheless, the restricted resolution of 2D feature maps impedes accurate re-projection and often induces a pronounced boundary-blurring effect, which is primarily attributed to erroneous semantic segmentation. To well handle this limitation, we propose a general multi-modal fusion framework Multi-Sem Fusion (MSF) to fuse the semantic information from both the 2D image and 3D points scene parsing results. Specifically, we employ 2D/3D semantic segmentation methods to generate the parsing results for 2D images and 3D point clouds. The 2D semantic information is further reprojected into the 3D point clouds with calibration parameters. To handle the misalignment between the 2D and 3D parsing results, we propose an Adaptive Attention-based Fusion (AAF) module to fuse them by learning an adaptive fusion score. Then the point cloud with the fused semantic label is sent to the following 3D object detectors. Furthermore, we propose a Deep Feature Fusion (DFF) module to aggregate deep features at different levels to boost the final detection performance. The effectiveness of the framework has been verified on two public large-scale 3D object detection benchmarks by comparing them with different baselines. The experimental results show that the proposed fusion strategies can significantly improve the detection performance compared to the methods using only point clouds and the methods using only 2D semantic information. Most importantly, the proposed approach significantly outperforms other approaches and sets state-of-the-art results on the nuScenes testing benchmark. LiDAR 和相机融合技术有望在自动驾驶中实现 3D 物体检测。大多数多模态 3D 物体检测框架将 2D 图像的语义知识集成到 3D LiDAR 点云中，以提高检测精度。然而，二维特征图的有限分辨率阻碍了准确的重新投影，并且经常引起明显的边界模糊效应，这主要归因于错误的语义分割。为了很好地解决这个限制，我们提出了一种通用的多模态融合框架 Multi-Sem Fusion (MSF) 来融合来自 2D 图像和 3D 点场景解析结果的语义信息。具体来说，我们采用 2D/3D 语义分割方法来生成 2D 图像和 3D 点云的解析结果。 2D 语义信息进一步通过校准参数重新投影到 3D 点云中。为了处理 2D 和 3D 解析结果之间的不一致，我们提出了一种基于自适应注意力的融合（AAF）模块，通过学习自适应融合分数来融合它们。然后将具有融合语义标签的点云发送到以下 3D 对象检测器。此外，我们提出了深度特征融合（DFF）模块来聚合不同级别的深度特征，以提高最终的检测性能。通过与不同基线的比较，该框架的有效性已在两个公共大型 3D 对象检测基准上得到验证。实验结果表明，与仅使用点云的方法和仅使用2D语义信息的方法相比，所提出的融合策略可以显着提高检测性能。最重要的是，所提出的方法明显优于其他方法，并在 nuScenes 测试基准上取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种多模态语义融合框架Multi-Sem Fusion（MSF），通过融合2D图像和3D点云的语义信息提升自动驾驶中的3D目标检测性能。 Shaoqing Xu,Fang Li,Ziying Song,Jin Fang,Sifen Wang,Zhi-Xin Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Runyi Yu,Zhennan Wang,Yinhuai Wang,Kehan Li,Yian Zhao,Jian Zhang,Guoli Song,Jie Chen
title: Position Embedding Needs an Independent Layer Normalization
title_zh: 位置嵌入需要独立的层归一化
abstract: The Position Embedding (PE) is critical for Vision Transformers (VTs) due to the permutation-invariance of self-attention operation. By analyzing the input and output of each encoder layer in VTs using reparameterization and visualization, we find that the default PE joining method (simply adding the PE and patch embedding together) operates the same affine transformation to token embedding and PE, which limits the expressiveness of PE and hence constrains the performance of VTs. To overcome this limitation, we propose a simple, effective, and robust method. Specifically, we provide two independent layer normalizations for token embeddings and PE for each layer, and add them together as the input of each layer's Muti-Head Self-Attention module. Since the method allows the model to adaptively adjust the information of PE for different layers, we name it as Layer-adaptive Position Embedding, abbreviated as LaPE. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LaPE can improve various VTs with different types of PE and make VTs robust to PE types. For example, LaPE improves 0.94% accuracy for ViT-Lite on Cifar10, 0.98% for CCT on Cifar100, and 1.72% for DeiT on ImageNet-1K, which is remarkable considering the negligible extra parameters, memory and computational cost brought by LaPE. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/Ingrid725/LaPE.
summary: The Position Embedding (PE) is critical for Vision Transformers (VTs) due to the permutation-invariance of self-attention operation. By analyzing the input and output of each encoder layer in VTs using reparameterization and visualization, we find that the default PE joining method (simply adding the PE and patch embedding together) operates the same affine transformation to token embedding and PE, which limits the expressiveness of PE and hence constrains the performance of VTs. To overcome this limitation, we propose a simple, effective, and robust method. Specifically, we provide two independent layer normalizations for token embeddings and PE for each layer, and add them together as the input of each layer's Muti-Head Self-Attention module. Since the method allows the model to adaptively adjust the information of PE for different layers, we name it as Layer-adaptive Position Embedding, abbreviated as LaPE. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LaPE can improve various VTs with different types of PE and make VTs robust to PE types. For example, LaPE improves 0.94% accuracy for ViT-Lite on Cifar10, 0.98% for CCT on Cifar100, and 1.72% for DeiT on ImageNet-1K, which is remarkable considering the negligible extra parameters, memory and computational cost brought by LaPE. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/Ingrid725/LaPE.
abstract_zh: 由于自注意力操作的排列不变性，位置嵌入（PE）对于视觉变换器（VT）至关重要。通过使用重新参数化和可视化分析 VT 中每个编码器层的输入和输出，我们发现默认的 PE 连接方法（简单地将 PE 和补丁嵌入添加在一起）对 token 嵌入和 PE 进行相同的仿射变换，这限制了 PE 的表达能力，从而限制了 VT 的性能。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种简单、有效且稳健的方法。具体来说，我们为每层的 token embedding 和 PE 提供两个独立的层归一化，并将它们加在一起作为每层 Muti-Head Self-Attention 模块的输入。由于该方法允许模型自适应地调整不同层的PE信息，因此我们将其命名为Layer-adaptive Position Embedding，缩写为LaPE。大量实验表明，LaPE 可以改善不同类型 PE 的各种 VT，并使 VT 对 PE 类型具有鲁棒性。例如，LaPE 在 Cifar10 上将 ViT-Lite 的准确率提高了 0.94%，在 Cifar100 上将 CCT 提高了 0.98%，在 ImageNet-1K 上将 DeiT 提高了 1.72%，考虑到 LaPE 带来的额外参数、内存和计算成本可以忽略不计，这是非常显着的。该代码可在 https://github.com/Ingrid725/LaPE 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LaPE的新方法，通过为视觉Transformer中的位置嵌入（PE）和标记嵌入分别添加独立的层归一化，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 默认的位置嵌入融合方式（直接相加）对标记嵌入和PE应用相同的仿射变换，限制了PE的表达能力，从而影响视觉Transformer（VT）的性能。
AI.method: 为每个编码器层中的标记嵌入和PE分别提供独立的层归一化，将两者相加后输入多头自注意力模块，称为层自适应位置嵌入（LaPE）。
AI.result: LaPE在多个数据集上显著提升了VT性能，例如在CIFAR10上提升0.94%（ViT-Lite）、CIFAR100上提升0.98%（CCT）、ImageNet-1K上提升1.72%（DeiT），且几乎不增加参数和计算成本。
AI.conclusion: LaPE通过解耦PE和标记嵌入的归一化过程，有效增强了位置信息的表达能力，使VT对不同PE类型更具鲁棒性，且计算开销极小。

authors_text: Oona Rainio,Mohamed M. S. Nasser,Matti Vuorinen,Riku Klén
title: Image augmentation with conformal mappings for a convolutional neural network
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络的共形映射进行图像增强
abstract: For augmentation of the square-shaped image data of a convolutional neural network (CNN), we introduce a new method, in which the original images are mapped onto a disk with a conformal mapping, rotated around the center of this disk and mapped under such a Möbius transformation that preserves the disk, and then mapped back onto their original square shape. This process does not result the loss of information caused by removing areas from near the edges of the original images unlike the typical transformations used in the data augmentation for a CNN. We offer here the formulas of all the mappings needed together with detailed instructions how to write a code for transforming the images. The new method is also tested with simulated data and, according the results, using this method to augment the training data of 10 images into 40 images decreases the amount of the error in the predictions by a CNN for a test set of 160 images in a statistically significant way (p-value=0.0360).
summary: For augmentation of the square-shaped image data of a convolutional neural network (CNN), we introduce a new method, in which the original images are mapped onto a disk with a conformal mapping, rotated around the center of this disk and mapped under such a Möbius transformation that preserves the disk, and then mapped back onto their original square shape. This process does not result the loss of information caused by removing areas from near the edges of the original images unlike the typical transformations used in the data augmentation for a CNN. We offer here the formulas of all the mappings needed together with detailed instructions how to write a code for transforming the images. The new method is also tested with simulated data and, according the results, using this method to augment the training data of 10 images into 40 images decreases the amount of the error in the predictions by a CNN for a test set of 160 images in a statistically significant way (p-value=0.0360).
abstract_zh: 为了增强卷积神经网络（CNN）的方形图像数据，我们引入了一种新方法，其中将原始图像通过保角映射映射到圆盘上，围绕该圆盘的中心旋转并在保留圆盘的莫比乌斯变换下进行映射，然后映射回其原始的正方形形状。与 CNN 数据增强中使用的典型变换不同，此过程不会因删除原始图像边缘附近的区域而导致信息丢失。我们在这里提供所需的所有映射的公式以及如何编写用于转换图像的代码的详细说明。新方法还使用模拟数据进行了测试，根据结果，使用该方法将 10 个图像的训练数据增强为 40 个图像，以统计显着的方式减少了 CNN 对 160 个图像测试集的预测误差量（p 值 = 0.0360）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于共形映射的图像增强方法，用于卷积神经网络（CNN）的训练数据扩充，通过将方形图像映射到圆盘、旋转并应用莫比乌斯变换后再映射回原形状，避免传统方法导致的边缘信息丢失。
AI.motivation: 传统图像增强方法（如裁剪、旋转）可能导致图像边缘信息丢失，影响CNN性能。本文旨在通过共形映射技术实现无信息损失的数据扩充。
AI.method: 将图像通过共形映射转换为圆盘坐标系，进行中心旋转和莫比乌斯变换，再逆变换回原方形图像。提供完整数学公式和代码实现步骤。
AI.result: 在模拟数据测试中，将10张训练图像扩充为40张后，CNN在160张测试图像上的预测误差显著降低（p=0.036）。
AI.conclusion: 共形映射增强方法有效保留图像边缘信息，显著提升CNN预测精度，为数据增强提供新思路。

This process does not result the loss of information caused by removing areas from near the edges of the original images unlike the typical transformations used in the data augmentation for a CNN. We offer here the formulas of all the mappings needed together with detailed instructions how to write a code for transforming the images. The new method is also tested with simulated data and, according the results, using this method to augment the training data of 10 images into 40 images decreases the amount of the error in the predictions by a CNN for a test set of 160 images in a statistically significant way (p-value=0.0360). 为了增强卷积神经网络（CNN）的方形图像数据，我们引入了一种新方法，其中将原始图像通过保角映射映射到圆盘上，围绕该圆盘的中心旋转并在保留圆盘的莫比乌斯变换下进行映射，然后映射回其原始的正方形形状。与 CNN 数据增强中使用的典型变换不同，此过程不会因删除原始图像边缘附近的区域而导致信息丢失。我们在这里提供所需的所有映射的公式以及如何编写用于转换图像的代码的详细说明。新方法还使用模拟数据进行了测试，根据结果，使用该方法将 10 个图像的训练数据增强为 40 个图像，以统计显着的方式减少了 CNN 对 160 个图像测试集的预测误差量（p 值 = 0.0360）。 本文提出一种基于共形映射的图像增强方法，用于卷积神经网络（CNN）的训练数据扩充，通过将方形图像映射到圆盘、旋转并应用莫比乌斯变换后再映射回原形状，避免传统方法导致的边缘信息丢失。 Oona Rainio,Mohamed M. S. Nasser,Matti Vuorinen,Riku Klén cs.CV

authors_text: Martina Cinquini,Riccardo Guidotti
title: Causality-Aware Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations
title_zh: 因果关系感知的局部可解释模型不可知的解释
abstract: A main drawback of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) approaches is the feature independence assumption, hindering the study of potential variable dependencies. This leads to approximating black box behaviors by analyzing the effects on randomly generated feature values that may rarely occur in the original samples. This paper addresses this issue by integrating causal knowledge in an XAI method to enhance transparency and enable users to assess the quality of the generated explanations. Specifically, we propose a novel extension to a widely used local and model-agnostic explainer, which encodes explicit causal relationships within the data surrounding the instance being explained. Extensive experiments show that our approach overcomes the original method in terms of faithfully replicating the black-box model's mechanism and the consistency and reliability of the generated explanations.
summary: A main drawback of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) approaches is the feature independence assumption, hindering the study of potential variable dependencies. This leads to approximating black box behaviors by analyzing the effects on randomly generated feature values that may rarely occur in the original samples. This paper addresses this issue by integrating causal knowledge in an XAI method to enhance transparency and enable users to assess the quality of the generated explanations. Specifically, we propose a novel extension to a widely used local and model-agnostic explainer, which encodes explicit causal relationships within the data surrounding the instance being explained. Extensive experiments show that our approach overcomes the original method in terms of faithfully replicating the black-box model's mechanism and the consistency and reliability of the generated explanations.
abstract_zh: 可解释人工智能（XAI）方法的一个主要缺点是特征独立性假设，阻碍了潜在变量依赖性的研究。这导致通过分析对原始样本中很少出现的随机生成的特征值的影响来近似黑盒行为。本文通过将因果知识集成到 XAI 方法中来解决这个问题，以提高透明度并使用户能够评估生成的解释的质量。具体来说，我们提出了对广泛使用的本地和模型无关解释器的新颖扩展，该解释器对被解释实例周围的数据内的显式因果关系进行编码。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在忠实复制黑盒模型的机制以及生成的解释的一致性和可靠性方面克服了原始方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合因果知识的局部可解释模型无关解释方法，以解决现有XAI方法的特征独立性假设问题。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法因特征独立性假设无法捕捉变量依赖，导致解释基于罕见特征组合，影响准确性与可靠性。
AI.method: 扩展常用局部模型无关解释器，通过编码数据中的显式因果关系提升解释质量。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在复制黑箱模型机制及解释一致性、可靠性方面优于原有方法。
AI.conclusion: 整合因果知识的XAI方法能有效提升解释的忠实度与可靠性，为模型解释提供更可靠工具。

authors_text: Qianyu He,Xintao Wang,Jiaqing Liang,Yanghua Xiao
title: MAPS-KB: A Million-scale Probabilistic Simile Knowledge Base
title_zh: MAPS-KB：百万规模的概率明喻知识库
abstract: The ability to understand and generate similes is an imperative step to realize human-level AI. However, there is still a considerable gap between machine intelligence and human cognition in similes, since deep models based on statistical distribution tend to favour high-frequency similes. Hence, a large-scale symbolic knowledge base of similes is required, as it contributes to the modeling of diverse yet unpopular similes while facilitating additional evaluation and reasoning. To bridge the gap, we propose a novel framework for large-scale simile knowledge base construction, as well as two probabilistic metrics which enable an improved understanding of simile phenomena in natural language. Overall, we construct MAPS-KB, a million-scale probabilistic simile knowledge base, covering 4.3 million triplets over 0.4 million terms from 70 GB corpora. We conduct sufficient experiments to justify the effectiveness and necessity of the methods of our framework. We also apply MAPS-KB on three downstream tasks to achieve state-of-the-art performance, further demonstrating the value of MAPS-KB.
summary: The ability to understand and generate similes is an imperative step to realize human-level AI. However, there is still a considerable gap between machine intelligence and human cognition in similes, since deep models based on statistical distribution tend to favour high-frequency similes. Hence, a large-scale symbolic knowledge base of similes is required, as it contributes to the modeling of diverse yet unpopular similes while facilitating additional evaluation and reasoning. To bridge the gap, we propose a novel framework for large-scale simile knowledge base construction, as well as two probabilistic metrics which enable an improved understanding of simile phenomena in natural language. Overall, we construct MAPS-KB, a million-scale probabilistic simile knowledge base, covering 4.3 million triplets over 0.4 million terms from 70 GB corpora. We conduct sufficient experiments to justify the effectiveness and necessity of the methods of our framework. We also apply MAPS-KB on three downstream tasks to achieve state-of-the-art performance, further demonstrating the value of MAPS-KB.
abstract_zh: 理解和生成明喻的能力是实现人类水平的人工智能的必要步骤。然而，机器智能和人类认知在明喻方面仍然存在相当大的差距，因为基于统计分布的深层模型往往倾向于高频明喻。因此，需要大规模的明喻符号知识库，因为它有助于对多样化但不受欢迎的明喻进行建模，同时促进额外的评估和推理。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一个用于大规模明喻知识库构建的新颖框架，以及两个概率度量，可以更好地理解自然语言中的明喻现象。总体而言，我们构建了 MAPS-KB，这是一个百万规模的概率明喻知识库，涵盖 70 GB 语料库中超过 40 万个术语的 430 万个三元组。我们进行了足够的实验来证明我们框架方法的有效性和必要性。我们还将 MAPS-KB 应用于三个下游任务，以实现最先进的性能，进一步证明了 MAPS-KB 的价值。

AI.tldr: 构建一个百万级的概率隐喻知识库MAPS-KB，以提升机器对隐喻的理解与生成能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型因依赖统计分布而偏好高频隐喻，难以处理多样且低频的隐喻，需通过大规模符号知识库弥补这一差距。
AI.method: 提出新框架及两种概率度量方法，从70GB语料中构建包含430万三元组、40万术语的MAPS-KB知识库。
AI.result: 在三个下游任务中达到最先进性能，验证了知识库的有效性与必要性。
AI.conclusion: MAPS-KB通过建模多样化隐喻，显著提升了自然语言处理中隐喻相关任务的表现。

authors_text: Lei Ding,Jing Zhang,Kai Zhang,Haitao Guo,Bing Liu,Lorenzo Bruzzone
title: Joint Spatio-Temporal Modeling for the Semantic Change Detection in Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 遥感图像语义变化检测的联合时空建模
abstract: Semantic Change Detection (SCD) refers to the task of simultaneously extracting the changed areas and the semantic categories (before and after the changes) in Remote Sensing Images (RSIs). This is more meaningful than Binary Change Detection (BCD) since it enables detailed change analysis in the observed areas. Previous works established triple-branch Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures as the paradigm for SCD. However, it remains challenging to exploit semantic information with a limited amount of change samples. In this work, we investigate to jointly consider the spatio-temporal dependencies to improve the accuracy of SCD. First, we propose a Semantic Change Transformer (SCanFormer) to explicitly model the 'from-to' semantic transitions between the bi-temporal RSIs. Then, we introduce a semantic learning scheme to leverage the spatio-temporal constraints, which are coherent to the SCD task, to guide the learning of semantic changes. The resulting network (SCanNet) significantly outperforms the baseline method in terms of both detection of critical semantic changes and semantic consistency in the obtained bi-temporal results. It achieves the SOTA accuracy on two benchmark datasets for the SCD.
summary: Semantic Change Detection (SCD) refers to the task of simultaneously extracting the changed areas and the semantic categories (before and after the changes) in Remote Sensing Images (RSIs). This is more meaningful than Binary Change Detection (BCD) since it enables detailed change analysis in the observed areas. Previous works established triple-branch Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures as the paradigm for SCD. However, it remains challenging to exploit semantic information with a limited amount of change samples. In this work, we investigate to jointly consider the spatio-temporal dependencies to improve the accuracy of SCD. First, we propose a Semantic Change Transformer (SCanFormer) to explicitly model the 'from-to' semantic transitions between the bi-temporal RSIs. Then, we introduce a semantic learning scheme to leverage the spatio-temporal constraints, which are coherent to the SCD task, to guide the learning of semantic changes. The resulting network (SCanNet) significantly outperforms the baseline method in terms of both detection of critical semantic changes and semantic consistency in the obtained bi-temporal results. It achieves the SOTA accuracy on two benchmark datasets for the SCD.
abstract_zh: 语义变化检测（SCD）是指同时提取遥感图像（RSI）中变化区域和语义类别（变化前后）的任务。这比二进制变化检测 (BCD) 更有意义，因为它可以对观察区域进行详细的变化分析。之前的工作建立了三分支卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构作为 SCD 的范例。然而，利用有限数量的变化样本来利用语义信息仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们研究共同考虑时空依赖性，以提高 SCD 的准确性。首先，我们提出了语义变化转换器 (SCanFormer) 来显式建模双时态 RSI 之间的“从到”语义转换。然后，我们引入了一种语义学习方案，利用与 SCD 任务一致的时空约束来指导语义变化的学习。所得到的网络（SCanNet）在关键语义变化的检测和所获得的双时态结果的语义一致性方面显着优于基线方法。它在 SCD 的两个基准数据集上实现了 SOTA 精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合时空建模的方法，用于提升遥感图像语义变化检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统三支路CNN在变化样本有限时难以有效利用语义信息，需通过时空依赖关系增强语义变化检测能力。
AI.method: 提出语义变化Transformer（SCanFormer）显式建模双时相语义转换，并设计语义学习方案利用时空约束指导模型训练。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上显著优于基线方法，达到语义变化检测的最先进（SOTA）准确率。
AI.conclusion: 联合时空建模有效提升了语义变化检测的精度与一致性，验证了方法在遥感图像分析中的优越性。

method: 提出语义变化Transformer（SCanFormer）显式建模双时相语义转换，并设计语义学习方案利用时空约束指导模型训练。
result: 在两个基准数据集上显著优于基线方法，达到语义变化检测的最先进（SOTA）准确率。
conclusion: 联合时空建模有效提升了语义变化检测的精度与一致性，验证了方法在遥感图像分析中的优越性。
search_text: Joint Spatio-Temporal Modeling for the Semantic Change Detection in Remote Sensing Images 遥感图像语义变化检测的联合时空建模 Semantic Change Detection (SCD) refers to the task of simultaneously extracting the changed areas and the semantic categories (before and after the changes) in Remote Sensing Images (RSIs). This is more meaningful than Binary Change Detection (BCD) since it enables detailed change analysis in the observed areas. Previous works established triple-branch Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures as the paradigm for SCD. However, it remains challenging to exploit semantic information with a limited amount of change samples. In this work, we investigate to jointly consider the spatio-temporal dependencies to improve the accuracy of SCD. First, we propose a Semantic Change Transformer (SCanFormer) to explicitly model the 'from-to' semantic transitions between the bi-temporal RSIs. Then, we introduce a semantic learning scheme to leverage the spatio-temporal constraints, which are coherent to the SCD task, to guide the learning of semantic changes. The resulting network (SCanNet) significantly outperforms the baseline method in terms of both detection of critical semantic changes and semantic consistency in the obtained bi-temporal results. It achieves the SOTA accuracy on two benchmark datasets for the SCD. 语义变化检测（SCD）是指同时提取遥感图像（RSI）中变化区域和语义类别（变化前后）的任务。这比二进制变化检测 (BCD) 更有意义，因为它可以对观察区域进行详细的变化分析。之前的工作建立了三分支卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构作为 SCD 的范例。然而，利用有限数量的变化样本来利用语义信息仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们研究共同考虑时空依赖性，以提高 SCD 的准确性。首先，我们提出了语义变化转换器 (SCanFormer) 来显式建模双时态 RSI 之间的“从到”语义转换。然后，我们引入了一种语义学习方案，利用与 SCD 任务一致的时空约束来指导语义变化的学习。所得到的网络（SCanNet）在关键语义变化的检测和所获得的双时态结果的语义一致性方面显着优于基线方法。它在 SCD 的两个基准数据集上实现了 SOTA 精度。 本文提出一种结合时空建模的方法，用于提升遥感图像语义变化检测的准确性。 Lei Ding,Jing Zhang,Kai Zhang,Haitao Guo,Bing Liu,Lorenzo Bruzzone cs.CV

authors_text: Tanmay Vilas Samak,Chinmay Vilas Samak,Sivanathan Kandhasamy,Venkat Krovi,Ming Xie
title: AutoDRIVE: A Comprehensive, Flexible and Integrated Digital Twin Ecosystem for Enhancing Autonomous Driving Research and Education
title_zh: AutoDRIVE：全面、灵活、集成的数字孪生生态系统，用于加强自动驾驶研究和教育
abstract: Prototyping and validating hardware-software components, sub-systems and systems within the intelligent transportation system-of-systems framework requires a modular yet flexible and open-access ecosystem. This work presents our attempt towards developing such a comprehensive research and education ecosystem, called AutoDRIVE, for synergistically prototyping, simulating and deploying cyber-physical solutions pertaining to autonomous driving as well as smart city management. AutoDRIVE features both software as well as hardware-in-the-loop testing interfaces with openly accessible scaled vehicle and infrastructure components. The ecosystem is compatible with a variety of development frameworks, and supports both single and multi-agent paradigms through local as well as distributed computing. Most critically, AutoDRIVE is intended to be modularly expandable to explore emergent technologies, and this work highlights various complementary features and capabilities of the proposed ecosystem by demonstrating four such deployment use-cases: (i) autonomous parking using probabilistic robotics approach for mapping, localization, path planning and control; (ii) behavioral cloning using computer vision and deep imitation learning; (iii) intersection traversal using vehicle-to-vehicle communication and deep reinforcement learning; and (iv) smart city management using vehicle-to-infrastructure communication and internet-of-things.
summary: Prototyping and validating hardware-software components, sub-systems and systems within the intelligent transportation system-of-systems framework requires a modular yet flexible and open-access ecosystem. This work presents our attempt towards developing such a comprehensive research and education ecosystem, called AutoDRIVE, for synergistically prototyping, simulating and deploying cyber-physical solutions pertaining to autonomous driving as well as smart city management. AutoDRIVE features both software as well as hardware-in-the-loop testing interfaces with openly accessible scaled vehicle and infrastructure components. The ecosystem is compatible with a variety of development frameworks, and supports both single and multi-agent paradigms through local as well as distributed computing. Most critically, AutoDRIVE is intended to be modularly expandable to explore emergent technologies, and this work highlights various complementary features and capabilities of the proposed ecosystem by demonstrating four such deployment use-cases: (i) autonomous parking using probabilistic robotics approach for mapping, localization, path planning and control; (ii) behavioral cloning using computer vision and deep imitation learning; (iii) intersection traversal using vehicle-to-vehicle communication and deep reinforcement learning; and (iv) smart city management using vehicle-to-infrastructure communication and internet-of-things.
abstract_zh: 在智能交通系统框架内对硬件软件组件、子系统和系统进行原型设计和验证需要一个模块化但灵活且开放访问的生态系统。这项工作展示了我们开发这样一个名为 AutoDRIVE 的综合研究和教育生态系统的尝试，用于协同原型设计、模拟和部署与自动驾驶和智慧城市管理相关的网络物理解决方案。 AutoDRIVE 具有软件和硬件在环测试接口，以及可公开访问的缩放车辆和基础设施组件。该生态系统与各种开发框架兼容，并通过本地和分布式计算支持单代理和多代理范例。最重要的是，AutoDRIVE 旨在进行模块化扩展，以探索新兴技术，这项工作通过展示四个此类部署用例，突出了所提出的生态系统的各种互补特征和功能：（i）使用概率机器人方法进行地图绘制、定位、路径规划和控制的自动停车； (ii) 使用计算机视觉和深度模仿学习进行行为克隆； (iii) 使用车辆间通信和深度强化学习进行交叉路口遍历； (iv) 利用车辆到基础设施通信和物联网的智慧城市管理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AutoDRIVE的综合数字孪生生态系统，用于增强自动驾驶研究和教育中的硬件-软件协同原型设计、仿真与部署。
AI.motivation: 现有智能交通系统缺乏模块化、灵活且开放的测试环境，难以支持自动驾驶与智慧城市管理的复杂需求，亟需集成化生态系统以促进技术创新与教学实践。
AI.method: 构建包含硬件在环测试接口的AutoDRIVE平台，集成开放的车辆与基础设施组件，兼容多种开发框架及单/多智能体模式，并通过四个应用场景验证其功能。
AI.result: 通过自主泊车、行为克隆、交叉路口通行及智慧城市管理四个案例，验证了AutoDRIVE在映射、路径规划、车联网通信等任务中的有效性与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: AutoDRIVE为自动驾驶和智慧城市研究提供了模块化、可扩展的数字孪生平台，显著提升了科研与教育的实践效率与技术探索能力。

authors_text: Dario Izzo,Alexander Hadjiivanov,Dominik Dold,Gabriele Meoni,Emmanuel Blazquez
title: Neuromorphic Computing and Sensing in Space
title_zh: 空间神经形态计算和传感
abstract: The term ``neuromorphic'' refers to systems that are closely resembling the architecture and/or the dynamics of biological neural networks. Typical examples are novel computer chips designed to mimic the architecture of a biological brain, or sensors that get inspiration from, e.g., the visual or olfactory systems in insects and mammals to acquire information about the environment. This approach is not without ambition as it promises to enable engineered devices able to reproduce the level of performance observed in biological organisms -- the main immediate advantage being the efficient use of scarce resources, which translates into low power requirements. The emphasis on low power and energy efficiency of neuromorphic devices is a perfect match for space applications. Spacecraft -- especially miniaturized ones -- have strict energy constraints as they need to operate in an environment which is scarce with resources and extremely hostile. In this work we present an overview of early attempts made to study a neuromorphic approach in a space context at the European Space Agency's (ESA) Advanced Concepts Team (ACT).
summary: The term ``neuromorphic'' refers to systems that are closely resembling the architecture and/or the dynamics of biological neural networks. Typical examples are novel computer chips designed to mimic the architecture of a biological brain, or sensors that get inspiration from, e.g., the visual or olfactory systems in insects and mammals to acquire information about the environment. This approach is not without ambition as it promises to enable engineered devices able to reproduce the level of performance observed in biological organisms -- the main immediate advantage being the efficient use of scarce resources, which translates into low power requirements. The emphasis on low power and energy efficiency of neuromorphic devices is a perfect match for space applications. Spacecraft -- especially miniaturized ones -- have strict energy constraints as they need to operate in an environment which is scarce with resources and extremely hostile. In this work we present an overview of early attempts made to study a neuromorphic approach in a space context at the European Space Agency's (ESA) Advanced Concepts Team (ACT).
abstract_zh: 术语“神经形态”是指与生物神经网络的架构和/或动力学非常相似的系统。典型的例子是设计用于模仿生物大脑结构的新型计算机芯片，或者从昆虫和哺乳动物的视觉或嗅觉系统中获得灵感以获取有关环境信息的传感器。这种方法并非没有野心，因为它有望使工程设备能够重现生物有机体中观察到的性能水平——主要的直接优势是有效利用稀缺资源，这意味着低功耗。神经形态设备对低功耗和能源效率的重视与太空应用完美匹配。航天器——尤其是小型航天器——具有严格的能源限制，因为它们需要在资源稀缺且极其恶劣的环境中运行。在这项工作中，我们概述了欧洲航天局 (ESA) 先进概念团队 (ACT) 在太空背景下研究神经拟态方法的早期尝试。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了欧洲航天局（ESA）先进概念团队（ACT）在空间领域早期探索神经形态计算与感知技术的研究。
AI.motivation: 空间飞行器尤其是微型化设备面临严苛的能源限制，而神经形态系统通过模仿生物神经网络实现高效资源利用，契合空间任务需求。
AI.method: 通过综述ESA ACT团队开展的神经形态技术在空间环境中的初步研究与实验探索。
AI.result: 识别出神经形态计算与感知技术在空间应用中的潜力，同时明确了技术适配性验证与工程化挑战。
AI.conclusion: 神经形态技术为未来空间任务提供低功耗智能解决方案，但需进一步针对空间极端环境开展系统性研究。

The emphasis on low power and energy efficiency of neuromorphic devices is a perfect match for space applications. In this work we present an overview of early attempts made to study a neuromorphic approach in a space context at the European Space Agency's (ESA) Advanced Concepts Team (ACT). 术语“神经形态”是指与生物神经网络的架构和/或动力学非常相似的系统。典型的例子是设计用于模仿生物大脑结构的新型计算机芯片，或者从昆虫和哺乳动物的视觉或嗅觉系统中获得灵感以获取有关环境信息的传感器。这种方法并非没有野心，因为它有望使工程设备能够重现生物有机体中观察到的性能水平——主要的直接优势是有效利用稀缺资源，这意味着低功耗。神经形态设备对低功耗和能源效率的重视与太空应用完美匹配。航天器——尤其是小型航天器——具有严格的能源限制，因为它们需要在资源稀缺且极其恶劣的环境中运行。在这项工作中，我们概述了欧洲航天局 (ESA) 先进概念团队 (ACT) 在太空背景下研究神经拟态方法的早期尝试。 本文概述了欧洲航天局（ESA）先进概念团队（ACT）在空间领域早期探索神经形态计算与感知技术的研究。 Dario Izzo,Alexander Hadjiivanov,Dominik Dold,Gabriele Meoni,Emmanuel Blazquez cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Yiming Wang,Qin Han,Marc Habermann,Kostas Daniilidis,Christian Theobalt,Lingjie Liu
title: NeuS2: Fast Learning of Neural Implicit Surfaces for Multi-view Reconstruction
title_zh: NeuS2：用于多视图重建的神经隐式表面的快速学习
abstract: Recent methods for neural surface representation and rendering, for example NeuS, have demonstrated the remarkably high-quality reconstruction of static scenes. However, the training of NeuS takes an extremely long time (8 hours), which makes it almost impossible to apply them to dynamic scenes with thousands of frames. We propose a fast neural surface reconstruction approach, called NeuS2, which achieves two orders of magnitude improvement in terms of acceleration without compromising reconstruction quality. To accelerate the training process, we parameterize a neural surface representation by multi-resolution hash encodings and present a novel lightweight calculation of second-order derivatives tailored to our networks to leverage CUDA parallelism, achieving a factor two speed up. To further stabilize and expedite training, a progressive learning strategy is proposed to optimize multi-resolution hash encodings from coarse to fine. We extend our method for fast training of dynamic scenes, with a proposed incremental training strategy and a novel global transformation prediction component, which allow our method to handle challenging long sequences with large movements and deformations. Our experiments on various datasets demonstrate that NeuS2 significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts in both surface reconstruction accuracy and training speed for both static and dynamic scenes. The code is available at our website: https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/NeuS2/ .
summary: Recent methods for neural surface representation and rendering, for example NeuS, have demonstrated the remarkably high-quality reconstruction of static scenes. However, the training of NeuS takes an extremely long time (8 hours), which makes it almost impossible to apply them to dynamic scenes with thousands of frames. We propose a fast neural surface reconstruction approach, called NeuS2, which achieves two orders of magnitude improvement in terms of acceleration without compromising reconstruction quality. To accelerate the training process, we parameterize a neural surface representation by multi-resolution hash encodings and present a novel lightweight calculation of second-order derivatives tailored to our networks to leverage CUDA parallelism, achieving a factor two speed up. To further stabilize and expedite training, a progressive learning strategy is proposed to optimize multi-resolution hash encodings from coarse to fine. We extend our method for fast training of dynamic scenes, with a proposed incremental training strategy and a novel global transformation prediction component, which allow our method to handle challenging long sequences with large movements and deformations. Our experiments on various datasets demonstrate that NeuS2 significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts in both surface reconstruction accuracy and training speed for both static and dynamic scenes. The code is available at our website: https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/NeuS2/ .
abstract_zh: 最近的神经表面表示和渲染方法，例如 NeuS，已经证明了静态场景的高质量重建。然而，NeuS的训练需要非常长的时间（8小时），这使得它们几乎不可能应用于数千帧的动态场景。我们提出了一种称为 NeuS2 的快速神经表面重建方法，该方法在不影响重建质量的情况下在加速方面实现了两个数量级的改进。为了加速训练过程，我们通过多分辨率哈希编码对神经表面表示进行参数化，并提出一种针对我们的网络量身定制的新颖的二阶导数轻量级计算，以利用 CUDA 并行性，实现两倍的加速。为了进一步稳定和加速训练，提出了一种渐进式学习策略来优化多分辨率哈希编码从粗到细。我们通过提出的增量训练策略和新颖的全局变换预测组件扩展了动态场景快速训练的方法，这使得我们的方法能够处理具有大运动和变形的具有挑战性的长序列。我们对各种数据集的实验表明，NeuS2 在静态和动态场景的表面重建精度和训练速度方面都显着优于最先进的技术。该代码可在我们的网站上获取：https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/NeuS2/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuS2方法，通过优化神经隐式表面表示和训练策略，显著加速多视角重建过程。
AI.motivation: 现有神经表面重建方法（如NeuS）训练时间过长（8小时），难以处理动态场景的数千帧数据，需提升计算效率。
AI.method: 采用多分辨率哈希编码参数化表面表示，设计轻量级二阶导数计算以利用CUDA并行性，并提出渐进式学习策略和增量训练策略处理动态场景。
AI.result: 在静态和动态场景数据集上，NeuS2在保持重建质量的同时，训练速度较NeuS提升两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: NeuS2通过高效网络设计和训练策略，在保证精度的前提下实现了神经隐式表面的快速重建，适用于动态场景处理。

authors_text: Lu Bai,Lixin Cui,Edwin R. Hancock
title: QESK: Quantum-based Entropic Subtree Kernels for Graph Classification
title_zh: QESK：用于图分类的基于量子的熵子树内核
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel graph kernel, namely the Quantum-based Entropic Subtree Kernel (QESK), for Graph Classification. To this end, we commence by computing the Average Mixing Matrix (AMM) of the Continuous-time Quantum Walk (CTQW) evolved on each graph structure. Moreover, we show how this AMM matrix can be employed to compute a series of entropic subtree representations associated with the classical Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) algorithm. For a pair of graphs, the QESK kernel is defined by computing the exponentiation of the negative Euclidean distance between their entropic subtree representations, theoretically resulting in a positive definite graph kernel. We show that the proposed QESK kernel not only encapsulates complicated intrinsic quantum-based structural characteristics of graph structures through the CTQW, but also theoretically addresses the shortcoming of ignoring the effects of unshared substructures arising in state-of-the-art R-convolution graph kernels. Moreover, unlike the classical R-convolution kernels, the proposed QESK can discriminate the distinctions of isomorphic subtrees in terms of the global graph structures, theoretically explaining the effectiveness. Experiments indicate that the proposed QESK kernel can significantly outperform state-of-the-art graph kernels and graph deep learning methods for graph classification problems.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel graph kernel, namely the Quantum-based Entropic Subtree Kernel (QESK), for Graph Classification. To this end, we commence by computing the Average Mixing Matrix (AMM) of the Continuous-time Quantum Walk (CTQW) evolved on each graph structure. Moreover, we show how this AMM matrix can be employed to compute a series of entropic subtree representations associated with the classical Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) algorithm. For a pair of graphs, the QESK kernel is defined by computing the exponentiation of the negative Euclidean distance between their entropic subtree representations, theoretically resulting in a positive definite graph kernel. We show that the proposed QESK kernel not only encapsulates complicated intrinsic quantum-based structural characteristics of graph structures through the CTQW, but also theoretically addresses the shortcoming of ignoring the effects of unshared substructures arising in state-of-the-art R-convolution graph kernels. Moreover, unlike the classical R-convolution kernels, the proposed QESK can discriminate the distinctions of isomorphic subtrees in terms of the global graph structures, theoretically explaining the effectiveness. Experiments indicate that the proposed QESK kernel can significantly outperform state-of-the-art graph kernels and graph deep learning methods for graph classification problems.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的图内核，即基于量子的熵子树内核（QESK），用于图分类。为此，我们首先计算在每个图结构上演化的连续时间量子行走（CTQW）的平均混合矩阵（AMM）。此外，我们还展示了如何使用该 AMM 矩阵来计算与经典 Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) 算法相关的一系列熵子树表示。对于一对图，QESK 核是通过计算它们的熵子树表示之间的负欧几里德距离的幂来定义的，理论上会产生正定图核。我们表明，所提出的 QESK 内核不仅通过 CTQW 封装了图结构的复杂的基于量子的结构特征，而且从理论上解决了忽略最先进的 R 卷积图内核中出现的非共享子结构影响的缺点。此外，与经典的R卷积核不同，所提出的QESK可以根据全局图结构区分同构子树的区别，从理论上解释了其有效性。实验表明，针对图分类问题，所提出的 QESK 内核可以显着优于最先进的图内核和图深度学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于量子行走的熵子树核（QESK），用于图分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有图核方法（如R-卷积核）存在忽略未共享子结构的问题，且难以捕捉复杂的量子结构特征。
AI.method: 通过连续时间量子行走计算图的平均混合矩阵（AMM），结合经典Weisfeiler-Lehman算法生成熵子树表示，利用负欧氏距离的指数定义QESK核。
AI.result: 实验表明QESK在图分类任务中显著优于现有图核和深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: QESK通过量子行走和熵子树表示有效捕捉了图的全局结构特性，解决了现有方法的局限性。
