authors_text: Xuan Gong,Liangchen Song,Meng Zheng,Benjamin Planche,Terrence Chen,Junsong Yuan,David Doermann,Ziyan Wu
title: Progressive Multi-view Human Mesh Recovery with Self-Supervision
title_zh: 具有自我监督功能的渐进式多视图人体网格恢复
abstract: To date, little attention has been given to multi-view 3D human mesh estimation, despite real-life applicability (e.g., motion capture, sport analysis) and robustness to single-view ambiguities. Existing solutions typically suffer from poor generalization performance to new settings, largely due to the limited diversity of image-mesh pairs in multi-view training data. To address this shortcoming, people have explored the use of synthetic images. But besides the usual impact of visual gap between rendered and target data, synthetic-data-driven multi-view estimators also suffer from overfitting to the camera viewpoint distribution sampled during training which usually differs from real-world distributions. Tackling both challenges, we propose a novel simulation-based training pipeline for multi-view human mesh recovery, which (a) relies on intermediate 2D representations which are more robust to synthetic-to-real domain gap; (b) leverages learnable calibration and triangulation to adapt to more diversified camera setups; and (c) progressively aggregates multi-view information in a canonical 3D space to remove ambiguities in 2D representations. Through extensive benchmarking, we demonstrate the superiority of the proposed solution especially for unseen in-the-wild scenarios.
summary: To date, little attention has been given to multi-view 3D human mesh estimation, despite real-life applicability (e.g., motion capture, sport analysis) and robustness to single-view ambiguities. Existing solutions typically suffer from poor generalization performance to new settings, largely due to the limited diversity of image-mesh pairs in multi-view training data. To address this shortcoming, people have explored the use of synthetic images. But besides the usual impact of visual gap between rendered and target data, synthetic-data-driven multi-view estimators also suffer from overfitting to the camera viewpoint distribution sampled during training which usually differs from real-world distributions. Tackling both challenges, we propose a novel simulation-based training pipeline for multi-view human mesh recovery, which (a) relies on intermediate 2D representations which are more robust to synthetic-to-real domain gap; (b) leverages learnable calibration and triangulation to adapt to more diversified camera setups; and (c) progressively aggregates multi-view information in a canonical 3D space to remove ambiguities in 2D representations. Through extensive benchmarking, we demonstrate the superiority of the proposed solution especially for unseen in-the-wild scenarios.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，尽管多视图 3D 人体网格估计具有现实生活中的适用性（例如动作捕捉、运动分析）以及对单视图模糊性的鲁棒性，但人们很少关注多视图 3D 人体网格估计。现有的解决方案通常对新设置的泛化性能较差，这主要是由于多视图训练数据中图像网格对的多样性有限。为了解决这个缺点，人们探索了合成图像的使用。但是，除了渲染数据和目标数据之间视觉间隙的常见影响之外，合成数据驱动的多视图估计器还受到训练期间采样的相机视点分布的过度拟合的影响，该分布通常与现实世界的分布不同。为了解决这两个挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模拟的多视图人体网格恢复训练管道，它（a）依赖于中间 2D 表示，该表示对合成到真实的域间隙更加鲁棒； (b) 利用可学习的校准和三角测量来适应更多样化的相机设置； (c) 逐步聚合规范 3D 空间中的多视图信息，以消除 2D 表示中的模糊性。通过广泛的基准测试，我们展示了所提出的解决方案的优越性，特别是对于未见过的野外场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督的渐进式多视角人体网格恢复方法，解决现有方法在真实场景下的泛化性不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多视角3D人体估计方法因训练数据多样性不足及合成数据与真实数据间的域差距，导致在真实场景中泛化能力差。
AI.method: 通过中间2D表示增强域适应能力，结合可学习校准与三角化处理多样化相机设置，并在规范3D空间渐进聚合多视角信息。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，尤其在未见过的真实场景下，该方法显著优于现有解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模拟训练框架有效缓解了合成数据与真实场景的差异，提升了多视角人体网格恢复的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

search_text: Progressive Multi-view Human Mesh Recovery with Self-Supervision 具有自我监督功能的渐进式多视图人体网格恢复 To date, little attention has been given to multi-view 3D human mesh estimation, despite real-life applicability (e.g., motion capture, sport analysis) and robustness to single-view ambiguities. Existing solutions typically suffer from poor generalization performance to new settings, largely due to the limited diversity of image-mesh pairs in multi-view training data. To address this shortcoming, people have explored the use of synthetic images. But besides the usual impact of visual gap between rendered and target data, synthetic-data-driven multi-view estimators also suffer from overfitting to the camera viewpoint distribution sampled during training which usually differs from real-world distributions. Tackling both challenges, we propose a novel simulation-based training pipeline for multi-view human mesh recovery, which (a) relies on intermediate 2D representations which are more robust to synthetic-to-real domain gap; (b) leverages learnable calibration and triangulation to adapt to more diversified camera setups; and (c) progressively aggregates multi-view information in a canonical 3D space to remove ambiguities in 2D representations. Through extensive benchmarking, we demonstrate the superiority of the proposed solution especially for unseen in-the-wild scenarios. 迄今为止，尽管多视图 3D 人体网格估计具有现实生活中的适用性（例如动作捕捉、运动分析）以及对单视图模糊性的鲁棒性，但人们很少关注多视图 3D 人体网格估计。现有的解决方案通常对新设置的泛化性能较差，这主要是由于多视图训练数据中图像网格对的多样性有限。为了解决这个缺点，人们探索了合成图像的使用。但是，除了渲染数据和目标数据之间视觉间隙的常见影响之外，合成数据驱动的多视图估计器还受到训练期间采样的相机视点分布的过度拟合的影响，该分布通常与现实世界的分布不同。为了解决这两个挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模拟的多视图人体网格恢复训练管道，它（a）依赖于中间 2D 表示，该表示对合成到真实的域间隙更加鲁棒； (b) 利用可学习的校准和三角测量来适应更多样化的相机设置； (c) 逐步聚合规范 3D 空间中的多视图信息，以消除 2D 表示中的模糊性。通过广泛的基准测试，我们展示了所提出的解决方案的优越性，特别是对于未见过的野外场景。 本文提出一种基于自监督的渐进式多视角人体网格恢复方法，解决现有方法在真实场景下的泛化性不足问题。 Xuan Gong,Liangchen Song,Meng Zheng,Benjamin Planche,Terrence Chen,Junsong Yuan,David Doermann,Ziyan Wu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ziniu Hu,Ahmet Iscen,Chen Sun,Zirui Wang,Kai-Wei Chang,Yizhou Sun,Cordelia Schmid,David A. Ross,Alireza Fathi
title: REVEAL: Retrieval-Augmented Visual-Language Pre-Training with Multi-Source Multimodal Knowledge Memory
title_zh: REVEAL：利用多源多模态知识记忆进行检索增强视觉语言预训练
abstract: In this paper, we propose an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Visual Language Model (REVEAL) that learns to encode world knowledge into a large-scale memory, and to retrieve from it to answer knowledge-intensive queries. REVEAL consists of four key components: the memory, the encoder, the retriever and the generator. The large-scale memory encodes various sources of multimodal world knowledge (e.g. image-text pairs, question answering pairs, knowledge graph triplets, etc) via a unified encoder. The retriever finds the most relevant knowledge entries in the memory, and the generator fuses the retrieved knowledge with the input query to produce the output. A key novelty in our approach is that the memory, encoder, retriever and generator are all pre-trained end-to-end on a massive amount of data. Furthermore, our approach can use a diverse set of multimodal knowledge sources, which is shown to result in significant gains. We show that REVEAL achieves state-of-the-art results on visual question answering and image captioning.
summary: In this paper, we propose an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Visual Language Model (REVEAL) that learns to encode world knowledge into a large-scale memory, and to retrieve from it to answer knowledge-intensive queries. REVEAL consists of four key components: the memory, the encoder, the retriever and the generator. The large-scale memory encodes various sources of multimodal world knowledge (e.g. image-text pairs, question answering pairs, knowledge graph triplets, etc) via a unified encoder. The retriever finds the most relevant knowledge entries in the memory, and the generator fuses the retrieved knowledge with the input query to produce the output. A key novelty in our approach is that the memory, encoder, retriever and generator are all pre-trained end-to-end on a massive amount of data. Furthermore, our approach can use a diverse set of multimodal knowledge sources, which is shown to result in significant gains. We show that REVEAL achieves state-of-the-art results on visual question answering and image captioning.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端检索增强视觉语言模型（REVEAL），它学习将世界知识编码到大规模存储器中，并从中检索以回答知识密集型查询。 REVEAL 由四个关键组件组成：存储器、编码器、检索器和生成器。大规模存储器通过统一编码器对多模态世界知识的各种来源（例如图像文本对、问答对、知识图三元组等）进行编码。检索器在内存中找到最相关的知识条目，生成器将检索到的知识与输入查询融合以产生输出。我们的方法的一个关键新颖之处在于，存储器、编码器、检索器和生成器都经过大量数据的端到端预训练。此外，我们的方法可以使用多种多模式知识源，这被证明可以带来显着的收益。我们证明 REVEAL 在视觉问答和图像字幕方面取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的检索增强型视觉语言模型REVEAL，通过大规模多源多模态知识记忆库实现知识密集型查询的回答。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型难以有效整合外部知识，且缺乏对多源多模态知识的统一处理框架，限制了复杂任务的性能。
AI.method: 构建包含记忆库、编码器、检索器和生成器的四组件框架，通过统一编码器处理图像-文本对、问答对等多模态知识，并端到端预训练实现知识检索与融合。
AI.result: 在视觉问答和图像 captioning 任务中达到 state-of-the-art 结果，验证了多源知识融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 端到端预训练结合多源多模态知识记忆库显著提升了视觉语言模型的性能，为复杂任务提供了新范式。

authors_text: Deniz Mengu,Anika Tabassum,Mona Jarrahi,Aydogan Ozcan
title: Snapshot Multispectral Imaging Using a Diffractive Optical Network
title_zh: 使用衍射光网络进行快照多光谱成像
abstract: Multispectral imaging has been used for numerous applications in e.g., environmental monitoring, aerospace, defense, and biomedicine. Here, we present a diffractive optical network-based multispectral imaging system trained using deep learning to create a virtual spectral filter array at the output image field-of-view. This diffractive multispectral imager performs spatially-coherent imaging over a large spectrum, and at the same time, routes a pre-determined set of spectral channels onto an array of pixels at the output plane, converting a monochrome focal plane array or image sensor into a multispectral imaging device without any spectral filters or image recovery algorithms. Furthermore, the spectral responsivity of this diffractive multispectral imager is not sensitive to input polarization states. Through numerical simulations, we present different diffractive network designs that achieve snapshot multispectral imaging with 4, 9 and 16 unique spectral bands within the visible spectrum, based on passive spatially-structured diffractive surfaces, with a compact design that axially spans ~72 times the mean wavelength of the spectral band of interest. Moreover, we experimentally demonstrate a diffractive multispectral imager based on a 3D-printed diffractive network that creates at its output image plane a spatially-repeating virtual spectral filter array with 2x2=4 unique bands at terahertz spectrum. Due to their compact form factor and computation-free, power-efficient and polarization-insensitive forward operation, diffractive multispectral imagers can be transformative for various imaging and sensing applications and be used at different parts of the electromagnetic spectrum where high-density and wide-area multispectral pixel arrays are not widely available.
summary: Multispectral imaging has been used for numerous applications in e.g., environmental monitoring, aerospace, defense, and biomedicine. Here, we present a diffractive optical network-based multispectral imaging system trained using deep learning to create a virtual spectral filter array at the output image field-of-view. This diffractive multispectral imager performs spatially-coherent imaging over a large spectrum, and at the same time, routes a pre-determined set of spectral channels onto an array of pixels at the output plane, converting a monochrome focal plane array or image sensor into a multispectral imaging device without any spectral filters or image recovery algorithms. Furthermore, the spectral responsivity of this diffractive multispectral imager is not sensitive to input polarization states. Through numerical simulations, we present different diffractive network designs that achieve snapshot multispectral imaging with 4, 9 and 16 unique spectral bands within the visible spectrum, based on passive spatially-structured diffractive surfaces, with a compact design that axially spans ~72 times the mean wavelength of the spectral band of interest. Moreover, we experimentally demonstrate a diffractive multispectral imager based on a 3D-printed diffractive network that creates at its output image plane a spatially-repeating virtual spectral filter array with 2x2=4 unique bands at terahertz spectrum. Due to their compact form factor and computation-free, power-efficient and polarization-insensitive forward operation, diffractive multispectral imagers can be transformative for various imaging and sensing applications and be used at different parts of the electromagnetic spectrum where high-density and wide-area multispectral pixel arrays are not widely available.
abstract_zh: 多光谱成像已广泛应用于环境监测、航空航天、国防和生物医学等领域。在这里，我们提出了一种基于衍射光学网络的多光谱成像系统，该系统使用深度学习进行训练，以在输出图像视场创建虚拟光谱滤波器阵列。这种衍射多光谱成像仪在大光谱上执行空间相干成像，同时将一组预定的光谱通道路由到输出平面的像素阵列上，将单色焦平面阵列或图像传感器转换为多光谱成像设备，无需任何光谱滤波器或图像恢复算法。此外，这种衍射多光谱成像仪的光谱响应度对输入偏振态不敏感。通过数值模拟，我们提出了不同的衍射网络设计，基于无源空间结构衍射表面，实现了可见光谱内 4、9 和 16 个独特光谱带的快照多光谱成像，其紧凑的设计轴向跨越感兴趣光谱带平均波长的约 72 倍。此外，我们通过实验演示了一种基于 3D 打印衍射网络的衍射多光谱成像仪，该成像仪在其输出图像平面上创建一个空间重复的虚拟光谱滤波器阵列，在太赫兹光谱上具有 2x2=4 个独特的波段。由于其紧凑的外形尺寸和免计算、节能且对偏振不敏感的正向操作，衍射多光谱成像仪可以为各种成像和传感应用带来变革，并可用于高密度和广域多光谱像素阵列尚未广泛使用的电磁频谱的不同部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于衍射光学网络的快照多光谱成像系统，通过深度学习训练实现无需光谱滤波器和图像恢复算法的多光谱成像。
AI.motivation: 传统多光谱成像系统通常依赖复杂光谱滤波器和计算算法，存在体积大、成本高、对偏振敏感等问题，亟需开发更高效、紧凑的成像方案。
AI.method: 设计并训练深度学习驱动的衍射光学网络，在输出平面生成虚拟光谱滤波器阵列，通过结构化衍射表面实现多光谱波段的并行成像，结合数值模拟与3D打印实验验证。
AI.result: 在可见光谱实现4/9/16波段快照成像，太赫兹波段实现4波段成像，系统轴向尺寸仅为目标波段平均波长的72倍，且具有偏振不敏感特性。
AI.conclusion: 该衍射多光谱成像器凭借紧凑结构、免计算特性及宽光谱适应性，有望在缺乏高密度多光谱传感器的电磁波谱领域实现变革性应用。

search_text: Snapshot Multispectral Imaging Using a Diffractive Optical Network 使用衍射光网络进行快照多光谱成像 Multispectral imaging has been used for numerous applications in e.g., environmental monitoring, aerospace, defense, and biomedicine. Here, we present a diffractive optical network-based multispectral imaging system trained using deep learning to create a virtual spectral filter array at the output image field-of-view. This diffractive multispectral imager performs spatially-coherent imaging over a large spectrum, and at the same time, routes a pre-determined set of spectral channels onto an array of pixels at the output plane, converting a monochrome focal plane array or image sensor into a multispectral imaging device without any spectral filters or image recovery algorithms. Furthermore, the spectral responsivity of this diffractive multispectral imager is not sensitive to input polarization states. Through numerical simulations, we present different diffractive network designs that achieve snapshot multispectral imaging with 4, 9 and 16 unique spectral bands within the visible spectrum, based on passive spatially-structured diffractive surfaces, with a compact design that axially spans ~72 times the mean wavelength of the spectral band of interest. Moreover, we experimentally demonstrate a diffractive multispectral imager based on a 3D-printed diffractive network that creates at its output image plane a spatially-repeating virtual spectral filter array with 2x2=4 unique bands at terahertz spectrum. Due to their compact form factor and computation-free, power-efficient and polarization-insensitive forward operation, diffractive multispectral imagers can be transformative for various imaging and sensing applications and be used at different parts of the electromagnetic spectrum where high-density and wide-area multispectral pixel arrays are not widely available. 多光谱成像已广泛应用于环境监测、航空航天、国防和生物医学等领域。在这里，我们提出了一种基于衍射光学网络的多光谱成像系统，该系统使用深度学习进行训练，以在输出图像视场创建虚拟光谱滤波器阵列。这种衍射多光谱成像仪在大光谱上执行空间相干成像，同时将一组预定的光谱通道路由到输出平面的像素阵列上，将单色焦平面阵列或图像传感器转换为多光谱成像设备，无需任何光谱滤波器或图像恢复算法。此外，这种衍射多光谱成像仪的光谱响应度对输入偏振态不敏感。通过数值模拟，我们提出了不同的衍射网络设计，基于无源空间结构衍射表面，实现了可见光谱内 4、9 和 16 个独特光谱带的快照多光谱成像，其紧凑的设计轴向跨越感兴趣光谱带平均波长的约 72 倍。此外，我们通过实验演示了一种基于 3D 打印衍射网络的衍射多光谱成像仪，该成像仪在其输出图像平面上创建一个空间重复的虚拟光谱滤波器阵列，在太赫兹光谱上具有 2x2=4 个独特的波段。由于其紧凑的外形尺寸和免计算、节能且对偏振不敏感的正向操作，衍射多光谱成像仪可以为各种成像和传感应用带来变革，并可用于高密度和广域多光谱像素阵列尚未广泛使用的电磁频谱的不同部分。 本文提出了一种基于衍射光学网络的快照多光谱成像系统，通过深度学习训练实现无需光谱滤波器和图像恢复算法的多光谱成像。 Deniz Mengu,Anika Tabassum,Mona Jarrahi,Aydogan Ozcan physics.optics,cs.CV,physics.app-ph

authors_text: Jiayi Su,Xingbin Tu,Fengzhong Qu,Yan Wei
title: Information-Preserved Blending Method for Forward-Looking Sonar Mosaicing in Non-Ideal System Configuration
title_zh: 非理想系统配置中前瞻声纳拼接的信息保留混合方法
abstract: Forward-Looking Sonar (FLS) has started to gain attention in the field of near-bottom close-range underwater inspection because of its high resolution and high framerate features. Although Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) algorithms have been applied tentatively for object-searching tasks, human supervision is still indispensable, especially when involving critical areas. A clear FLS mosaic containing all suspicious information is in demand to help experts deal with tremendous perception data. However, previous work only considered that FLS is working in an ideal system configuration, which assumes an appropriate sonar imaging setup and the availability of accurate positioning data. Without those promises, the intra-frame and inter-frame artifacts will appear and degrade the quality of the final mosaic by making the information of interest invisible. In this paper, we propose a novel blending method for FLS mosaicing which can preserve interested information. A Long-Short Time Sliding Window (LST-SW) is designed to rectify the local statistics of raw sonar images. The statistics are then utilized to construct a Global Variance Map (GVM). The GVM helps to emphasize the useful information contained in images in the blending phase by classifying the informative and featureless pixels, thereby enhancing the quality of final mosaic. The method is verified using data collected in the real environment. The results show that our method can preserve more details in FLS mosaics for human inspection purposes in practice.
summary: Forward-Looking Sonar (FLS) has started to gain attention in the field of near-bottom close-range underwater inspection because of its high resolution and high framerate features. Although Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) algorithms have been applied tentatively for object-searching tasks, human supervision is still indispensable, especially when involving critical areas. A clear FLS mosaic containing all suspicious information is in demand to help experts deal with tremendous perception data. However, previous work only considered that FLS is working in an ideal system configuration, which assumes an appropriate sonar imaging setup and the availability of accurate positioning data. Without those promises, the intra-frame and inter-frame artifacts will appear and degrade the quality of the final mosaic by making the information of interest invisible. In this paper, we propose a novel blending method for FLS mosaicing which can preserve interested information. A Long-Short Time Sliding Window (LST-SW) is designed to rectify the local statistics of raw sonar images. The statistics are then utilized to construct a Global Variance Map (GVM). The GVM helps to emphasize the useful information contained in images in the blending phase by classifying the informative and featureless pixels, thereby enhancing the quality of final mosaic. The method is verified using data collected in the real environment. The results show that our method can preserve more details in FLS mosaics for human inspection purposes in practice.
abstract_zh: 前视声纳（FLS）因其高分辨率和高帧率的特点，开始在近水底近距离水下检测领域受到关注。尽管自动目标识别（ATR）算法已初步应用于目标搜索任务，但人类监督仍然是不可或缺的，特别是在涉及关键区域时。需要包含所有可疑信息的清晰 FLS 镶嵌图来帮助专家处理大量感知数据。然而，之前的工作仅考虑 FLS 工作在理想的系统配置中，该配置假设适当的声纳成像设置和准确定位数据的可用性。如果没有这些承诺，帧内和帧间伪像就会出现，并通过使感兴趣的信息不可见来降低最终马赛克的质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 FLS 拼接混合方法，可以保留感兴趣的信息。长短时滑动窗口（LST-SW）旨在纠正原始声纳图像的局部统计数据。然后利用统计数据构建全局方差图 (GVM)。 GVM 通过对信息丰富的像素和无特征的像素进行分类，有助于在混合阶段强调图像中包含的有用信息，从而提高最终马赛克的质量。使用真实环境中收集的数据对该方法进行了验证。结果表明，我们的方法可以在 FLS 马赛克中保留更多细节，以便在实践中进行人工检查。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在非理想系统配置下保留关键信息的前视声纳拼接融合方法。
AI.motivation: 现有声纳拼接方法假设理想系统配置，但实际环境中因定位误差和成像条件限制会产生伪影，导致关键信息丢失，影响人工检测效率。
AI.method: 设计长短期滑动窗口(LST-SW)校正原始声纳图像局部统计特性，并构建全局方差图(GVM)分类区分有效信息像素与无特征像素，指导融合过程。
AI.result: 实测数据验证表明，该方法在非理想条件下能有效保留更多细节信息，提升人工检测时的图像可读性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的融合方法通过统计特征分析与自适应加权策略，在复杂环境下显著提升了前视声纳拼接图像的信息保真度。

search_text: Information-Preserved Blending Method for Forward-Looking Sonar Mosaicing in Non-Ideal System Configuration 非理想系统配置中前瞻声纳拼接的信息保留混合方法 Forward-Looking Sonar (FLS) has started to gain attention in the field of near-bottom close-range underwater inspection because of its high resolution and high framerate features. Although Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) algorithms have been applied tentatively for object-searching tasks, human supervision is still indispensable, especially when involving critical areas. A clear FLS mosaic containing all suspicious information is in demand to help experts deal with tremendous perception data. However, previous work only considered that FLS is working in an ideal system configuration, which assumes an appropriate sonar imaging setup and the availability of accurate positioning data. Without those promises, the intra-frame and inter-frame artifacts will appear and degrade the quality of the final mosaic by making the information of interest invisible. In this paper, we propose a novel blending method for FLS mosaicing which can preserve interested information. A Long-Short Time Sliding Window (LST-SW) is designed to rectify the local statistics of raw sonar images. The statistics are then utilized to construct a Global Variance Map (GVM). The GVM helps to emphasize the useful information contained in images in the blending phase by classifying the informative and featureless pixels, thereby enhancing the quality of final mosaic. The method is verified using data collected in the real environment. The results show that our method can preserve more details in FLS mosaics for human inspection purposes in practice. 前视声纳（FLS）因其高分辨率和高帧率的特点，开始在近水底近距离水下检测领域受到关注。尽管自动目标识别（ATR）算法已初步应用于目标搜索任务，但人类监督仍然是不可或缺的，特别是在涉及关键区域时。需要包含所有可疑信息的清晰 FLS 镶嵌图来帮助专家处理大量感知数据。然而，之前的工作仅考虑 FLS 工作在理想的系统配置中，该配置假设适当的声纳成像设置和准确定位数据的可用性。如果没有这些承诺，帧内和帧间伪像就会出现，并通过使感兴趣的信息不可见来降低最终马赛克的质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 FLS 拼接混合方法，可以保留感兴趣的信息。长短时滑动窗口（LST-SW）旨在纠正原始声纳图像的局部统计数据。然后利用统计数据构建全局方差图 (GVM)。 GVM 通过对信息丰富的像素和无特征的像素进行分类，有助于在混合阶段强调图像中包含的有用信息，从而提高最终马赛克的质量。使用真实环境中收集的数据对该方法进行了验证。结果表明，我们的方法可以在 FLS 马赛克中保留更多细节，以便在实践中进行人工检查。 本文提出一种在非理想系统配置下保留关键信息的前视声纳拼接融合方法。 Jiayi Su,Xingbin Tu,Fengzhong Qu,Yan Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Khoi P. N. Nguyen,Raghuram Ramanujan
title: Lookahead Pathology in Monte-Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: 蒙特卡洛树搜索中的前瞻病理学
abstract: Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a search paradigm that first found prominence with its success in the domain of computer Go. Early theoretical work established the soundness and convergence bounds for Upper Confidence bounds applied to Trees (UCT), the most popular instantiation of MCTS; however, there remain notable gaps in our understanding of how UCT behaves in practice. In this work, we address one such gap by considering the question of whether UCT can exhibit lookahead pathology in adversarial settings -- a paradoxical phenomenon first observed in Minimax search where greater search effort leads to worse decision-making. We introduce a novel family of synthetic games that offer rich modeling possibilities while remaining amenable to mathematical analysis. Our theoretical and experimental results suggest that UCT is indeed susceptible to pathological behavior in a range of games drawn from this family.
summary: Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a search paradigm that first found prominence with its success in the domain of computer Go. Early theoretical work established the soundness and convergence bounds for Upper Confidence bounds applied to Trees (UCT), the most popular instantiation of MCTS; however, there remain notable gaps in our understanding of how UCT behaves in practice. In this work, we address one such gap by considering the question of whether UCT can exhibit lookahead pathology in adversarial settings -- a paradoxical phenomenon first observed in Minimax search where greater search effort leads to worse decision-making. We introduce a novel family of synthetic games that offer rich modeling possibilities while remaining amenable to mathematical analysis. Our theoretical and experimental results suggest that UCT is indeed susceptible to pathological behavior in a range of games drawn from this family.
abstract_zh: 蒙特卡洛树搜索 (MCTS) 是一种搜索范式，最初因其在计算机围棋领域的成功而声名鹊起。 Early theoretical work established the soundness and convergence bounds for Upper Confidence bounds applied to Trees (UCT), the most popular instantiation of MCTS;然而，我们对 UCT 在实践中的表现的理解仍然存在显着差距。 In this work, we address one such gap by considering the question of whether UCT can exhibit lookahead pathology in adversarial settings -- a paradoxical phenomenon first observed in Minimax search where greater search effort leads to worse decision-making.我们引入了一系列新颖的合成游戏，它们提供了丰富的建模可能性，同时仍然适合数学分析。 Our theoretical and experimental results suggest that UCT is indeed susceptible to pathological behavior in a range of games drawn from this family.

AI.tldr: 本文研究蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）中的前瞻性病理现象，探讨UCT算法在对抗环境中是否会出现搜索深度增加导致决策质量下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管UCT算法的理论正确性和收敛性已被证明，但其在实际对抗场景中的行为仍存在理解缺口，特别是是否存在类似Minimax搜索的前瞻性病理现象。
AI.method: 设计可数学分析的合成游戏家族，结合理论分析与实验验证，评估UCT在不同游戏场景下的决策表现。
AI.result: 理论与实验表明，UCT在特定合成游戏中确实会因搜索深度增加而产生更差的决策结果，验证了前瞻性病理现象的存在。
AI.conclusion: UCT算法在对抗环境中存在路径依赖的决策缺陷，需进一步研究以改进其鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）中的前瞻性病理现象，探讨UCT算法在对抗环境中是否会出现搜索深度增加导致决策质量下降的问题。

search_text: Lookahead Pathology in Monte-Carlo Tree Search 蒙特卡洛树搜索中的前瞻病理学 Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a search paradigm that first found prominence with its success in the domain of computer Go. Early theoretical work established the soundness and convergence bounds for Upper Confidence bounds applied to Trees (UCT), the most popular instantiation of MCTS; however, there remain notable gaps in our understanding of how UCT behaves in practice. In this work, we address one such gap by considering the question of whether UCT can exhibit lookahead pathology in adversarial settings -- a paradoxical phenomenon first observed in Minimax search where greater search effort leads to worse decision-making. We introduce a novel family of synthetic games that offer rich modeling possibilities while remaining amenable to mathematical analysis. Our theoretical and experimental results suggest that UCT is indeed susceptible to pathological behavior in a range of games drawn from this family. 蒙特卡洛树搜索 (MCTS) 是一种搜索范式，最初因其在计算机围棋领域的成功而声名鹊起。 Early theoretical work established the soundness and convergence bounds for Upper Confidence bounds applied to Trees (UCT), the most popular instantiation of MCTS;然而，我们对 UCT 在实践中的表现的理解仍然存在显着差距。 In this work, we address one such gap by considering the question of whether UCT can exhibit lookahead pathology in adversarial settings -- a paradoxical phenomenon first observed in Minimax search where greater search effort leads to worse decision-making.我们引入了一系列新颖的合成游戏，它们提供了丰富的建模可能性，同时仍然适合数学分析。 Our theoretical and experimental results suggest that UCT is indeed susceptible to pathological behavior in a range of games drawn from this family. 本文研究蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）中的前瞻性病理现象，探讨UCT算法在对抗环境中是否会出现搜索深度增加导致决策质量下降的问题。 Khoi P. N. Nguyen,Raghuram Ramanujan cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Thilo Hagendorff,Sarah Fabi,Michal Kosinski
title: Thinking Fast and Slow in Large Language Models
title_zh: 大型语言模型中的快与慢思考
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are currently at the forefront of intertwining AI systems with human communication and everyday life. Therefore, it is of great importance to evaluate their emerging abilities. In this study, we show that LLMs like GPT-3 exhibit behavior that strikingly resembles human-like intuition - and the cognitive errors that come with it. However, LLMs with higher cognitive capabilities, in particular ChatGPT and GPT-4, learned to avoid succumbing to these errors and perform in a hyperrational manner. For our experiments, we probe LLMs with the Cognitive Reflection Test (CRT) as well as semantic illusions that were originally designed to investigate intuitive decision-making in humans. Our study demonstrates that investigating LLMs with methods from psychology has the potential to reveal otherwise unknown emergent traits.
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are currently at the forefront of intertwining AI systems with human communication and everyday life. Therefore, it is of great importance to evaluate their emerging abilities. In this study, we show that LLMs like GPT-3 exhibit behavior that strikingly resembles human-like intuition - and the cognitive errors that come with it. However, LLMs with higher cognitive capabilities, in particular ChatGPT and GPT-4, learned to avoid succumbing to these errors and perform in a hyperrational manner. For our experiments, we probe LLMs with the Cognitive Reflection Test (CRT) as well as semantic illusions that were originally designed to investigate intuitive decision-making in humans. Our study demonstrates that investigating LLMs with methods from psychology has the potential to reveal otherwise unknown emergent traits.
abstract_zh: Large language models (LLMs) are currently at the forefront of intertwining AI systems with human communication and everyday life. Therefore, it is of great importance to evaluate their emerging abilities.在这项研究中，我们表明像 GPT-3 这样的法学硕士表现出与人类直觉惊人相似的行为，以及随之而来的认知错误。然而，具有较高认知能力的法学硕士，特别是 ChatGPT 和 GPT-4，学会了避免屈服于这些错误并以超理性的方式行事。在我们的实验中，我们通过认知反射测试（CRT）以及最初旨在研究人类直觉决策的语义错觉来探索法学硕士。 Our study demonstrates that investigating LLMs with methods from psychology has the potential to reveal otherwise unknown emergent traits.

AI.tldr: 评估大语言模型在认知反射测试和语义错觉中的表现，分析其类似人类直觉与理性决策的能力
AI.motivation: 探索大语言模型是否具备类似人类的认知偏差与理性决策能力，并利用心理学方法揭示其潜在特性
AI.method: 通过认知反射测试（CRT）和语义错觉实验，评估大语言模型在直觉与理性决策任务中的表现
AI.result: 实验显示GPT-3表现出人类认知错误，而ChatGPT和GPT-4能有效避免，表现出更高理性水平
AI.conclusion: 心理学方法可有效揭示大语言模型的新兴认知特性，为理解其决策机制提供新视角

authors_text: Lijun Yu,Yong Cheng,Kihyuk Sohn,José Lezama,Han Zhang,Huiwen Chang,Alexander G. Hauptmann,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Yuan Hao,Irfan Essa,Lu Jiang
title: MAGVIT: Masked Generative Video Transformer
title_zh: MAGVIT：屏蔽生成视频转换器
abstract: We introduce the MAsked Generative VIdeo Transformer, MAGVIT, to tackle various video synthesis tasks with a single model. We introduce a 3D tokenizer to quantize a video into spatial-temporal visual tokens and propose an embedding method for masked video token modeling to facilitate multi-task learning. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate the quality, efficiency, and flexibility of MAGVIT. Our experiments show that (i) MAGVIT performs favorably against state-of-the-art approaches and establishes the best-published FVD on three video generation benchmarks, including the challenging Kinetics-600. (ii) MAGVIT outperforms existing methods in inference time by two orders of magnitude against diffusion models and by 60x against autoregressive models. (iii) A single MAGVIT model supports ten diverse generation tasks and generalizes across videos from different visual domains. The source code and trained models will be released to the public at https://magvit.cs.cmu.edu.
summary: We introduce the MAsked Generative VIdeo Transformer, MAGVIT, to tackle various video synthesis tasks with a single model. We introduce a 3D tokenizer to quantize a video into spatial-temporal visual tokens and propose an embedding method for masked video token modeling to facilitate multi-task learning. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate the quality, efficiency, and flexibility of MAGVIT. Our experiments show that (i) MAGVIT performs favorably against state-of-the-art approaches and establishes the best-published FVD on three video generation benchmarks, including the challenging Kinetics-600. (ii) MAGVIT outperforms existing methods in inference time by two orders of magnitude against diffusion models and by 60x against autoregressive models. (iii) A single MAGVIT model supports ten diverse generation tasks and generalizes across videos from different visual domains. The source code and trained models will be released to the public at https://magvit.cs.cmu.edu.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 MAsked Generative Video Transformer，MAGVIT，用单个模型来处理各种视频合成任务。我们引入了 3D 标记器将视频量化为时空视觉标记，并提出了一种用于掩码视频标记建模的嵌入方法，以促进多任务学习。我们进行了大量的实验来证明 MAGVIT 的质量、效率和灵活性。我们的实验表明，(i) MAGVIT 的性能优于最先进的方法，并在三个视频生成基准（包括具有挑战性的 Kinetics-600）上建立了发布最好的 FVD。 (ii) MAGVIT 在推理时间方面优于现有方法（相对于扩散模型）两个数量级，相对于自回归模型（自回归模型）优于现有方法 60 倍。 (iii) 单个 MAGVIT 模型支持十种不同的生成任务，并对来自不同视觉领域的视频进行泛化。源代码和经过训练的模型将在 https://magvit.cs.cmu.edu 向公众发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAGVIT模型，通过统一框架处理多种视频生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法通常针对单一任务优化，缺乏灵活性和效率，需开发支持多任务的通用模型。
AI.method: 设计3D分块器将视频转化为时空视觉标记，并采用掩码标记建模方法实现多任务学习。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-600等基准测试中取得最佳FVD指标，推理速度比扩散模型快100倍，比自回归模型快60倍，支持10种视频生成任务。
AI.conclusion: MAGVIT通过创新架构实现了视频生成质量、效率和灵活性的突破，代码和模型已开源。

authors_text: Bin Li,Yixuan Weng,Qiya Song,Hanjun Deng
title: Artificial Text Detection with Multiple Training Strategies
title_zh: 具有多种训练策略的人工文本检测
comment: Accepted by Dialogue-2022 Conference. 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables
comments: Accepted by Dialogue-2022 Conference. 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables
abstract: As the deep learning rapidly promote, the artificial texts created by generative models are commonly used in news and social media. However, such models can be abused to generate product reviews, fake news, and even fake political content. The paper proposes a solution for the Russian Artificial Text Detection in the Dialogue shared task 2022 (RuATD 2022) to distinguish which model within the list is used to generate this text. We introduce the DeBERTa pre-trained language model with multiple training strategies for this shared task. Extensive experiments conducted on the RuATD dataset validate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Moreover, our submission ranked second place in the evaluation phase for RuATD 2022 (Multi-Class).
summary: As the deep learning rapidly promote, the artificial texts created by generative models are commonly used in news and social media. However, such models can be abused to generate product reviews, fake news, and even fake political content. The paper proposes a solution for the Russian Artificial Text Detection in the Dialogue shared task 2022 (RuATD 2022) to distinguish which model within the list is used to generate this text. We introduce the DeBERTa pre-trained language model with multiple training strategies for this shared task. Extensive experiments conducted on the RuATD dataset validate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Moreover, our submission ranked second place in the evaluation phase for RuATD 2022 (Multi-Class).
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的迅速推广，生成模型创建的人工文本广泛应用于新闻和社交媒体中。然而，此类模型可能会被滥用来生成产品评论、虚假新闻，甚至虚假的政治内容。该论文提出了对话共享任务 2022（RuATD 2022）中俄语人工文本检测的解决方案，以区分列表中的哪个模型用于生成该文本。我们针对此共享任务引入了 DeBERTa 预训练语言模型，该模型具有多种训练策略。在 RuATD 数据集上进行的大量实验验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。此外，我们提交的作品在 RuATD 2022（多类别）评估阶段排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多种训练策略的DeBERTa预训练语言模型，用于检测俄罗斯对话共享任务2022（RuATD 2022）中的人工生成文本。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习发展，生成模型可能被滥用于制造虚假内容，需通过检测技术区分不同模型生成的文本以应对潜在风险。
AI.method: 采用DeBERTa预训练语言模型，结合多种训练策略（如数据增强、模型集成等）进行人工文本检测任务。
AI.result: 在RuATD 2022多分类任务评估阶段中，该方法提交结果排名第二，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Artificial Text Detection with Multiple Training Strategies 具有多种训练策略的人工文本检测 As the deep learning rapidly promote, the artificial texts created by generative models are commonly used in news and social media. However, such models can be abused to generate product reviews, fake news, and even fake political content. The paper proposes a solution for the Russian Artificial Text Detection in the Dialogue shared task 2022 (RuATD 2022) to distinguish which model within the list is used to generate this text. We introduce the DeBERTa pre-trained language model with multiple training strategies for this shared task. Extensive experiments conducted on the RuATD dataset validate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Moreover, our submission ranked second place in the evaluation phase for RuATD 2022 (Multi-Class). 随着深度学习的迅速推广，生成模型创建的人工文本广泛应用于新闻和社交媒体中。然而，此类模型可能会被滥用来生成产品评论、虚假新闻，甚至虚假的政治内容。该论文提出了对话共享任务 2022（RuATD 2022）中俄语人工文本检测的解决方案，以区分列表中的哪个模型用于生成该文本。我们针对此共享任务引入了 DeBERTa 预训练语言模型，该模型具有多种训练策略。在 RuATD 数据集上进行的大量实验验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。此外，我们提交的作品在 RuATD 2022（多类别）评估阶段排名第二。 本文提出一种基于多种训练策略的DeBERTa预训练语言模型，用于检测俄罗斯对话共享任务2022（RuATD 2022）中的人工生成文本。 Bin Li,Yixuan Weng,Qiya Song,Hanjun Deng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Weimin Huang,Elias B. Khalil
title: Walkability Optimization: Formulations, Algorithms, and a Case Study of Toronto
title_zh: 步行适宜性优化：公式、算法和多伦多案例研究
abstract: The concept of walkable urban development has gained increased attention due to its public health, economic, and environmental sustainability benefits. Unfortunately, land zoning and historic under-investment have resulted in spatial inequality in walkability and social inequality among residents. We tackle the problem of Walkability Optimization through the lens of combinatorial optimization. The task is to select locations in which additional amenities (e.g., grocery stores, schools, restaurants) can be allocated to improve resident access via walking while taking into account existing amenities and providing multiple options (e.g., for restaurants). To this end, we derive Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) and Constraint Programming (CP) models. Moreover, we show that the problem's objective function is submodular in special cases, which motivates an efficient greedy heuristic. We conduct a case study on 31 underserved neighborhoods in the City of Toronto, Canada. MILP finds the best solutions in most scenarios but does not scale well with network size. The greedy algorithm scales well and finds near-optimal solutions. Our empirical evaluation shows that neighbourhoods with low walkability have a great potential for transformation into pedestrian-friendly neighbourhoods by strategically placing new amenities. Allocating 3 additional grocery stores, schools, and restaurants can improve the "WalkScore" by more than 50 points (on a scale of 100) for 4 neighbourhoods and reduce the walking distances to amenities for 75% of all residential locations to 10 minutes for all amenity types. Our code and paper appendix are available at https://github.com/khalil-research/walkability.
summary: The concept of walkable urban development has gained increased attention due to its public health, economic, and environmental sustainability benefits. Unfortunately, land zoning and historic under-investment have resulted in spatial inequality in walkability and social inequality among residents. We tackle the problem of Walkability Optimization through the lens of combinatorial optimization. The task is to select locations in which additional amenities (e.g., grocery stores, schools, restaurants) can be allocated to improve resident access via walking while taking into account existing amenities and providing multiple options (e.g., for restaurants). To this end, we derive Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) and Constraint Programming (CP) models. Moreover, we show that the problem's objective function is submodular in special cases, which motivates an efficient greedy heuristic. We conduct a case study on 31 underserved neighborhoods in the City of Toronto, Canada. MILP finds the best solutions in most scenarios but does not scale well with network size. The greedy algorithm scales well and finds near-optimal solutions. Our empirical evaluation shows that neighbourhoods with low walkability have a great potential for transformation into pedestrian-friendly neighbourhoods by strategically placing new amenities. Allocating 3 additional grocery stores, schools, and restaurants can improve the "WalkScore" by more than 50 points (on a scale of 100) for 4 neighbourhoods and reduce the walking distances to amenities for 75% of all residential locations to 10 minutes for all amenity types. Our code and paper appendix are available at https://github.com/khalil-research/walkability.
abstract_zh: 步行城市发展的概念因其公共卫生、经济和环境可持续性效益而受到越来越多的关注。不幸的是，土地分区和历史上的投资不足导致了步行适宜性的空间不平等和居民之间的社会不平等。我们通过组合优化的视角来解决步行适宜性优化问题。任务是选择可以分配额外设施（例如杂货店、学校、餐馆）的位置，以改善居民步行的交通，同时考虑现有设施并提供多种选择（例如餐馆）。为此，我们推导了混合整数线性规划（MILP）和约束规划（CP）模型。此外，我们表明问题的目标函数在特殊情况下是子模的，这激发了有效的贪婪启发式方法。我们对加拿大多伦多市 31 个服务不足的社区进行了案例研究。 MILP 在大多数情况下都能找到最佳解决方案，但不能很好地随网络规模扩展。贪心算法具有良好的扩展性并能找到接近最优的解决方案。我们的实证评估表明，通过战略性地放置新的设施，步行适宜性较低的社区有很大潜力转变为步行友好型社区。分配 3 个额外的杂货店、学校和餐馆可以将 4 个社区的“WalkScore”提高 50 分以上（满分 100 分），并将 75% 的所有住宅区到所有设施类型的设施的步行距离减少到 10 分钟。我们的代码和论文附录可在 https://github.com/khalil-research/walkability 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文通过组合优化方法解决城市步行可达性优化问题，提出混合整数线性规划（MILP）、约束规划（CP）模型及贪心启发式算法，并以多伦多31个社区进行案例研究。
AI.motivation: 步行友好型城市开发具有公共健康、经济和环境可持续性优势，但土地分区和历史投资不足导致步行可达性空间不平等，需通过优化新设施选址改善居民步行可达性。
AI.method: 构建MILP和CP模型以优化新设施选址，证明目标函数在特定情况下的子模性并设计贪心算法，通过多伦多案例验证方法有效性。
AI.result: MILP在小规模网络中表现最优，贪心算法可扩展且近似最优。案例显示，4个社区步行得分提升超50分，75%住宅步行至设施时间缩短至10分钟内。
AI.conclusion: 贪心算法在大规模网络中高效且效果接近最优，证明战略新增设施可显著提升低步行可达性社区的步行友好性，为城市规划提供量化决策支持。

authors_text: Emaad Manzoor,Jordan Tong,Sriniketh Vijayaraghavan,Rui Li
title: Expanding Knowledge Graphs with Humans in the Loop
title_zh: 与人类一起扩展知识图谱
abstract: Curated knowledge graphs encode domain expertise and improve the performance of recommendation, segmentation, ad targeting, and other machine learning systems in several domains. As new concepts emerge in a domain, knowledge graphs must be expanded to preserve machine learning performance. Manually expanding knowledge graphs, however, is infeasible at scale. In this work, we propose a method for knowledge graph expansion with humans-in-the-loop. Concretely, given a knowledge graph, our method predicts the "parents" of new concepts to be added to this graph for further verification by human experts. We show that our method is both accurate and provably "human-friendly". Specifically, we prove that our method predicts parents that are "near" concepts' true parents in the knowledge graph, even when the predictions are incorrect. We then show, with a controlled experiment, that satisfying this property increases both the speed and the accuracy of the human-algorithm collaboration. We further evaluate our method on a knowledge graph from Pinterest and show that it outperforms competing methods on both accuracy and human-friendliness. Upon deployment in production at Pinterest, our method reduced the time needed for knowledge graph expansion by ~400% (compared to manual expansion), and contributed to a subsequent increase in ad revenue of 20%.
summary: Curated knowledge graphs encode domain expertise and improve the performance of recommendation, segmentation, ad targeting, and other machine learning systems in several domains. As new concepts emerge in a domain, knowledge graphs must be expanded to preserve machine learning performance. Manually expanding knowledge graphs, however, is infeasible at scale. In this work, we propose a method for knowledge graph expansion with humans-in-the-loop. Concretely, given a knowledge graph, our method predicts the "parents" of new concepts to be added to this graph for further verification by human experts. We show that our method is both accurate and provably "human-friendly". Specifically, we prove that our method predicts parents that are "near" concepts' true parents in the knowledge graph, even when the predictions are incorrect. We then show, with a controlled experiment, that satisfying this property increases both the speed and the accuracy of the human-algorithm collaboration. We further evaluate our method on a knowledge graph from Pinterest and show that it outperforms competing methods on both accuracy and human-friendliness. Upon deployment in production at Pinterest, our method reduced the time needed for knowledge graph expansion by ~400% (compared to manual expansion), and contributed to a subsequent increase in ad revenue of 20%.
abstract_zh: 精心策划的知识图对领域专业知识进行编码，并提高多个领域的推荐、细分、广告定位和其他机器学习系统的性能。随着某个领域出现新概念，必须扩展知识图以保持机器学习性能。然而，大规模手动扩展知识图谱是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用人在环进行知识图谱扩展的方法。具体来说，给定一个知识图，我们的方法预测新概念的“父母”将添加到该图中，以供人类专家进一步验证。我们证明了我们的方法既准确又“人性化”。具体来说，我们证明我们的方法可以预测知识图中“接近”概念的真正父母的父母，即使预测不正确。然后，我们通过受控实验证明，满足此属性可以提高人类与算法协作的速度和准确性。我们在 Pinterest 的知识图上进一步评估了我们的方法，并表明它在准确性和人类友好性方面都优于竞争方法。在 Pinterest 的生产中部署后，我们的方法将知识图谱扩展所需的时间减少了约 400%（与手动扩展相比），并导致广告收入随后增加了 20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合人类专家反馈的知识图谱扩展方法，通过算法预测新概念的父节点并由人工验证，以提高扩展效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱需持续扩展以适应新概念，但人工扩展效率低下且成本高昂，需开发自动化与人工协作的高效方法。
AI.method: 算法预测新概念的潜在父节点供人类专家验证，通过理论证明预测结果接近真实父节点，并通过控制实验和实际部署验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在Pinterest的实际应用中，该方法使知识图谱扩展时间减少400%，并推动广告收入增长20%，在准确率和人机协作效率上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过算法与人类协作有效解决知识图谱扩展难题，兼具理论保证与实际应用价值，为大规模知识管理提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合人类专家反馈的知识图谱扩展方法，通过算法预测新概念的父节点并由人工验证，以提高扩展效率和准确性。

search_text: Expanding Knowledge Graphs with Humans in the Loop 与人类一起扩展知识图谱 Curated knowledge graphs encode domain expertise and improve the performance of recommendation, segmentation, ad targeting, and other machine learning systems in several domains. As new concepts emerge in a domain, knowledge graphs must be expanded to preserve machine learning performance. Manually expanding knowledge graphs, however, is infeasible at scale. In this work, we propose a method for knowledge graph expansion with humans-in-the-loop. Concretely, given a knowledge graph, our method predicts the "parents" of new concepts to be added to this graph for further verification by human experts. We show that our method is both accurate and provably "human-friendly". Specifically, we prove that our method predicts parents that are "near" concepts' true parents in the knowledge graph, even when the predictions are incorrect. We then show, with a controlled experiment, that satisfying this property increases both the speed and the accuracy of the human-algorithm collaboration. We further evaluate our method on a knowledge graph from Pinterest and show that it outperforms competing methods on both accuracy and human-friendliness. Upon deployment in production at Pinterest, our method reduced the time needed for knowledge graph expansion by ~400% (compared to manual expansion), and contributed to a subsequent increase in ad revenue of 20%. 精心策划的知识图对领域专业知识进行编码，并提高多个领域的推荐、细分、广告定位和其他机器学习系统的性能。随着某个领域出现新概念，必须扩展知识图以保持机器学习性能。然而，大规模手动扩展知识图谱是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用人在环进行知识图谱扩展的方法。具体来说，给定一个知识图，我们的方法预测新概念的“父母”将添加到该图中，以供人类专家进一步验证。我们证明了我们的方法既准确又“人性化”。具体来说，我们证明我们的方法可以预测知识图中“接近”概念的真正父母的父母，即使预测不正确。然后，我们通过受控实验证明，满足此属性可以提高人类与算法协作的速度和准确性。我们在 Pinterest 的知识图上进一步评估了我们的方法，并表明它在准确性和人类友好性方面都优于竞争方法。在 Pinterest 的生产中部署后，我们的方法将知识图谱扩展所需的时间减少了约 400%（与手动扩展相比），并导致广告收入随后增加了 20%。 本文提出了一种结合人类专家反馈的知识图谱扩展方法，通过算法预测新概念的父节点并由人工验证，以提高扩展效率和准确性。 Emaad Manzoor,Jordan Tong,Sriniketh Vijayaraghavan,Rui Li cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jia-Rui Lin,Ming-Hui Wu
title: Exploiting the Power of Human-Robot Collaboration: Coupling and Scale Effects in Bricklaying
title_zh: 发挥人机协作的力量：砌砖过程中的耦合和规模效应
abstract: As an important contributor to GDP growth, the construction industry is suffering from labor shortage due to population ageing, COVID-19 pandemic, and harsh environments. Considering the complexity and dynamics of construction environment, it is still challenging to develop fully automated robots. For a long time in the future, workers and robots will coexist and collaborate with each other to build or maintain a facility efficiently. As an emerging field, human-robot collaboration (HRC) still faces various open problems. To this end, this pioneer research introduces an agent-based modeling approach to investigate the coupling effect and scale effect of HRC in the bricklaying process. With multiple experiments based on simulation, the dynamic and complex nature of HRC is illustrated in two folds: 1) agents in HRC are interdependent due to human factors of workers, features of robots, and their collaboration behaviors; 2) different parameters of HRC are correlated and have significant impacts on construction productivity (CP). Accidentally and interestingly, it is discovered that HRC has a scale effect on CP, which means increasing the number of collaborated human-robot teams will lead to higher CP even if the human-robot ratio keeps unchanged. Overall, it is argued that more investigations in HRC are needed for efficient construction, occupational safety, etc.; and this research can be taken as a stepstone for developing and evaluating new robots, optimizing HRC processes, and even training future industrial workers in the construction industry.
summary: As an important contributor to GDP growth, the construction industry is suffering from labor shortage due to population ageing, COVID-19 pandemic, and harsh environments. Considering the complexity and dynamics of construction environment, it is still challenging to develop fully automated robots. For a long time in the future, workers and robots will coexist and collaborate with each other to build or maintain a facility efficiently. As an emerging field, human-robot collaboration (HRC) still faces various open problems. To this end, this pioneer research introduces an agent-based modeling approach to investigate the coupling effect and scale effect of HRC in the bricklaying process. With multiple experiments based on simulation, the dynamic and complex nature of HRC is illustrated in two folds: 1) agents in HRC are interdependent due to human factors of workers, features of robots, and their collaboration behaviors; 2) different parameters of HRC are correlated and have significant impacts on construction productivity (CP). Accidentally and interestingly, it is discovered that HRC has a scale effect on CP, which means increasing the number of collaborated human-robot teams will lead to higher CP even if the human-robot ratio keeps unchanged. Overall, it is argued that more investigations in HRC are needed for efficient construction, occupational safety, etc.; and this research can be taken as a stepstone for developing and evaluating new robots, optimizing HRC processes, and even training future industrial workers in the construction industry.
abstract_zh: 建筑业作为GDP增长的重要贡献者，由于人口老龄化、COVID-19疫情和恶劣的环境而面临劳动力短缺的问题。考虑到施工环境的复杂性和动态性，开发全自动机器人仍然具有挑战性。在未来很长一段时间内，工人和机器人将共存并相互协作，以高效地建造或维护设施。作为一个新兴领域，人机协作（HRC）仍然面临着各种开放性问题。为此，这项开创性研究引入了基于主体的建模方法来研究砌砖过程中 HRC 的耦合效应和规模效应。通过基于模拟的多次实验，HRC的动态和复杂性从两个方面说明：1）由于工人的人为因素、机器人的特征及其协作行为，HRC中的代理是相互依赖的； 2）不同的HRC参数是相关的，并且对施工生产率（CP）有显着影响。偶然又有趣的是，我们发现HRC对CP有规模效应，这意味着即使人机比例保持不变，增加人机协作团队的数量也会导致更高的CP。总体而言，有人认为，为了高效施工、职业安全等，需要对 HRC 进行更多调查；这项研究可以作为开发和评估新型机器人、优化HRC工艺、甚至培训建筑行业未来产业工人的基石。

AI.tldr: 本文通过基于代理的建模方法，研究人机协作（HRC）在砌砖过程中的耦合效应和规模效应，探讨人类与机器人协作对施工效率的影响。
AI.motivation: 建筑行业面临劳动力短缺问题，而完全自动化的机器人难以应对复杂环境，需通过人机协作提高效率。现有HRC研究存在诸多未解问题，需进一步探索其动态特性与参数影响。
AI.method: 采用基于代理的建模方法，结合仿真实验，分析HRC中人类、机器人及协作行为的相互依赖性，并研究不同参数对施工效率的影响。
AI.result: 发现HRC存在耦合效应（人类与机器人相互依赖）和规模效应（增加协作团队数量可提升施工效率，即使人机比例不变）。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究HRC以提升施工效率与安全性，本文为机器人开发、协作流程优化及工人培训提供了理论基础。

authors_text: Le Xue,Mingfei Gao,Chen Xing,Roberto Martín-Martín,Jiajun Wu,Caiming Xiong,Ran Xu,Juan Carlos Niebles,Silvio Savarese
title: ULIP: Learning a Unified Representation of Language, Images, and Point Clouds for 3D Understanding
title_zh: ULIP：学习语言、图像和点云的统一表示以实现 3D 理解
abstract: The recognition capabilities of current state-of-the-art 3D models are limited by datasets with a small number of annotated data and a pre-defined set of categories. In its 2D counterpart, recent advances have shown that similar problems can be significantly alleviated by employing knowledge from other modalities, such as language. Inspired by this, leveraging multimodal information for 3D modality could be promising to improve 3D understanding under the restricted data regime, but this line of research is not well studied. Therefore, we introduce ULIP to learn a unified representation of images, texts, and 3D point clouds by pre-training with object triplets from the three modalities. To overcome the shortage of training triplets, ULIP leverages a pre-trained vision-language model that has already learned a common visual and textual space by training with massive image-text pairs. Then, ULIP learns a 3D representation space aligned with the common image-text space, using a small number of automatically synthesized triplets. ULIP is agnostic to 3D backbone networks and can easily be integrated into any 3D architecture. Experiments show that ULIP effectively improves the performance of multiple recent 3D backbones by simply pre-training them on ShapeNet55 using our framework, achieving state-of-the-art performance in both standard 3D classification and zero-shot 3D classification on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN. ULIP also improves the performance of PointMLP by around 3% in 3D classification on ScanObjectNN, and outperforms PointCLIP by 28.8% on top-1 accuracy for zero-shot 3D classification on ModelNet40. Our code and pre-trained models are released at https://github.com/salesforce/ULIP.
summary: The recognition capabilities of current state-of-the-art 3D models are limited by datasets with a small number of annotated data and a pre-defined set of categories. In its 2D counterpart, recent advances have shown that similar problems can be significantly alleviated by employing knowledge from other modalities, such as language. Inspired by this, leveraging multimodal information for 3D modality could be promising to improve 3D understanding under the restricted data regime, but this line of research is not well studied. Therefore, we introduce ULIP to learn a unified representation of images, texts, and 3D point clouds by pre-training with object triplets from the three modalities. To overcome the shortage of training triplets, ULIP leverages a pre-trained vision-language model that has already learned a common visual and textual space by training with massive image-text pairs. Then, ULIP learns a 3D representation space aligned with the common image-text space, using a small number of automatically synthesized triplets. ULIP is agnostic to 3D backbone networks and can easily be integrated into any 3D architecture. Experiments show that ULIP effectively improves the performance of multiple recent 3D backbones by simply pre-training them on ShapeNet55 using our framework, achieving state-of-the-art performance in both standard 3D classification and zero-shot 3D classification on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN. ULIP also improves the performance of PointMLP by around 3% in 3D classification on ScanObjectNN, and outperforms PointCLIP by 28.8% on top-1 accuracy for zero-shot 3D classification on ModelNet40. Our code and pre-trained models are released at https://github.com/salesforce/ULIP.
abstract_zh: 当前最先进的 3D 模型的识别能力受到包含少量注释数据和一组预定义类别的数据集的限制。在 2D 对应物中，最近的进展表明，通过使用来自其他模式（例如语言）的知识可以显着缓解类似的问题。受此启发，利用 3D 模态的多模态信息有望改善受限数据机制下的 3D 理解，但这一研究方向尚未得到充分研究。因此，我们引入 ULIP，通过使用来自三种模态的对象三元组进行预训练来学习图像、文本和 3D 点云的统一表示。为了克服训练三元组的短缺，ULIP 利用预先训练的视觉语言模型，该模型已经通过大量图像文本对的训练学习了共同的视觉和文本空间。然后，ULIP 使用少量自动合成的三元组学习与公共图像文本空间对齐的 3D 表示空间。 ULIP 与 3D 主干网络无关，可以轻松集成到任何 3D 架构中。实验表明，ULIP 通过使用我们的框架在 ShapeNet55 上简单地进行预训练，有效地提高了多个最新 3D 主干的性能，在 ModelNet40 和 ScanObjectNN 上的标准 3D 分类和零样本 3D 分类中实现了最先进的性能。 ULIP 还在 ScanObjectNN 上的 3D 分类中将 PointMLP 的性能提高了约 3%，并且在 ModelNet40 上的零样本 3D 分类的 top-1 精度上比 PointCLIP 提高了 28.8%。我们的代码和预训练模型发布于 https://github.com/salesforce/ULIP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ULIP模型，通过融合语言、图像和点云的多模态信息，提升3D理解任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前3D模型受限于标注数据量少和预定义类别，而2D领域通过多模态知识提升性能的方法尚未在3D领域充分研究。
AI.method: 利用预训练的图文模型构建统一视觉-文本空间，通过少量合成三元组对齐3D点云表示，兼容多种3D网络架构。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40和ScanObjectNN数据集上达到SOTA性能，使PointMLP分类准确率提升3%，零样本分类超越PointCLIP 28.8%。
AI.conclusion: ULIP通过多模态预训练有效缓解3D领域数据限制问题，为少样本场景下的3D理解提供新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ULIP模型，通过融合语言、图像和点云的多模态信息，提升3D理解任务的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 当前3D模型受限于标注数据量少和预定义类别，而2D领域通过多模态知识提升性能的方法尚未在3D领域充分研究。

search_text: ULIP: Learning a Unified Representation of Language, Images, and Point Clouds for 3D Understanding ULIP：学习语言、图像和点云的统一表示以实现 3D 理解 The recognition capabilities of current state-of-the-art 3D models are limited by datasets with a small number of annotated data and a pre-defined set of categories. In its 2D counterpart, recent advances have shown that similar problems can be significantly alleviated by employing knowledge from other modalities, such as language. Inspired by this, leveraging multimodal information for 3D modality could be promising to improve 3D understanding under the restricted data regime, but this line of research is not well studied. Therefore, we introduce ULIP to learn a unified representation of images, texts, and 3D point clouds by pre-training with object triplets from the three modalities. To overcome the shortage of training triplets, ULIP leverages a pre-trained vision-language model that has already learned a common visual and textual space by training with massive image-text pairs. Then, ULIP learns a 3D representation space aligned with the common image-text space, using a small number of automatically synthesized triplets. ULIP is agnostic to 3D backbone networks and can easily be integrated into any 3D architecture. Experiments show that ULIP effectively improves the performance of multiple recent 3D backbones by simply pre-training them on ShapeNet55 using our framework, achieving state-of-the-art performance in both standard 3D classification and zero-shot 3D classification on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN. ULIP also improves the performance of PointMLP by around 3% in 3D classification on ScanObjectNN, and outperforms PointCLIP by 28.8% on top-1 accuracy for zero-shot 3D classification on ModelNet40. Our code and pre-trained models are released at https://github.com/salesforce/ULIP. 当前最先进的 3D 模型的识别能力受到包含少量注释数据和一组预定义类别的数据集的限制。在 2D 对应物中，最近的进展表明，通过使用来自其他模式（例如语言）的知识可以显着缓解类似的问题。受此启发，利用 3D 模态的多模态信息有望改善受限数据机制下的 3D 理解，但这一研究方向尚未得到充分研究。因此，我们引入 ULIP，通过使用来自三种模态的对象三元组进行预训练来学习图像、文本和 3D 点云的统一表示。为了克服训练三元组的短缺，ULIP 利用预先训练的视觉语言模型，该模型已经通过大量图像文本对的训练学习了共同的视觉和文本空间。然后，ULIP 使用少量自动合成的三元组学习与公共图像文本空间对齐的 3D 表示空间。 ULIP 与 3D 主干网络无关，可以轻松集成到任何 3D 架构中。实验表明，ULIP 通过使用我们的框架在 ShapeNet55 上简单地进行预训练，有效地提高了多个最新 3D 主干的性能，在 ModelNet40 和 ScanObjectNN 上的标准 3D 分类和零样本 3D 分类中实现了最先进的性能。 ULIP 还在 ScanObjectNN 上的 3D 分类中将 PointMLP 的性能提高了约 3%，并且在 ModelNet40 上的零样本 3D 分类的 top-1 精度上比 PointCLIP 提高了 28.8%。我们的代码和预训练模型发布于 https://github.com/salesforce/ULIP。 本文提出ULIP模型，通过融合语言、图像和点云的多模态信息，提升3D理解任务的性能。 Le Xue,Mingfei Gao,Chen Xing,Roberto Martín-Martín,Jiajun Wu,Caiming Xiong,Ran Xu,Juan Carlos Niebles,Silvio Savarese cs.CV

authors_text: Andrew Zheng,Sriram S. K. S Narayanan
title: Optimal Control for Quadruped Locomotion using LTV MPC
title_zh: 使用 LTV MPC 对四足动物运动进行优化控制
abstract: This paper presents a state-of-the-art optimal controller for quadruped locomotion. The robot dynamics is represented using a single rigid body (SRB) model. A linear time-varying model predictive controller (LTV MPC) is proposed by using linearization schemes. Simulation results show that the LTV MPC can execute various gaits, such as trot and crawl, and is capable of tracking desired reference trajectories even under unknown external disturbances. The LTV MPC is implemented as a quadratic program using qpOASES through the CasADi interface at 50 Hz. The proposed MPC can reach up to 1 m/s top speed with an acceleration of 0.5 m/s2 executing a trot gait. The implementation is available at https:// github.com/AndrewZheng-1011/Quad_ConvexMPC
summary: This paper presents a state-of-the-art optimal controller for quadruped locomotion. The robot dynamics is represented using a single rigid body (SRB) model. A linear time-varying model predictive controller (LTV MPC) is proposed by using linearization schemes. Simulation results show that the LTV MPC can execute various gaits, such as trot and crawl, and is capable of tracking desired reference trajectories even under unknown external disturbances. The LTV MPC is implemented as a quadratic program using qpOASES through the CasADi interface at 50 Hz. The proposed MPC can reach up to 1 m/s top speed with an acceleration of 0.5 m/s2 executing a trot gait. The implementation is available at https:// github.com/AndrewZheng-1011/Quad_ConvexMPC
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种最先进的四足运动最优控制器。机器人动力学使用单个刚体 (SRB) 模型来表示。通过使用线性化方案提出了线性时变模型预测控制器（LTV MPC）。仿真结果表明，LTV MPC 可以执行各种步态，例如小跑和爬行，并且即使在未知的外部干扰下也能够跟踪所需的参考轨迹。 LTV MPC 使用 qpOASES 通过 CasADi 接口以 50 Hz 的频率实现为二次程序。所提出的 MPC 在执行小跑步态时可以达到 1 m/s 的最高速度，加速度为 0.5 m/s2。实现可在 https://github.com/AndrewZheng-1011/Quad_ConvexMPC 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性时变模型预测控制（LTV MPC）的四足机器人最优控制方法，用于实现复杂步态和轨迹跟踪。
AI.motivation: 四足机器人需要应对未知外部扰动并执行多样化步态，传统控制方法在动态调整和计算效率上存在局限。
AI.method: 采用单刚体模型描述机器人动力学，通过线性化方案构建LTV MPC，并利用CasADi接口与qpOASES求解器实现二次规划，控制频率为50 Hz。
AI.result: 仿真验证了LTV MPC可执行 Trot 和 Crawl 等步态，在0.5 m/s²加速度下实现1 m/s最大速度，且能有效跟踪参考轨迹并抵御外部扰动。
AI.conclusion: LTV MPC在计算效率与动态适应性上优于传统方法，为四足机器人复杂地形运动控制提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Ege Erdil,Tamay Besiroglu
title: Algorithmic progress in computer vision
title_zh: 计算机视觉算法进展
abstract: We investigate algorithmic progress in image classification on ImageNet, perhaps the most well-known test bed for computer vision. We estimate a model, informed by work on neural scaling laws, and infer a decomposition of progress into the scaling of compute, data, and algorithms. Using Shapley values to attribute performance improvements, we find that algorithmic improvements have been roughly as important as the scaling of compute for progress computer vision. Our estimates indicate that algorithmic innovations mostly take the form of compute-augmenting algorithmic advances (which enable researchers to get better performance from less compute), not data-augmenting algorithmic advances. We find that compute-augmenting algorithmic advances are made at a pace more than twice as fast as the rate usually associated with Moore's law. In particular, we estimate that compute-augmenting innovations halve compute requirements every nine months (95\% confidence interval: 4 to 25 months).
summary: We investigate algorithmic progress in image classification on ImageNet, perhaps the most well-known test bed for computer vision. We estimate a model, informed by work on neural scaling laws, and infer a decomposition of progress into the scaling of compute, data, and algorithms. Using Shapley values to attribute performance improvements, we find that algorithmic improvements have been roughly as important as the scaling of compute for progress computer vision. Our estimates indicate that algorithmic innovations mostly take the form of compute-augmenting algorithmic advances (which enable researchers to get better performance from less compute), not data-augmenting algorithmic advances. We find that compute-augmenting algorithmic advances are made at a pace more than twice as fast as the rate usually associated with Moore's law. In particular, we estimate that compute-augmenting innovations halve compute requirements every nine months (95\% confidence interval: 4 to 25 months).
abstract_zh: 我们研究 ImageNet 上图像分类的算法进展，这可能是最著名的计算机视觉测试平台。我们根据神经缩放定律的工作来估计模型，并将进展分解为计算、数据和算法的缩放。使用 Shapley 值来归因性能改进，我们发现算法改进与计算机视觉进步的计算扩展大致同样重要。我们的估计表明，算法创新主要采取计算增强算法进步的形式（这使研究人员能够通过更少的计算获得更好的性能），而不是数据增强算法进步。我们发现计算增强算法的进步速度是通常与摩尔定律相关的速度的两倍以上。特别是，我们估计计算增强创新每九个月就会将计算需求减少一半（95\% 置信区间：4 到 25 个月）。

AI.tldr: 本文分析计算机视觉领域算法进展，重点研究ImageNet图像分类任务中算法、计算和数据扩展对进步的贡献。
AI.motivation: 理解算法创新与计算资源扩展在推动计算机视觉进步中的相对作用，为未来研究和资源分配提供依据。
AI.method: 基于神经缩放定律构建模型，结合Shapley值归因分析，分解算法、计算和数据对性能提升的贡献，并量化算法创新类型。
AI.result: 算法改进与计算扩展对计算机视觉进步贡献相当，其中计算增强型算法创新速度超摩尔定律两倍，每九个月使计算需求减半。
AI.conclusion: 计算增强型算法创新是计算机视觉发展的核心驱动力，其快速迭代显著降低了计算需求，可能重塑未来研究重点和资源投入方向。

authors_text: Olanrewaju Tahir Aduragba,Jialin Yu,Alexandra I. Cristea
title: Multi-task Learning for Personal Health Mention Detection on Social Media
title_zh: 社交媒体上个人健康提及检测的多任务学习
abstract: Detecting personal health mentions on social media is essential to complement existing health surveillance systems. However, annotating data for detecting health mentions at a large scale is a challenging task. This research employs a multitask learning framework to leverage available annotated data from a related task to improve the performance on the main task to detect personal health experiences mentioned in social media texts. Specifically, we focus on incorporating emotional information into our target task by using emotion detection as an auxiliary task. Our approach significantly improves a wide range of personal health mention detection tasks compared to a strong state-of-the-art baseline.
summary: Detecting personal health mentions on social media is essential to complement existing health surveillance systems. However, annotating data for detecting health mentions at a large scale is a challenging task. This research employs a multitask learning framework to leverage available annotated data from a related task to improve the performance on the main task to detect personal health experiences mentioned in social media texts. Specifically, we focus on incorporating emotional information into our target task by using emotion detection as an auxiliary task. Our approach significantly improves a wide range of personal health mention detection tasks compared to a strong state-of-the-art baseline.
abstract_zh: 检测社交媒体上提及的个人健康对于补充现有的健康监测系统至关重要。然而，注释数据以大规模检测健康提及是一项具有挑战性的任务。这项研究采用多任务学习框架，利用相关任务中可用的注释数据来提高主要任务的性能，以检测社交媒体文本中提到的个人健康经历。具体来说，我们专注于通过使用情绪检测作为辅助任务将情绪信息融入到我们的目标任务中。与强大的最先进基线相比，我们的方法显着改善了各种个人健康提及检测任务。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用多任务学习框架提升社交媒体中个人健康提及的检测性能
AI.motivation: 大规模标注健康提及数据具有挑战性，需借助多任务学习利用相关任务数据提升检测效果
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架，以情感检测为辅助任务，整合情感信息以增强主任务性能
AI.result: 相比强基线方法，在多种健康提及检测任务中表现显著提升
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习有效提升健康提及检测，情感信息整合是关键因素

authors_text: Hari Hara Suthan Chittoor,Osvaldo Simeone,Leonardo Banchi,Stefano Pirandola
title: Online Convex Optimization of Programmable Quantum Computers to Simulate Time-Varying Quantum Channels
title_zh: 可编程量子计算机的在线凸优化模拟时变量子通道
abstract: Simulating quantum channels is a fundamental primitive in quantum computing, since quantum channels define general (trace-preserving) quantum operations. An arbitrary quantum channel cannot be exactly simulated using a finite-dimensional programmable quantum processor, making it important to develop optimal approximate simulation techniques. In this paper, we study the challenging setting in which the channel to be simulated varies adversarially with time. We propose the use of matrix exponentiated gradient descent (MEGD), an online convex optimization method, and analytically show that it achieves a sublinear regret in time. Through experiments, we validate the main results for time-varying dephasing channels using a programmable generalized teleportation processor.
summary: Simulating quantum channels is a fundamental primitive in quantum computing, since quantum channels define general (trace-preserving) quantum operations. An arbitrary quantum channel cannot be exactly simulated using a finite-dimensional programmable quantum processor, making it important to develop optimal approximate simulation techniques. In this paper, we study the challenging setting in which the channel to be simulated varies adversarially with time. We propose the use of matrix exponentiated gradient descent (MEGD), an online convex optimization method, and analytically show that it achieves a sublinear regret in time. Through experiments, we validate the main results for time-varying dephasing channels using a programmable generalized teleportation processor.
abstract_zh: 模拟量子通道是量子计算中的基本原语，因为量子通道定义了通用（保留踪迹）量子操作。使用有限维可编程量子处理器无法精确模拟任意量子通道，因此开发最佳近似模拟技术非常重要。 In this paper, we study the challenging setting in which the channel to be simulated varies adversarially with time.我们提出使用矩阵指数梯度下降（MEGD），一种在线凸优化方法，并分析表明它及时实现了亚线性遗憾。 Through experiments, we validate the main results for time-varying dephasing channels using a programmable generalized teleportation processor.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用可编程量子计算机模拟随时间变化的量子信道问题，提出了一种基于在线凸优化的方法。
AI.motivation: 由于有限维可编程量子处理器无法精确模拟任意量子信道，且实际信道可能随时间对抗性变化，因此需要开发高效的近似模拟技术。
AI.method: 采用矩阵指数梯度下降（MEGD）在线凸优化方法，并证明其时间 regret 具有次线性增长特性。
AI.result: 通过实验验证了该方法在时间变化的退相干信道模拟中的有效性，使用可编程广义量子隐形传态处理器进行了测试。
AI.conclusion: MEGD 方法为对抗性时间变化量子信道的模拟提供了理论保证和可行方案，展示了在线优化在量子计算中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Christine Herlihy,John P. Dickerson
title: Networked Restless Bandits with Positive Externalities
title_zh: 具有正外部性的网络不安强盗
abstract: Restless multi-armed bandits are often used to model budget-constrained resource allocation tasks where receipt of the resource is associated with an increased probability of a favorable state transition. Prior work assumes that individual arms only benefit if they receive the resource directly. However, many allocation tasks occur within communities and can be characterized by positive externalities that allow arms to derive partial benefit when their neighbor(s) receive the resource. We thus introduce networked restless bandits, a novel multi-armed bandit setting in which arms are both restless and embedded within a directed graph. We then present Greta, a graph-aware, Whittle index-based heuristic algorithm that can be used to efficiently construct a constrained reward-maximizing action vector at each timestep. Our empirical results demonstrate that Greta outperforms comparison policies across a range of hyperparameter values and graph topologies.
summary: Restless multi-armed bandits are often used to model budget-constrained resource allocation tasks where receipt of the resource is associated with an increased probability of a favorable state transition. Prior work assumes that individual arms only benefit if they receive the resource directly. However, many allocation tasks occur within communities and can be characterized by positive externalities that allow arms to derive partial benefit when their neighbor(s) receive the resource. We thus introduce networked restless bandits, a novel multi-armed bandit setting in which arms are both restless and embedded within a directed graph. We then present Greta, a graph-aware, Whittle index-based heuristic algorithm that can be used to efficiently construct a constrained reward-maximizing action vector at each timestep. Our empirical results demonstrate that Greta outperforms comparison policies across a range of hyperparameter values and graph topologies.
abstract_zh: 不安分的多臂老虎机通常用于对预算受限的资源分配任务进行建模，其中资源的接收与有利状态转换的可能性增加相关。先前的工作假设，单个武器只有直接获得资源才能受益。然而，许多分配任务发生在社区内，并且具有正外部性的特征，使得武器在其邻居获得资源时获得部分利益。因此，我们引入了网络不安分强盗，这是一种新颖的多臂强盗设置，其中手臂既不安分又嵌入有向图中。然后，我们提出 Greta，一种图形感知、基于 Whittle 索引的启发式算法，可用于在每个时间步高效构建受约束的奖励最大化动作向量。我们的实证结果表明，Greta 在一系列超参数值和图拓扑方面优于比较策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种考虑正外部性的网络化休息多臂老虎机模型，并设计了基于Whittle指数的Greta算法以解决资源分配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统休息多臂老虎机模型未考虑社区中资源分配的正外部性，而实际任务中邻居节点的资源分配可能带来间接收益，需改进模型以适应此类场景。
AI.method: 引入网络化休息多臂老虎机框架，将臂嵌入有向图中建模正外部性，并提出图感知的Whittle指数启发式算法Greta以生成最优动作向量。
AI.result: 实验表明Greta在多种超参数设置和图拓扑结构下均优于对比策略，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过建模网络化正外部性扩展了多臂老虎机框架，并证明Greta算法在复杂资源分配任务中的优越性，为社区资源优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Shivanand Venkanna Sheshappanavar,Chandra Kambhamettu
title: Local Neighborhood Features for 3D Classification
title_zh: 用于 3D 分类的局部邻域特征
abstract: With advances in deep learning model training strategies, the training of Point cloud classification methods is significantly improving. For example, PointNeXt, which adopts prominent training techniques and InvResNet layers into PointNet++, achieves over 7% improvement on the real-world ScanObjectNN dataset. However, most of these models use point coordinates features of neighborhood points mapped to higher dimensional space while ignoring the neighborhood point features computed before feeding to the network layers. In this paper, we revisit the PointNeXt model to study the usage and benefit of such neighborhood point features. We train and evaluate PointNeXt on ModelNet40 (synthetic), ScanObjectNN (real-world), and a recent large-scale, real-world grocery dataset, i.e., 3DGrocery100. In addition, we provide an additional inference strategy of weight averaging the top two checkpoints of PointNeXt to improve classification accuracy. Together with the abovementioned ideas, we gain 0.5%, 1%, 4.8%, 3.4%, and 1.6% overall accuracy on the PointNeXt model with real-world datasets, ScanObjectNN (hardest variant), 3DGrocery100's Apple10, Fruits, Vegetables, and Packages subsets, respectively. We also achieve a comparable 0.2% accuracy gain on ModelNet40.
summary: With advances in deep learning model training strategies, the training of Point cloud classification methods is significantly improving. For example, PointNeXt, which adopts prominent training techniques and InvResNet layers into PointNet++, achieves over 7% improvement on the real-world ScanObjectNN dataset. However, most of these models use point coordinates features of neighborhood points mapped to higher dimensional space while ignoring the neighborhood point features computed before feeding to the network layers. In this paper, we revisit the PointNeXt model to study the usage and benefit of such neighborhood point features. We train and evaluate PointNeXt on ModelNet40 (synthetic), ScanObjectNN (real-world), and a recent large-scale, real-world grocery dataset, i.e., 3DGrocery100. In addition, we provide an additional inference strategy of weight averaging the top two checkpoints of PointNeXt to improve classification accuracy. Together with the abovementioned ideas, we gain 0.5%, 1%, 4.8%, 3.4%, and 1.6% overall accuracy on the PointNeXt model with real-world datasets, ScanObjectNN (hardest variant), 3DGrocery100's Apple10, Fruits, Vegetables, and Packages subsets, respectively. We also achieve a comparable 0.2% accuracy gain on ModelNet40.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习模型训练策略的进步，点云分类方法的训练正在显着改善。例如，PointNeXt 在 PointNet++ 中采用了出色的训练技术和 InvResNet 层，在现实世界的 ScanObjectNN 数据集上实现了超过 7% 的改进。然而，这些模型大多数使用映射到高维空间的邻域点的点坐标特征，而忽略在馈送到网络层之前计算的邻域点特征。在本文中，我们重新审视 PointNeXt 模型来研究此类邻域点特征的用法和好处。我们在 ModelNet40（合成）、ScanObjectNN（真实世界）和最近的大型真实世界杂货数据集（即 3DGrocery100）上训练和评估 PointNeXt。此外，我们还提供了一种额外的推理策略，对 PointNeXt 的前两个检查点进行权重平均，以提高分类精度。结合上述想法，我们在使用真实数据集、ScanObjectNN（最难的变体）、3DGrocery100 的 Apple10、水果、蔬菜和包装子集的 PointNeXt 模型上分别获得了 0.5%、1%、4.8%、3.4% 和 1.6% 的总体准确率。我们还在 ModelNet40 上实现了 0.2% 的准确率增益。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过利用局部邻域特征提升3D点云分类性能，并改进PointNeXt模型的训练与推理策略。
AI.motivation: 现有3D分类模型（如PointNeXt）仅使用邻域点坐标映射特征，忽略了网络层输入前的邻域特征计算，可能影响分类效果。
AI.method: 基于PointNeXt模型，重新研究邻域特征的使用方式，在多个数据集（ModelNet40、ScanObjectNN、3DGrocery100）上训练评估，并提出对Top2检查点权重求平均的推理策略。
AI.result: 在ScanObjectNN（最难变体）、3DGrocery100的Apple10、Fruits、Vegetables、Packages子集及ModelNet40上分别提升0.5%、4.8%、3.4%、1.6%和0.2%的总体准确率。
AI.conclusion: 利用邻域特征及权重平均策略能有效提升3D分类性能，尤其在真实场景数据中效果显著。

search_text: Local Neighborhood Features for 3D Classification 用于 3D 分类的局部邻域特征 With advances in deep learning model training strategies, the training of Point cloud classification methods is significantly improving. For example, PointNeXt, which adopts prominent training techniques and InvResNet layers into PointNet++, achieves over 7% improvement on the real-world ScanObjectNN dataset. However, most of these models use point coordinates features of neighborhood points mapped to higher dimensional space while ignoring the neighborhood point features computed before feeding to the network layers. In this paper, we revisit the PointNeXt model to study the usage and benefit of such neighborhood point features. We train and evaluate PointNeXt on ModelNet40 (synthetic), ScanObjectNN (real-world), and a recent large-scale, real-world grocery dataset, i.e., 3DGrocery100. In addition, we provide an additional inference strategy of weight averaging the top two checkpoints of PointNeXt to improve classification accuracy. Together with the abovementioned ideas, we gain 0.5%, 1%, 4.8%, 3.4%, and 1.6% overall accuracy on the PointNeXt model with real-world datasets, ScanObjectNN (hardest variant), 3DGrocery100's Apple10, Fruits, Vegetables, and Packages subsets, respectively. We also achieve a comparable 0.2% accuracy gain on ModelNet40. 随着深度学习模型训练策略的进步，点云分类方法的训练正在显着改善。例如，PointNeXt 在 PointNet++ 中采用了出色的训练技术和 InvResNet 层，在现实世界的 ScanObjectNN 数据集上实现了超过 7% 的改进。然而，这些模型大多数使用映射到高维空间的邻域点的点坐标特征，而忽略在馈送到网络层之前计算的邻域点特征。在本文中，我们重新审视 PointNeXt 模型来研究此类邻域点特征的用法和好处。我们在 ModelNet40（合成）、ScanObjectNN（真实世界）和最近的大型真实世界杂货数据集（即 3DGrocery100）上训练和评估 PointNeXt。此外，我们还提供了一种额外的推理策略，对 PointNeXt 的前两个检查点进行权重平均，以提高分类精度。结合上述想法，我们在使用真实数据集、ScanObjectNN（最难的变体）、3DGrocery100 的 Apple10、水果、蔬菜和包装子集的 PointNeXt 模型上分别获得了 0.5%、1%、4.8%、3.4% 和 1.6% 的总体准确率。我们还在 ModelNet40 上实现了 0.2% 的准确率增益。 本文研究如何通过利用局部邻域特征提升3D点云分类性能，并改进PointNeXt模型的训练与推理策略。 Shivanand Venkanna Sheshappanavar,Chandra Kambhamettu cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Hyekang Kevin Joo,Khoa Vo,Kashu Yamazaki,Ngan Le
title: CLIP-TSA: CLIP-Assisted Temporal Self-Attention for Weakly-Supervised Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: CLIP-TSA：用于弱监督视频异常检测的 CLIP 辅助时间自注意力
comment: Published at the 30th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP 2023)
comments: Published at the 30th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP 2023)
abstract: Video anomaly detection (VAD) -- commonly formulated as a multiple-instance learning problem in a weakly-supervised manner due to its labor-intensive nature -- is a challenging problem in video surveillance where the frames of anomaly need to be localized in an untrimmed video. In this paper, we first propose to utilize the ViT-encoded visual features from CLIP, in contrast with the conventional C3D or I3D features in the domain, to efficiently extract discriminative representations in the novel technique. We then model temporal dependencies and nominate the snippets of interest by leveraging our proposed Temporal Self-Attention (TSA). The ablation study confirms the effectiveness of TSA and ViT feature. The extensive experiments show that our proposed CLIP-TSA outperforms the existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods by a large margin on three commonly-used benchmark datasets in the VAD problem (UCF-Crime, ShanghaiTech Campus, and XD-Violence). Our source code is available at https://github.com/joos2010kj/CLIP-TSA.
summary: Video anomaly detection (VAD) -- commonly formulated as a multiple-instance learning problem in a weakly-supervised manner due to its labor-intensive nature -- is a challenging problem in video surveillance where the frames of anomaly need to be localized in an untrimmed video. In this paper, we first propose to utilize the ViT-encoded visual features from CLIP, in contrast with the conventional C3D or I3D features in the domain, to efficiently extract discriminative representations in the novel technique. We then model temporal dependencies and nominate the snippets of interest by leveraging our proposed Temporal Self-Attention (TSA). The ablation study confirms the effectiveness of TSA and ViT feature. The extensive experiments show that our proposed CLIP-TSA outperforms the existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods by a large margin on three commonly-used benchmark datasets in the VAD problem (UCF-Crime, ShanghaiTech Campus, and XD-Violence). Our source code is available at https://github.com/joos2010kj/CLIP-TSA.
abstract_zh: 视频异常检测（VAD）——由于其劳动密集型性质，通常被表述为弱监督方式的多实例学习问题——是视频监控中的一个具有挑战性的问题，其中需要在未修剪的视频中定位异常帧。在本文中，我们首先提出利用 CLIP 中的 ViT 编码视觉特征，与该领域中的传统 C3D 或 I3D 特征相比，在新技术中有效地提取判别性表示。 We then model temporal dependencies and nominate the snippets of interest by leveraging our proposed Temporal Self-Attention (TSA). The ablation study confirms the effectiveness of TSA and ViT feature.大量实验表明，我们提出的 CLIP-TSA 在 VAD 问题的三个常用基准数据集（UCF-Crime、上海科技大学校园和 XD-Violence）上大大优于现有的最先进（SOTA）方法。 Our source code is available at https://github.com/joos2010kj/CLIP-TSA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP-TSA方法，利用CLIP的ViT编码视觉特征和时序自注意力机制，解决弱监督视频异常检测问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖C3D/I3D特征，难以高效提取判别性表征；弱监督VAD需减少对标注数据的依赖，现有方法效果有限。
AI.method: 采用CLIP预训练模型提取视觉特征，结合时序自注意力（TSA）建模时间依赖关系，通过片段筛选实现异常定位。
AI.result: 在UCF-Crime、ShanghaiTech Campus和XD-Violence三个数据集上显著优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-TSA通过融合CLIP特征与TSA机制，有效提升了弱监督视频异常检测性能，验证了跨模态特征与时序建模的协同优势。
