authors_text: Weixi Feng,Xuehai He,Tsu-Jui Fu,Varun Jampani,Arjun Akula,Pradyumna Narayana,Sugato Basu,Xin Eric Wang,William Yang Wang
title: Training-Free Structured Diffusion Guidance for Compositional Text-to-Image Synthesis
title_zh: 用于组合文本到图像合成的免训练结构化扩散指导
abstract: Large-scale diffusion models have achieved state-of-the-art results on text-to-image synthesis (T2I) tasks. Despite their ability to generate high-quality yet creative images, we observe that attribution-binding and compositional capabilities are still considered major challenging issues, especially when involving multiple objects. In this work, we improve the compositional skills of T2I models, specifically more accurate attribute binding and better image compositions. To do this, we incorporate linguistic structures with the diffusion guidance process based on the controllable properties of manipulating cross-attention layers in diffusion-based T2I models. We observe that keys and values in cross-attention layers have strong semantic meanings associated with object layouts and content. Therefore, we can better preserve the compositional semantics in the generated image by manipulating the cross-attention representations based on linguistic insights. Built upon Stable Diffusion, a SOTA T2I model, our structured cross-attention design is efficient that requires no additional training samples. We achieve better compositional skills in qualitative and quantitative results, leading to a 5-8% advantage in head-to-head user comparison studies. Lastly, we conduct an in-depth analysis to reveal potential causes of incorrect image compositions and justify the properties of cross-attention layers in the generation process.
summary: Large-scale diffusion models have achieved state-of-the-art results on text-to-image synthesis (T2I) tasks. Despite their ability to generate high-quality yet creative images, we observe that attribution-binding and compositional capabilities are still considered major challenging issues, especially when involving multiple objects. In this work, we improve the compositional skills of T2I models, specifically more accurate attribute binding and better image compositions. To do this, we incorporate linguistic structures with the diffusion guidance process based on the controllable properties of manipulating cross-attention layers in diffusion-based T2I models. We observe that keys and values in cross-attention layers have strong semantic meanings associated with object layouts and content. Therefore, we can better preserve the compositional semantics in the generated image by manipulating the cross-attention representations based on linguistic insights. Built upon Stable Diffusion, a SOTA T2I model, our structured cross-attention design is efficient that requires no additional training samples. We achieve better compositional skills in qualitative and quantitative results, leading to a 5-8% advantage in head-to-head user comparison studies. Lastly, we conduct an in-depth analysis to reveal potential causes of incorrect image compositions and justify the properties of cross-attention layers in the generation process.
abstract_zh: 大规模扩散模型在文本到图像合成（T2I）任务上取得了最先进的结果。尽管它们能够生成高质量且富有创意的图像，但我们观察到属性绑定和构图能力仍然被认为是主要的挑战性问题，特别是在涉及多个对象时。在这项工作中，我们提高了 T2I 模型的合成技巧，特别是更准确的属性绑定和更好的图像合成。 To do this, we incorporate linguistic structures with the diffusion guidance process based on the controllable properties of manipulating cross-attention layers in diffusion-based T2I models.我们观察到交叉注意力层中的键和值具有与对象布局和内容相关的强烈语义含义。因此，我们可以通过基于语言见解操纵交叉注意力表示来更好地保留生成图像中的组成语义。我们的结构化交叉注意力设计基于稳定扩散（SOTA T2I 模型），非常高效，不需要额外的训练样本。我们在定性和定量结果方面取得了更好的组合技巧，从而在头对头用户比较研究中取得了 5-8% 的优势。最后，我们进行了深入分析，以揭示图像合成不正确的潜在原因，并证明生成过程中交叉注意层的属性是合理的。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种无需训练的结构化扩散引导方法，以提升文本到图像合成中多物体的属性绑定与组合能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型扩散模型在文本到图像生成中表现优异，但其在多物体场景下的属性绑定准确性和图像组合能力仍存在显著挑战。
AI.method: 基于Stable Diffusion模型，通过结合语言结构与扩散过程中的交叉注意力机制，利用交叉注意力层中与物体布局相关的语义信息进行可控引导，无需额外训练样本。
AI.result: 在定性与定量实验中均取得更优的组合效果，在用户对比研究中实现5-8%的性能优势，并分析了错误组合的潜在原因。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言学洞察与交叉注意力机制的结合，无需训练即可有效提升扩散模型的组合生成能力，揭示了交叉注意力层在生成过程中的关键作用。

search_text: Training-Free Structured Diffusion Guidance for Compositional Text-to-Image Synthesis 用于组合文本到图像合成的免训练结构化扩散指导 Large-scale diffusion models have achieved state-of-the-art results on text-to-image synthesis (T2I) tasks. Despite their ability to generate high-quality yet creative images, we observe that attribution-binding and compositional capabilities are still considered major challenging issues, especially when involving multiple objects. In this work, we improve the compositional skills of T2I models, specifically more accurate attribute binding and better image compositions. To do this, we incorporate linguistic structures with the diffusion guidance process based on the controllable properties of manipulating cross-attention layers in diffusion-based T2I models. We observe that keys and values in cross-attention layers have strong semantic meanings associated with object layouts and content. Therefore, we can better preserve the compositional semantics in the generated image by manipulating the cross-attention representations based on linguistic insights. Built upon Stable Diffusion, a SOTA T2I model, our structured cross-attention design is efficient that requires no additional training samples. We achieve better compositional skills in qualitative and quantitative results, leading to a 5-8% advantage in head-to-head user comparison studies. Lastly, we conduct an in-depth analysis to reveal potential causes of incorrect image compositions and justify the properties of cross-attention layers in the generation process. 大规模扩散模型在文本到图像合成（T2I）任务上取得了最先进的结果。尽管它们能够生成高质量且富有创意的图像，但我们观察到属性绑定和构图能力仍然被认为是主要的挑战性问题，特别是在涉及多个对象时。在这项工作中，我们提高了 T2I 模型的合成技巧，特别是更准确的属性绑定和更好的图像合成。 To do this, we incorporate linguistic structures with the diffusion guidance process based on the controllable properties of manipulating cross-attention layers in diffusion-based T2I models.我们观察到交叉注意力层中的键和值具有与对象布局和内容相关的强烈语义含义。因此，我们可以通过基于语言见解操纵交叉注意力表示来更好地保留生成图像中的组成语义。我们的结构化交叉注意力设计基于稳定扩散（SOTA T2I 模型），非常高效，不需要额外的训练样本。我们在定性和定量结果方面取得了更好的组合技巧，从而在头对头用户比较研究中取得了 5-8% 的优势。最后，我们进行了深入分析，以揭示图像合成不正确的潜在原因，并证明生成过程中交叉注意层的属性是合理的。 该论文提出了一种无需训练的结构化扩散引导方法，以提升文本到图像合成中多物体的属性绑定与组合能力。 Weixi Feng,Xuehai He,Tsu-Jui Fu,Varun Jampani,Arjun Akula,Pradyumna Narayana,Sugato Basu,Xin Eric Wang,William Yang Wang cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Julian Suk,Pim de Haan,Phillip Lippe,Christoph Brune,Jelmer M. Wolterink
title: Mesh Neural Networks for SE(3)-Equivariant Hemodynamics Estimation on the Artery Wall
title_zh: 用于动脉壁 SE(3) 等变血流动力学估计的网状神经网络
comment: Published in "Computers in Biology and Medicine"
comments: Published in "Computers in Biology and Medicine"
abstract: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) is a valuable asset for patient-specific cardiovascular-disease diagnosis and prognosis, but its high computational demands hamper its adoption in practice. Machine-learning methods that estimate blood flow in individual patients could accelerate or replace CFD simulation to overcome these limitations. In this work, we consider the estimation of vector-valued quantities on the wall of three-dimensional geometric artery models. We employ group equivariant graph convolution in an end-to-end SE(3)-equivariant neural network that operates directly on triangular surface meshes and makes efficient use of training data. We run experiments on a large dataset of synthetic coronary arteries and find that our method estimates directional wall shear stress (WSS) with an approximation error of 7.6% and normalised mean absolute error (NMAE) of 0.4% while up to two orders of magnitude faster than CFD. Furthermore, we show that our method is powerful enough to accurately predict transient, vector-valued WSS over the cardiac cycle while conditioned on a range of different inflow boundary conditions. These results demonstrate the potential of our proposed method as a plugin replacement for CFD in the personalised prediction of hemodynamic vector and scalar fields.
summary: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) is a valuable asset for patient-specific cardiovascular-disease diagnosis and prognosis, but its high computational demands hamper its adoption in practice. Machine-learning methods that estimate blood flow in individual patients could accelerate or replace CFD simulation to overcome these limitations. In this work, we consider the estimation of vector-valued quantities on the wall of three-dimensional geometric artery models. We employ group equivariant graph convolution in an end-to-end SE(3)-equivariant neural network that operates directly on triangular surface meshes and makes efficient use of training data. We run experiments on a large dataset of synthetic coronary arteries and find that our method estimates directional wall shear stress (WSS) with an approximation error of 7.6% and normalised mean absolute error (NMAE) of 0.4% while up to two orders of magnitude faster than CFD. Furthermore, we show that our method is powerful enough to accurately predict transient, vector-valued WSS over the cardiac cycle while conditioned on a range of different inflow boundary conditions. These results demonstrate the potential of our proposed method as a plugin replacement for CFD in the personalised prediction of hemodynamic vector and scalar fields.
abstract_zh: 计算流体动力学（CFD）对于特定患者的心血管疾病诊断和预后来说是一项宝贵的资产，但其高计算要求阻碍了其在实践中的采用。估计个体患者血流量的机器学习方法可以加速或取代 CFD 模拟，以克服这些限制。在这项工作中，我们考虑了三维几何动脉模型壁上向量值的估计。我们在端到端 SE(3) 等变神经网络中采用组等变图卷积，该网络直接在三角形表面网格上运行并有效利用训练数据。我们对大型合成冠状动脉数据集进行实验，发现我们的方法估计定向壁剪切应力 (WSS) 的近似误差为 7.6%，归一化平均绝对误差 (NMAE) 为 0.4%，同时比 CFD 快两个数量级。此外，我们表明我们的方法足够强大，可以在一系列不同的流入边界条件下准确预测心动周期内的瞬态矢量值 WSS。这些结果证明了我们提出的方法作为 CFD 插件替代品在血流动力学矢量和标量场的个性化预测中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SE(3)-等变神经网络的网格方法，用于估计动脉壁上的血流动力学矢量场，以替代计算流体动力学(CFD)模拟。
AI.motivation: 计算流体动力学(CFD)在心血管疾病诊断中具有重要价值，但其高计算成本限制了实际应用，需开发高效且准确的机器学习方法替代CFD。
AI.method: 采用SE(3)-等变神经网络，结合群等变图卷积，在三角形表面网格上直接操作，高效利用训练数据估计动脉壁的矢量值血流动力学参数。
AI.result: 在合成冠状动脉数据集上，方法实现方向性壁剪切应力(WSS)估计误差7.6%和归一化平均绝对误差0.4%，速度比CFD快两个数量级，并能准确预测心脏周期内的瞬态WSS。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了作为CFD插件替代方案的潜力，可高效实现个性化血流动力学矢量和标量场预测。

authors_text: Alona Zharova,Hee-Eun Lee
title: Understanding User Perception and Intention to Use Smart Homes for Energy Efficiency: A Survey
title_zh: 了解用户使用智能家居提高能源效率的看法和意图：一项调查
abstract: Smart Home technology is increasingly seen as a solution for improving household energy efficiency. However, its energy-saving potential depends largely on how consumers use the system. To explore how user perception and intention to use Smart Home can influence energy efficiency, we develop a research model combining the theory of planned behavior (TPB) and the norm activation model (NAM), based on a comprehensive literature review. We collect data by surveying users of Smart Home systems (N = 363) and apply a partial least squares structural equation model (PLS-SEM) extended by a Random Forest algorithm to capture both linear and non-linear causal relationships. Results show that personal norms, shaped by a sense of responsibility and awareness of environmental consequences, are the strongest predictors of energy-efficient smart home use. Social norms and attitudes also significantly contribute to the intention to use these systems efficiently. Moreover, past behavior strengthens the link between personal norms and behavioral intention, highlighting the role of habit in shaping energy-related actions. To maximize the energy-saving potential of Smart Homes, system design should focus on reinforcing personal moral norms, supporting long-term engagement through habit-forming features, delivering personalized feedback on environmental and financial outcomes, and embedding green automation defaults. Implementing policy mechanisms that financially reward household energy savings presents a powerful lever for reducing emissions through improved energy efficiency in residential buildings.
summary: Smart Home technology is increasingly seen as a solution for improving household energy efficiency. However, its energy-saving potential depends largely on how consumers use the system. To explore how user perception and intention to use Smart Home can influence energy efficiency, we develop a research model combining the theory of planned behavior (TPB) and the norm activation model (NAM), based on a comprehensive literature review. We collect data by surveying users of Smart Home systems (N = 363) and apply a partial least squares structural equation model (PLS-SEM) extended by a Random Forest algorithm to capture both linear and non-linear causal relationships. Results show that personal norms, shaped by a sense of responsibility and awareness of environmental consequences, are the strongest predictors of energy-efficient smart home use. Social norms and attitudes also significantly contribute to the intention to use these systems efficiently. Moreover, past behavior strengthens the link between personal norms and behavioral intention, highlighting the role of habit in shaping energy-related actions. To maximize the energy-saving potential of Smart Homes, system design should focus on reinforcing personal moral norms, supporting long-term engagement through habit-forming features, delivering personalized feedback on environmental and financial outcomes, and embedding green automation defaults. Implementing policy mechanisms that financially reward household energy savings presents a powerful lever for reducing emissions through improved energy efficiency in residential buildings.
abstract_zh: 智能家居技术越来越被视为提高家庭能源效率的解决方案。然而，其节能潜力很大程度上取决于消费者如何使用该系统。为了探索用户使用智能家居的感知和意图如何影响能源效率，我们在综合文献综述的基础上，开发了一个结合计划行为理论（TPB）和规范激活模型（NAM）的研究模型。我们通过调查智能家居系统用户 (N = 363) 来收集数据，并应用由随机森林算法扩展的偏最小二乘结构方程模型 (PLS-SEM) 来捕获线性和非线性因果关系。结果表明，由责任感和环境后果意识塑造的个人规范是节能智能家居使用的最强预测因素。社会规范和态度也对有效使用这些系统的意图做出了重大贡献。此外，过去的行为加强了个人规范和行为意图之间的联系，凸显了习惯在塑造与能源相关的行为中的作用。为了最大限度地发挥智能家居的节能潜力，系统设计应侧重于加强个人道德规范，通过习惯形成功能支持长期参与，提供有关环境和财务结果的个性化反馈，并嵌入绿色自动化默认设置。实施对家庭节能进行经济奖励的政策机制，可以通过提高住宅建筑的能源效率来减少排放。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查研究用户对智能家居的感知和使用意图，探讨其对能源效率的影响。
AI.motivation: 智能家居的节能潜力取决于用户使用方式，需明确用户心理因素如何影响其节能行为。
AI.method: 结合计划行为理论（TPB）和规范激活模型（NAM），通过363份用户调查数据，采用PLS-SEM结合随机森林算法分析线性和非线性关系。
AI.result: 个人规范（责任感与环境意识）是节能使用的核心预测因素，社会规范、态度及过往行为也显著影响使用意图。
AI.conclusion: 系统设计应强化道德规范、培养习惯性行为，并提供个性化反馈；政策上需通过经济激励提升住宅能效。

conclusion: 系统设计应强化道德规范、培养习惯性行为，并提供个性化反馈；政策上需通过经济激励提升住宅能效。
search_text: Understanding User Perception and Intention to Use Smart Homes for Energy Efficiency: A Survey 了解用户使用智能家居提高能源效率的看法和意图：一项调查 Smart Home technology is increasingly seen as a solution for improving household energy efficiency. However, its energy-saving potential depends largely on how consumers use the system. To explore how user perception and intention to use Smart Home can influence energy efficiency, we develop a research model combining the theory of planned behavior (TPB) and the norm activation model (NAM), based on a comprehensive literature review. We collect data by surveying users of Smart Home systems (N = 363) and apply a partial least squares structural equation model (PLS-SEM) extended by a Random Forest algorithm to capture both linear and non-linear causal relationships. Results show that personal norms, shaped by a sense of responsibility and awareness of environmental consequences, are the strongest predictors of energy-efficient smart home use. Social norms and attitudes also significantly contribute to the intention to use these systems efficiently. Moreover, past behavior strengthens the link between personal norms and behavioral intention, highlighting the role of habit in shaping energy-related actions. To maximize the energy-saving potential of Smart Homes, system design should focus on reinforcing personal moral norms, supporting long-term engagement through habit-forming features, delivering personalized feedback on environmental and financial outcomes, and embedding green automation defaults. Implementing policy mechanisms that financially reward household energy savings presents a powerful lever for reducing emissions through improved energy efficiency in residential buildings. 智能家居技术越来越被视为提高家庭能源效率的解决方案。然而，其节能潜力很大程度上取决于消费者如何使用该系统。为了探索用户使用智能家居的感知和意图如何影响能源效率，我们在综合文献综述的基础上，开发了一个结合计划行为理论（TPB）和规范激活模型（NAM）的研究模型。我们通过调查智能家居系统用户 (N = 363) 来收集数据，并应用由随机森林算法扩展的偏最小二乘结构方程模型 (PLS-SEM) 来捕获线性和非线性因果关系。结果表明，由责任感和环境后果意识塑造的个人规范是节能智能家居使用的最强预测因素。社会规范和态度也对有效使用这些系统的意图做出了重大贡献。此外，过去的行为加强了个人规范和行为意图之间的联系，凸显了习惯在塑造与能源相关的行为中的作用。为了最大限度地发挥智能家居的节能潜力，系统设计应侧重于加强个人道德规范，通过习惯形成功能支持长期参与，提供有关环境和财务结果的个性化反馈，并嵌入绿色自动化默认设置。实施对家庭节能进行经济奖励的政策机制，可以通过提高住宅建筑的能源效率来减少排放。 本文通过调查研究用户对智能家居的感知和使用意图，探讨其对能源效率的影响。 Alona Zharova,Hee-Eun Lee cs.HC

authors_text: Samuel B. Hopkins,Gautam Kamath,Mahbod Majid,Shyam Narayanan
title: Robustness Implies Privacy in Statistical Estimation
title_zh: 稳健性意味着统计估计中的隐私
abstract: We study the relationship between adversarial robustness and differential privacy in high-dimensional algorithmic statistics. We give the first black-box reduction from privacy to robustness which can produce private estimators with optimal tradeoffs among sample complexity, accuracy, and privacy for a wide range of fundamental high-dimensional parameter estimation problems, including mean and covariance estimation. We show that this reduction can be implemented in polynomial time in some important special cases. In particular, using nearly-optimal polynomial-time robust estimators for the mean and covariance of high-dimensional Gaussians which are based on the Sum-of-Squares method, we design the first polynomial-time private estimators for these problems with nearly-optimal samples-accuracy-privacy tradeoffs. Our algorithms are also robust to a nearly optimal fraction of adversarially-corrupted samples.
summary: We study the relationship between adversarial robustness and differential privacy in high-dimensional algorithmic statistics. We give the first black-box reduction from privacy to robustness which can produce private estimators with optimal tradeoffs among sample complexity, accuracy, and privacy for a wide range of fundamental high-dimensional parameter estimation problems, including mean and covariance estimation. We show that this reduction can be implemented in polynomial time in some important special cases. In particular, using nearly-optimal polynomial-time robust estimators for the mean and covariance of high-dimensional Gaussians which are based on the Sum-of-Squares method, we design the first polynomial-time private estimators for these problems with nearly-optimal samples-accuracy-privacy tradeoffs. Our algorithms are also robust to a nearly optimal fraction of adversarially-corrupted samples.
abstract_zh: 我们研究高维算法统计中对抗鲁棒性和差分隐私之间的关系。我们给出了第一个从隐私到鲁棒性的黑盒简化，这可以产生私有估计器，在样本复杂性、准确性和隐私性之间进行最佳权衡，以解决各种基本的高维参数估计问题，包括均值和协方差估计。我们证明，在一些重要的特殊情况下，这种减少可以在多项式时间内实现。特别是，使用基于平方和方法的高维高斯均值和协方差的近最优多项式时间鲁棒估计器，我们为这些问题设计了第一个多项式时间私有估计器，并具有近乎最优的样本-准确性-隐私权衡。我们的算法对于大部分被对抗性破坏的样本也具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究高维统计估计中对抗鲁棒性与差分隐私的关系，通过黑盒归约方法将隐私问题转化为鲁棒性问题，设计出具有最优权衡的私有估计器。
AI.motivation: 现有高维统计估计方法在样本复杂度、精度和隐私保护之间缺乏有效权衡，需建立鲁棒性与隐私的直接联系以实现高效安全的算法。
AI.method: 提出隐私到鲁棒性的黑盒归约框架，结合基于Sum-of-Squares方法的高维鲁棒估计器，设计多项式时间私有估计算法。
AI.result: 首次实现高维均值和协方差估计的多项式时间私有估计算法，达到近似最优的样本-精度-隐私权衡，且对近似最优比例的对抗样本鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒性蕴含隐私的理论框架为高维统计问题提供了新思路，推动了隐私保护与算法鲁棒性协同优化的发展。

authors_text: Ian Huang,Panos Achlioptas,Tianyi Zhang,Sergey Tulyakov,Minhyuk Sung,Leonidas Guibas
title: LADIS: Language Disentanglement for 3D Shape Editing
title_zh: LADIS：3D 形状编辑的语言解缠
abstract: Natural language interaction is a promising direction for democratizing 3D shape design. However, existing methods for text-driven 3D shape editing face challenges in producing decoupled, local edits to 3D shapes. We address this problem by learning disentangled latent representations that ground language in 3D geometry. To this end, we propose a complementary tool set including a novel network architecture, a disentanglement loss, and a new editing procedure. Additionally, to measure edit locality, we define a new metric that we call part-wise edit precision. We show that our method outperforms existing SOTA methods by 20% in terms of edit locality, and up to 6.6% in terms of language reference resolution accuracy. Our work suggests that by solely disentangling language representations, downstream 3D shape editing can become more local to relevant parts, even if the model was never given explicit part-based supervision.
summary: Natural language interaction is a promising direction for democratizing 3D shape design. However, existing methods for text-driven 3D shape editing face challenges in producing decoupled, local edits to 3D shapes. We address this problem by learning disentangled latent representations that ground language in 3D geometry. To this end, we propose a complementary tool set including a novel network architecture, a disentanglement loss, and a new editing procedure. Additionally, to measure edit locality, we define a new metric that we call part-wise edit precision. We show that our method outperforms existing SOTA methods by 20% in terms of edit locality, and up to 6.6% in terms of language reference resolution accuracy. Our work suggests that by solely disentangling language representations, downstream 3D shape editing can become more local to relevant parts, even if the model was never given explicit part-based supervision.
abstract_zh: 自然语言交互是 3D 形状设计民主化的一个有前途的方向。然而，文本驱动的 3D 形状编辑的现有方法在对 3D 形状进行解耦的本地编辑方面面临着挑战。我们通过学习 3D 几何中基础语言的解缠结潜在表示来解决这个问题。为此，我们提出了一个补充工具集，包括新颖的网络架构、解缠结损失和新的编辑程序。此外，为了衡量编辑局部性，我们定义了一个新的指标，称为部分编辑精度。我们表明，我们的方法在编辑局部性方面比现有的 SOTA 方法高出 20%，在语言参考解析精度方面比现有 SOTA 方法高出 6.6%。我们的工作表明，通过仅解开语言表示，下游 3D 形状编辑可以变得更加本地化到相关部分，即使模型从未得到明确的基于部分的监督。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LADIS方法，通过语言解耦实现更精准的3D形状局部编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有文本驱动的3D编辑方法难以实现局部精细化修改，且缺乏对语言与几何关系的有效建模。
AI.method: 设计新型网络架构与解耦损失函数，结合部分编辑精度指标，实现语言表征与3D几何的解耦表示学习。
AI.result: 在编辑局部性指标上超越SOTA方法20%，语言参考解析准确率提升最高6.6%。
AI.conclusion: 语言表征解耦可使3D编辑更聚焦相关部件，无需显式部件监督即可实现局部修改。

authors_text: Gunduz Vehbi Demirci,Aparajita Haldar,Hakan Ferhatosmanoglu
title: Scalable Graph Convolutional Network Training on Distributed-Memory Systems
title_zh: 分布式内存系统上的可扩展图卷积网络训练
abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) are extensively utilized for deep learning on graphs. The large data sizes of graphs and their vertex features make scalable training algorithms and distributed memory systems necessary. Since the convolution operation on graphs induces irregular memory access patterns, designing a memory- and communication-efficient parallel algorithm for GCN training poses unique challenges. We propose a highly parallel training algorithm that scales to large processor counts. In our solution, the large adjacency and vertex-feature matrices are partitioned among processors. We exploit the vertex-partitioning of the graph to use non-blocking point-to-point communication operations between processors for better scalability. To further minimize the parallelization overheads, we introduce a sparse matrix partitioning scheme based on a hypergraph partitioning model for full-batch training. We also propose a novel stochastic hypergraph model to encode the expected communication volume in mini-batch training. We show the merits of the hypergraph model, previously unexplored for GCN training, over the standard graph partitioning model which does not accurately encode the communication costs. Experiments performed on real-world graph datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithms achieve considerable speedups over alternative solutions. The optimizations achieved on communication costs become even more pronounced at high scalability with many processors. The performance benefits are preserved in deeper GCNs having more layers as well as on billion-scale graphs.
summary: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) are extensively utilized for deep learning on graphs. The large data sizes of graphs and their vertex features make scalable training algorithms and distributed memory systems necessary. Since the convolution operation on graphs induces irregular memory access patterns, designing a memory- and communication-efficient parallel algorithm for GCN training poses unique challenges. We propose a highly parallel training algorithm that scales to large processor counts. In our solution, the large adjacency and vertex-feature matrices are partitioned among processors. We exploit the vertex-partitioning of the graph to use non-blocking point-to-point communication operations between processors for better scalability. To further minimize the parallelization overheads, we introduce a sparse matrix partitioning scheme based on a hypergraph partitioning model for full-batch training. We also propose a novel stochastic hypergraph model to encode the expected communication volume in mini-batch training. We show the merits of the hypergraph model, previously unexplored for GCN training, over the standard graph partitioning model which does not accurately encode the communication costs. Experiments performed on real-world graph datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithms achieve considerable speedups over alternative solutions. The optimizations achieved on communication costs become even more pronounced at high scalability with many processors. The performance benefits are preserved in deeper GCNs having more layers as well as on billion-scale graphs.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）广泛用于图的深度学习。图的大数据量及其顶点特征使得可扩展的训练算法和分布式存储系统成为必要。由于图上的卷积运算会导致不规则的内存访问模式，因此为 GCN 训练设计内存和通信高效的并行算法提出了独特的挑战。我们提出了一种高度并行的训练算法，可以扩展到大量处理器。在我们的解决方案中，大型邻接矩阵和顶点特征矩阵在处理器之间进行划分。我们利用图的顶点分区来使用处理器之间的非阻塞点对点通信操作，以获得更好的可扩展性。为了进一步最小化并行化开销，我们引入了一种基于超图分区模型的稀疏矩阵分区方案，用于全批量训练。我们还提出了一种新颖的随机超图模型来编码小批量训练中的预期通信量。我们展示了超图模型相对于不能准确编码通信成本的标准图划分模型的优点，此前该模型尚未在 GCN 训练中进行过探索。在现实世界的图数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的算法比替代解决方案实现了相当大的加速。在具有许多处理器的高可扩展性下，对通信成本的优化变得更加明显。性能优势保留在具有更多层的更深 GCN 以及十亿级图上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在分布式内存系统上高效训练图卷积网络（GCN）的算法，以应对大规模图数据带来的计算和通信挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着图数据规模的扩大，传统GCN训练方法在分布式系统中面临内存访问不规则、通信开销大等问题，亟需优化算法以提升可扩展性。
AI.method: 采用顶点划分策略结合非阻塞点对点通信，设计基于超图划分模型的稀疏矩阵分区方案，并引入随机超图模型以优化微型批次训练的通信量。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在真实图数据集上显著优于现有方案，处理器数量越多、图规模越大时通信优化效果越明显，且对深层GCN同样有效。
AI.conclusion: 通过超图模型创新性地编码通信成本，提出的算法有效降低了分布式GCN训练的通信开销，为大规模图深度学习提供了可扩展解决方案。

search_text: Scalable Graph Convolutional Network Training on Distributed-Memory Systems 分布式内存系统上的可扩展图卷积网络训练 Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) are extensively utilized for deep learning on graphs. The large data sizes of graphs and their vertex features make scalable training algorithms and distributed memory systems necessary. Since the convolution operation on graphs induces irregular memory access patterns, designing a memory- and communication-efficient parallel algorithm for GCN training poses unique challenges. We propose a highly parallel training algorithm that scales to large processor counts. In our solution, the large adjacency and vertex-feature matrices are partitioned among processors. We exploit the vertex-partitioning of the graph to use non-blocking point-to-point communication operations between processors for better scalability. To further minimize the parallelization overheads, we introduce a sparse matrix partitioning scheme based on a hypergraph partitioning model for full-batch training. We also propose a novel stochastic hypergraph model to encode the expected communication volume in mini-batch training. We show the merits of the hypergraph model, previously unexplored for GCN training, over the standard graph partitioning model which does not accurately encode the communication costs. Experiments performed on real-world graph datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithms achieve considerable speedups over alternative solutions. The optimizations achieved on communication costs become even more pronounced at high scalability with many processors. The performance benefits are preserved in deeper GCNs having more layers as well as on billion-scale graphs. 图卷积网络（GCN）广泛用于图的深度学习。图的大数据量及其顶点特征使得可扩展的训练算法和分布式存储系统成为必要。由于图上的卷积运算会导致不规则的内存访问模式，因此为 GCN 训练设计内存和通信高效的并行算法提出了独特的挑战。我们提出了一种高度并行的训练算法，可以扩展到大量处理器。在我们的解决方案中，大型邻接矩阵和顶点特征矩阵在处理器之间进行划分。我们利用图的顶点分区来使用处理器之间的非阻塞点对点通信操作，以获得更好的可扩展性。为了进一步最小化并行化开销，我们引入了一种基于超图分区模型的稀疏矩阵分区方案，用于全批量训练。我们还提出了一种新颖的随机超图模型来编码小批量训练中的预期通信量。我们展示了超图模型相对于不能准确编码通信成本的标准图划分模型的优点，此前该模型尚未在 GCN 训练中进行过探索。在现实世界的图数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的算法比替代解决方案实现了相当大的加速。在具有许多处理器的高可扩展性下，对通信成本的优化变得更加明显。性能优势保留在具有更多层的更深 GCN 以及十亿级图上。 本文提出了一种在分布式内存系统上高效训练图卷积网络（GCN）的算法，以应对大规模图数据带来的计算和通信挑战。 Gunduz Vehbi Demirci,Aparajita Haldar,Hakan Ferhatosmanoglu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Darius Petermann,Gordon Wichern,Aswin Subramanian,Jonathan Le Roux
title: Hyperbolic Audio Source Separation
title_zh: 双曲线音频源分离
abstract: We introduce a framework for audio source separation using embeddings on a hyperbolic manifold that compactly represent the hierarchical relationship between sound sources and time-frequency features. Inspired by recent successes modeling hierarchical relationships in text and images with hyperbolic embeddings, our algorithm obtains a hyperbolic embedding for each time-frequency bin of a mixture signal and estimates masks using hyperbolic softmax layers. On a synthetic dataset containing mixtures of multiple people talking and musical instruments playing, our hyperbolic model performed comparably to a Euclidean baseline in terms of source to distortion ratio, with stronger performance at low embedding dimensions. Furthermore, we find that time-frequency regions containing multiple overlapping sources are embedded towards the center (i.e., the most uncertain region) of the hyperbolic space, and we can use this certainty estimate to efficiently trade-off between artifact introduction and interference reduction when isolating individual sounds.
summary: We introduce a framework for audio source separation using embeddings on a hyperbolic manifold that compactly represent the hierarchical relationship between sound sources and time-frequency features. Inspired by recent successes modeling hierarchical relationships in text and images with hyperbolic embeddings, our algorithm obtains a hyperbolic embedding for each time-frequency bin of a mixture signal and estimates masks using hyperbolic softmax layers. On a synthetic dataset containing mixtures of multiple people talking and musical instruments playing, our hyperbolic model performed comparably to a Euclidean baseline in terms of source to distortion ratio, with stronger performance at low embedding dimensions. Furthermore, we find that time-frequency regions containing multiple overlapping sources are embedded towards the center (i.e., the most uncertain region) of the hyperbolic space, and we can use this certainty estimate to efficiently trade-off between artifact introduction and interference reduction when isolating individual sounds.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种使用双曲流形上的嵌入来进行音频源分离的框架，该框架紧凑地表示了声源和时频特征之间的层次关系。受到最近使用双曲嵌入对文本和图像中的层次关系进行建模的成功的启发，我们的算法为混合信号的每个时频仓获得双曲嵌入，并使用双曲 softmax 层估计掩模。在包含多人说话和乐器演奏的混合数据集上，我们的双曲模型在源失真比方面的表现与欧几里得基线相当，并且在低嵌入维度下具有更强的性能。此外，我们发现包含多个重叠源的时频区域嵌入到双曲空间的中心（即最不确定的区域），并且我们可以使用这种确定性估计来有效地在隔离单个声音时在伪影引入和干扰减少之间进行权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双曲流形嵌入的音频源分离框架，通过捕捉声音源与时频特征的层次关系实现更高效的分离。
AI.motivation: 受双曲嵌入在文本和图像领域成功建模层次关系的启发，传统欧几里得空间难以有效表示音频中复杂的层次结构，需探索新方法提升分离效果。
AI.method: 为混合信号的每个时频单元生成双曲嵌入，利用双曲softmax层估计分离掩码，并通过置信度估计优化重叠源区域的分离权衡。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上，双曲模型在源到失真比指标上与欧几里得基线相当，低维嵌入时表现更优，且能通过置信度估计减少伪影与干扰。
AI.conclusion: 双曲嵌入能有效捕捉音频源的层次关系，尤其在低维场景下表现突出，为音频源分离提供了新思路与实用工具。

authors_text: Anni Tang,Tianyu He,Xu Tan,Jun Ling,Li Song
title: Memories are One-to-Many Mapping Alleviators in Talking Face Generation
title_zh: 记忆是说话人脸生成中的一对多映射缓解器
comment: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (2024). Project page: see https://memoryface.github.io
comments: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (2024). Project page: see https://memoryface.github.io
abstract: Talking face generation aims at generating photo-realistic video portraits of a target person driven by input audio. Due to its nature of one-to-many mapping from the input audio to the output video (e.g., one speech content may have multiple feasible visual appearances), learning a deterministic mapping like previous works brings ambiguity during training, and thus causes inferior visual results. Although this one-to-many mapping could be alleviated in part by a two-stage framework (i.e., an audio-to-expression model followed by a neural-rendering model), it is still insufficient since the prediction is produced without enough information (e.g., emotions, wrinkles, etc.). In this paper, we propose MemFace to complement the missing information with an implicit memory and an explicit memory that follow the sense of the two stages respectively. More specifically, the implicit memory is employed in the audio-to-expression model to capture high-level semantics in the audio-expression shared space, while the explicit memory is employed in the neural-rendering model to help synthesize pixel-level details. Our experimental results show that our proposed MemFace surpasses all the state-of-the-art results across multiple scenarios consistently and significantly.
summary: Talking face generation aims at generating photo-realistic video portraits of a target person driven by input audio. Due to its nature of one-to-many mapping from the input audio to the output video (e.g., one speech content may have multiple feasible visual appearances), learning a deterministic mapping like previous works brings ambiguity during training, and thus causes inferior visual results. Although this one-to-many mapping could be alleviated in part by a two-stage framework (i.e., an audio-to-expression model followed by a neural-rendering model), it is still insufficient since the prediction is produced without enough information (e.g., emotions, wrinkles, etc.). In this paper, we propose MemFace to complement the missing information with an implicit memory and an explicit memory that follow the sense of the two stages respectively. More specifically, the implicit memory is employed in the audio-to-expression model to capture high-level semantics in the audio-expression shared space, while the explicit memory is employed in the neural-rendering model to help synthesize pixel-level details. Our experimental results show that our proposed MemFace surpasses all the state-of-the-art results across multiple scenarios consistently and significantly.
abstract_zh: 会说话的脸部生成旨在生成由输入音频驱动的目标人物的逼真视频肖像。由于其从输入音频到输出视频的一对多映射的性质（例如，一个语音内容可能有多个可行的视觉外观），像以前的工作一样学习确定性映射会在训练过程中带来歧义，从而导致较差的视觉结果。尽管这种一对多映射可以通过两阶段框架（即音频到表达模型后跟神经渲染模型）部分缓解，但它仍然不够，因为预测是在没有足够信息（例如情绪、皱纹等）的情况下生成的。在本文中，我们提出MemFace，用分别遵循两个阶段意义的内隐记忆和外显记忆来补充缺失的信息。更具体地说，在音频到表达模型中采用隐式记忆来捕获音频表达共享空间中的高级语义，而在神经渲染模型中采用显式记忆来帮助合成像素级细节。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的 MemFace 在多个场景中一致且显着地超越了所有最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemFace方法，通过引入隐式和显式记忆机制解决说话人脸生成中的一对多映射问题，提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 传统确定性映射在说话人脸生成中因音频到视频的一对多映射特性导致模糊性，现有两阶段框架因缺乏情绪、皱纹等细节信息而效果不足。
AI.method: 设计MemFace框架，包含音频到表情模型中的隐式记忆（捕捉高层语义）和神经渲染模型中的显式记忆（合成像素级细节）。
AI.result: 在多场景实验中，MemFace显著超越现有最先进方法，生成质量更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过隐式与显式记忆的协同作用，MemFace有效缓解了一对多映射的歧义性，推动了高质量说话人脸生成的发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MemFace方法，通过引入隐式和显式记忆机制解决说话人脸生成中的一对多映射问题，提升生成效果。
ai_content.motivation: 传统确定性映射在说话人脸生成中因音频到视频的一对多映射特性导致模糊性，现有两阶段框架因缺乏情绪、皱纹等细节信息而效果不足。
ai_content.method: 设计MemFace框架，包含音频到表情模型中的隐式记忆（捕捉高层语义）和神经渲染模型中的显式记忆（合成像素级细节）。
ai_content.result: 在多场景实验中，MemFace显著超越现有最先进方法，生成质量更优。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过隐式与显式记忆的协同作用，MemFace有效缓解了一对多映射的歧义性，推动了高质量说话人脸生成的发展。

search_text: Memories are One-to-Many Mapping Alleviators in Talking Face Generation 记忆是说话人脸生成中的一对多映射缓解器 Talking face generation aims at generating photo-realistic video portraits of a target person driven by input audio. Due to its nature of one-to-many mapping from the input audio to the output video (e.g., one speech content may have multiple feasible visual appearances), learning a deterministic mapping like previous works brings ambiguity during training, and thus causes inferior visual results. Although this one-to-many mapping could be alleviated in part by a two-stage framework (i.e., an audio-to-expression model followed by a neural-rendering model), it is still insufficient since the prediction is produced without enough information (e.g., emotions, wrinkles, etc.). In this paper, we propose MemFace to complement the missing information with an implicit memory and an explicit memory that follow the sense of the two stages respectively. More specifically, the implicit memory is employed in the audio-to-expression model to capture high-level semantics in the audio-expression shared space, while the explicit memory is employed in the neural-rendering model to help synthesize pixel-level details. Our experimental results show that our proposed MemFace surpasses all the state-of-the-art results across multiple scenarios consistently and significantly. 会说话的脸部生成旨在生成由输入音频驱动的目标人物的逼真视频肖像。由于其从输入音频到输出视频的一对多映射的性质（例如，一个语音内容可能有多个可行的视觉外观），像以前的工作一样学习确定性映射会在训练过程中带来歧义，从而导致较差的视觉结果。尽管这种一对多映射可以通过两阶段框架（即音频到表达模型后跟神经渲染模型）部分缓解，但它仍然不够，因为预测是在没有足够信息（例如情绪、皱纹等）的情况下生成的。在本文中，我们提出MemFace，用分别遵循两个阶段意义的内隐记忆和外显记忆来补充缺失的信息。更具体地说，在音频到表达模型中采用隐式记忆来捕获音频表达共享空间中的高级语义，而在神经渲染模型中采用显式记忆来帮助合成像素级细节。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的 MemFace 在多个场景中一致且显着地超越了所有最先进的结果。 本文提出MemFace方法，通过引入隐式和显式记忆机制解决说话人脸生成中的一对多映射问题，提升生成效果。 Anni Tang,Tianyu He,Xu Tan,Jun Ling,Li Song cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Philipp Hacker,Johann Cordes,Janina Rochon
title: Regulating Gatekeeper AI and Data: Transparency, Access, and Fairness under the DMA, the GDPR, and beyond
title_zh: 监管网守人工智能和数据：DMA、GDPR 及其他规定下的透明度、访问和公平性
abstract: Artificial intelligence is not only increasingly used in business and administration contexts, but a race for its regulation is also underway, with the EU spearheading the efforts. Contrary to existing literature, this article suggests, however, that the most far-reaching and effective EU rules for AI applications in the digital economy will not be contained in the proposed AI Act - but have just been enacted in the Digital Markets Act. We analyze the impact of the DMA and related EU acts on AI models and their underlying data across four key areas: disclosure requirements; the regulation of AI training data; access rules; and the regime for fair rankings. The paper demonstrates that fairness, in the sense of the DMA, goes beyond traditionally protected categories of non-discrimination law on which scholarship at the intersection of AI and law has so far largely focused on. Rather, we draw on competition law and the FRAND criteria known from intellectual property law to interpret and refine the DMA provisions on fair rankings. Moreover, we show how, based on CJEU jurisprudence, a coherent interpretation of the concept of non-discrimination in both traditional non-discrimination and competition law may be found. The final part sketches specific proposals for a comprehensive framework of transparency, access, and fairness under the DMA and beyond.

Moreover, we show how, based on CJEU jurisprudence, a coherent interpretation of the concept of non-discrimination in both traditional non-discrimination and competition law may be found. The final part sketches specific proposals for a comprehensive framework of transparency, access, and fairness under the DMA and beyond.

We analyze the impact of the DMA and related EU acts on AI models and their underlying data across four key areas: disclosure requirements;人工智能训练数据的监管； access rules;以及公平排名制度。 The paper demonstrates that fairness, in the sense of the DMA, goes beyond traditionally protected categories of non-discrimination law on which scholarship at the intersection of AI and law has so far largely focused on. AI.tldr: 本文分析欧盟《数字市场法》（DMA）及相关法规对人工智能模型及其数据在透明度、访问权限和公平性方面的监管影响。
AI.motivation: 现有文献多关注AI法案，但本文认为DMA在数字经济中对AI的监管更具实效性，需重新审视DMA对AI的监管框架。
AI.method: 通过法律分析方法，结合竞争法、FRAND原则及欧盟法院判例，探讨DMA在数据披露、训练数据监管、访问规则及公平排名等领域的适用性。
AI.result: 发现DMA的公平性要求超越传统反歧视范畴，需融合竞争法与知识产权法标准，并提出整合透明度、访问权与公平性的综合框架。
AI.conclusion: DMA为AI监管提供了多维框架，未来需在传统反歧视法外，结合竞争法与知识产权规则构建更全面的AI治理模式。

authors_text: Jishnu Mukhoti,Tsung-Yu Lin,Omid Poursaeed,Rui Wang,Ashish Shah,Philip H. S. Torr,Ser-Nam Lim
title: Open Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation with Patch Aligned Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 具有补丁对齐对比学习的开放词汇语义分割
abstract: We introduce Patch Aligned Contrastive Learning (PACL), a modified compatibility function for CLIP's contrastive loss, intending to train an alignment between the patch tokens of the vision encoder and the CLS token of the text encoder. With such an alignment, a model can identify regions of an image corresponding to a given text input, and therefore transfer seamlessly to the task of open vocabulary semantic segmentation without requiring any segmentation annotations during training. Using pre-trained CLIP encoders with PACL, we are able to set the state-of-the-art on the task of open vocabulary zero-shot segmentation on 4 different segmentation benchmarks: Pascal VOC, Pascal Context, COCO Stuff and ADE20K. Furthermore, we show that PACL is also applicable to image-level predictions and when used with a CLIP backbone, provides a general improvement in zero-shot classification accuracy compared to CLIP, across a suite of 12 image classification datasets.
summary: We introduce Patch Aligned Contrastive Learning (PACL), a modified compatibility function for CLIP's contrastive loss, intending to train an alignment between the patch tokens of the vision encoder and the CLS token of the text encoder. With such an alignment, a model can identify regions of an image corresponding to a given text input, and therefore transfer seamlessly to the task of open vocabulary semantic segmentation without requiring any segmentation annotations during training. Using pre-trained CLIP encoders with PACL, we are able to set the state-of-the-art on the task of open vocabulary zero-shot segmentation on 4 different segmentation benchmarks: Pascal VOC, Pascal Context, COCO Stuff and ADE20K. Furthermore, we show that PACL is also applicable to image-level predictions and when used with a CLIP backbone, provides a general improvement in zero-shot classification accuracy compared to CLIP, across a suite of 12 image classification datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了补丁对齐对比学习（PACL），这是一种针对 CLIP 对比损失的改进兼容性函数，旨在训练视觉编码器的补丁标记和文本编码器的 CLS 标记之间的对齐。通过这种对齐，模型可以识别与给定文本输入相对应的图像区域，因此无缝地转移到开放词汇语义分割的任务，而无需在训练期间进行任何分割注释。使用带有 PACL 的预训练 CLIP 编码器，我们能够在 4 个不同的分割基准上设置最先进的开放词汇零样本分割任务：Pascal VOC、Pascal Context、COCO Stuff 和 A​​DE20K。此外，我们表明 PACL 还适用于图像级预测，并且与 CLIP 主干网络一起使用时，与 CLIP 相比，在一组 12 个图像分类数据集上提供了零样本分类精度的总体改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于补丁对齐对比学习（PACL）的方法，用于实现无需分割标注的开放词汇语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统开放词汇分割方法依赖分割标注，而本文旨在通过利用预训练模型（如CLIP）的跨模态对齐能力，实现零样本分割任务，减少对人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 修改CLIP的对比损失函数，设计补丁对齐对比学习（PACL），使视觉编码器的补丁标记与文本编码器的CLS标记对齐，从而实现图像区域与文本描述的关联。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC、Pascal Context、COCO Stuff和ADE20K四个基准测试中达到开放词汇零样本分割的最先进水平，并在12个图像分类数据集上提升了零样本分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: PACL方法有效实现了无需分割标注的开放词汇分割，并证明了其在跨模态对齐任务中的通用性与优越性。

Furthermore, we show that PACL is also applicable to image-level predictions and when used with a CLIP backbone, provides a general improvement in zero-shot classification accuracy compared to CLIP, across a suite of 12 image classification datasets. 我们引入了补丁对齐对比学习（PACL），这是一种针对 CLIP 对比损失的改进兼容性函数，旨在训练视觉编码器的补丁标记和文本编码器的 CLS 标记之间的对齐。通过这种对齐，模型可以识别与给定文本输入相对应的图像区域，因此无缝地转移到开放词汇语义分割的任务，而无需在训练期间进行任何分割注释。使用带有 PACL 的预训练 CLIP 编码器，我们能够在 4 个不同的分割基准上设置最先进的开放词汇零样本分割任务：Pascal VOC、Pascal Context、COCO Stuff 和 A​​DE20K。此外，我们表明 PACL 还适用于图像级预测，并且与 CLIP 主干网络一起使用时，与 CLIP 相比，在一组 12 个图像分类数据集上提供了零样本分类精度的总体改进。 本文提出了一种基于补丁对齐对比学习（PACL）的方法，用于实现无需分割标注的开放词汇语义分割任务。 Jishnu Mukhoti,Tsung-Yu Lin,Omid Poursaeed,Rui Wang,Ashish Shah,Philip H. S. Torr,Ser-Nam Lim cs.CV

authors_text: Pedro F Da Costa,Jessica Dafflon,Sergio Leonardo Mendes,João Ricardo Sato,M. Jorge Cardoso,Robert Leech,Emily JH Jones,Walter H. L. Pinaya
title: Transformer-based normative modelling for anomaly detection of early schizophrenia
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的规范模型用于早期精神分裂症的异常检测
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, presented at NeurIPS22@PAI4MH
comments: 10 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, presented at NeurIPS22@PAI4MH
abstract: Despite the impact of psychiatric disorders on clinical health, early-stage diagnosis remains a challenge. Machine learning studies have shown that classifiers tend to be overly narrow in the diagnosis prediction task. The overlap between conditions leads to high heterogeneity among participants that is not adequately captured by classification models. To address this issue, normative approaches have surged as an alternative method. By using a generative model to learn the distribution of healthy brain data patterns, we can identify the presence of pathologies as deviations or outliers from the distribution learned by the model. In particular, deep generative models showed great results as normative models to identify neurological lesions in the brain. However, unlike most neurological lesions, psychiatric disorders present subtle changes widespread in several brain regions, making these alterations challenging to identify. In this work, we evaluate the performance of transformer-based normative models to detect subtle brain changes expressed in adolescents and young adults. We trained our model on 3D MRI scans of neurotypical individuals (N=1,765). Then, we obtained the likelihood of neurotypical controls and psychiatric patients with early-stage schizophrenia from an independent dataset (N=93) from the Human Connectome Project. Using the predicted likelihood of the scans as a proxy for a normative score, we obtained an AUROC of 0.82 when assessing the difference between controls and individuals with early-stage schizophrenia. Our approach surpassed recent normative methods based on brain age and Gaussian Process, showing the promising use of deep generative models to help in individualised analyses.

In particular, deep generative models showed great results as normative models to identify neurological lesions in the brain. However, unlike most neurological lesions, psychiatric disorders present subtle changes widespread in several brain regions, making these alterations challenging to identify. In this work, we evaluate the performance of transformer-based normative models to detect subtle brain changes expressed in adolescents and young adults. We trained our model on 3D MRI scans of neurotypical individuals (N=1,765). Then, we obtained the likelihood of neurotypical controls and psychiatric patients with early-stage schizophrenia from an independent dataset (N=93) from the Human Connectome Project. Using the predicted likelihood of the scans as a proxy for a normative score, we obtained an AUROC of 0.82 when assessing the difference between controls and individuals with early-stage schizophrenia. Our approach surpassed recent normative methods based on brain age and Gaussian Process, showing the promising use of deep generative models to help in individualised analyses.
abstract_zh: 尽管精神疾病对临床健康产生影响，但早期诊断仍然是一个挑战。机器学习研究表明，分类器在诊断预测任务中往往过于狭窄。条件之间的重叠导致参与者之间存在高度异质性，而分类模型无法充分捕获这种异质性。为了解决这个问题，规范方法作为替代方法兴起。通过使用生成模型来学习健康大脑数据模式的分布，我们可以将病理的存在识别为模型所学习的分布的偏差或异常值。特别是，深度生成模型作为识别大脑神经损伤的规范模型显示出了很好的结果。然而，与大多数神经病变不同，精神疾病在多个大脑区域中普遍存在微妙的变化，使得这些变化难以识别。在这项工作中，我们评估了基于变压器的规范模型的性能，以检测青少年和年轻人表达的微妙大脑变化。我们在神经典型个体 (N=1,765) 的 3D MRI 扫描上训练我们的模型。然后，我们从人类连接组计划的独立数据集 (N=93) 中获得了神经典型对照和早期精神分裂症精神病患者的可能性。使用扫描的预测可能性作为规范评分的代理，在评估对照组和早期精神分裂症患者之间的差异时，我们获得了 0.82 的 AUROC。我们的方法超越了最近基于大脑年龄和高斯过程的规范方法，显示出使用深度生成模型来帮助进行个性化分析的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的规范模型，用于检测青少年和年轻成人早期精神分裂症的脑部异常变化。
AI.motivation: 精神疾病早期诊断面临挑战，传统分类模型难以捕捉患者异质性，而规范模型通过生成健康脑数据分布来识别病理偏离，但精神疾病的变化较为隐匿，需更有效的方法。
AI.method: 使用Transformer生成模型学习正常脑部MRI数据分布，通过预测扫描图像的似然值作为规范分数，对比早期精神分裂症患者与健康对照组的差异。
AI.result: 在独立数据集上实现AUROC为0.82，优于基于脑年龄和高斯过程的规范方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度生成模型在检测早期精神分裂症的个体化分析中展现出潜力，规范模型可有效识别广泛脑区的细微变化。

authors_text: Nam Anh Dinh,Haochen Wang,Greg Shakhnarovich,Rana Hanocka
title: LoopDraw: a Loop-Based Autoregressive Model for Shape Synthesis and Editing
title_zh: LoopDraw：用于形状合成和编辑的基于循环的自回归模型
comment: accepted to AI4CC 2024 workshop at CVPR 2024. See project page at https://threedle.github.io/LoopDraw
comments: accepted to AI4CC 2024 workshop at CVPR 2024. See project page at https://threedle.github.io/LoopDraw
abstract: There is no settled universal 3D representation for geometry with many alternatives such as point clouds, meshes, implicit functions, and voxels to name a few. In this work, we present a new, compelling alternative for representing shapes using a sequence of cross-sectional closed loops. The loops across all planes form an organizational hierarchy which we leverage for autoregressive shape synthesis and editing. Loops are a non-local description of the underlying shape, as simple loop manipulations (such as shifts) result in significant structural changes to the geometry. This is in contrast to manipulating local primitives such as points in a point cloud or a triangle in a triangle mesh. We further demonstrate that loops are intuitive and natural primitive for analyzing and editing shapes, both computationally and for users.
summary: There is no settled universal 3D representation for geometry with many alternatives such as point clouds, meshes, implicit functions, and voxels to name a few. In this work, we present a new, compelling alternative for representing shapes using a sequence of cross-sectional closed loops. The loops across all planes form an organizational hierarchy which we leverage for autoregressive shape synthesis and editing. Loops are a non-local description of the underlying shape, as simple loop manipulations (such as shifts) result in significant structural changes to the geometry. This is in contrast to manipulating local primitives such as points in a point cloud or a triangle in a triangle mesh. We further demonstrate that loops are intuitive and natural primitive for analyzing and editing shapes, both computationally and for users.
abstract_zh: 目前还没有固定的通用 3D 几何表示方法，有许多替代方案，例如点云、网格、隐函数和体素等。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的、引人注目的替代方案，用于使用一系列横截面闭环来表示形状。所有平面上的循环形成了一个组织层次结构，我们利用该层次结构进行自回归形状合成和编辑。循环是底层形状的非局部描述，因为简单的循环操作（例如移位）会导致几何结构发生重大变化。这与操作局部基元（例如点云中的点或三角形网格中的三角形）形成对比。我们进一步证明，循环对于计算和用户分析和编辑形状来说是直观且自然的原语。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoopDraw，一种基于环序列的自回归模型，用于3D形状的合成与编辑，作为现有几何表示方法的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有3D几何表示方法（如点云、网格等）缺乏统一性，且局部操作难以实现结构性变化。环结构能通过非局部操作（如位移）显著改变几何形态，更符合形状编辑需求。
AI.method: 以横截面闭合环序列为形状表示，利用其层次化组织结构进行自回归生成与编辑，通过操作环实现结构变化。
AI.result: 验证了环作为形状分析与编辑的直观基元，适用于计算和用户交互，且能生成高质量形状。
AI.conclusion: 环结构为3D形状表示提供了新思路，其非局部特性在合成与编辑任务中表现出优势。

authors_text: Shen Yan,Tao Zhu,Zirui Wang,Yuan Cao,Mi Zhang,Soham Ghosh,Yonghui Wu,Jiahui Yu
title: VideoCoCa: Video-Text Modeling with Zero-Shot Transfer from Contrastive Captioners
title_zh: VideoCoCa：通过对比字幕进行零镜头传输的视频文本建模
comment: Tech report. arXiv v3: update text
comments: Tech report. arXiv v3: update text
abstract: We explore an efficient approach to establish a foundational video-text model. We present VideoCoCa that maximally reuses a pretrained image-text contrastive captioner (CoCa) model and adapt it to video-text tasks with minimal extra training. While previous works adapt image-text models with various cross-frame fusion modules, we find that the generative attentional pooling and contrastive attentional pooling layers in CoCa are instantly adaptable to flattened frame embeddings, yielding state-of-the-art results on zero-shot video classification and zero-shot text-to-video retrieval. Furthermore, we explore lightweight finetuning on top of VideoCoCa, and achieve strong results on video question-answering and video captioning.
summary: We explore an efficient approach to establish a foundational video-text model. We present VideoCoCa that maximally reuses a pretrained image-text contrastive captioner (CoCa) model and adapt it to video-text tasks with minimal extra training. While previous works adapt image-text models with various cross-frame fusion modules, we find that the generative attentional pooling and contrastive attentional pooling layers in CoCa are instantly adaptable to flattened frame embeddings, yielding state-of-the-art results on zero-shot video classification and zero-shot text-to-video retrieval. Furthermore, we explore lightweight finetuning on top of VideoCoCa, and achieve strong results on video question-answering and video captioning.
abstract_zh: 我们探索一种建立基础视频文本模型的有效方法。我们提出的 VideoCoCa 最大限度地重用了预训练的图像文本对比字幕生成器 (CoCa) 模型，并以最少的额外训练使其适应视频文本任务。虽然之前的工作使用各种跨帧融合模块来调整图像文本模型，但我们发现 CoCa 中的生成注意力池和对比注意力池层可以立即适应扁平化的帧嵌入，从而在零样本视频分类和零样本文本到视频检索方面产生最先进的结果。此外，我们在VideoCoCa之上探索了轻量级微调，并在视频问答和视频字幕方面取得了良好的成果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VideoCoCa模型，通过复用预训练图像-文本对比模型CoCa，实现视频-文本任务的零样本迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过复杂跨帧融合模块适配图像-文本模型，但作者发现CoCa的注意力池化层可直接用于视频帧嵌入，从而减少训练成本。
AI.method: 将CoCa的生成/对比注意力池化层直接应用于视频帧嵌入，通过扁平化处理实现零样本迁移，并进行轻量级微调优化下游任务。
AI.result: 在零样本视频分类和文本-视频检索任务中达到SOTA，微调后在视频问答和字幕生成任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: VideoCoCa验证了图像-文本模型到视频-文本任务的零样本迁移有效性，轻量级微调可进一步提升多任务性能。

search_text: VideoCoCa: Video-Text Modeling with Zero-Shot Transfer from Contrastive Captioners VideoCoCa：通过对比字幕进行零镜头传输的视频文本建模 We explore an efficient approach to establish a foundational video-text model. We present VideoCoCa that maximally reuses a pretrained image-text contrastive captioner (CoCa) model and adapt it to video-text tasks with minimal extra training. While previous works adapt image-text models with various cross-frame fusion modules, we find that the generative attentional pooling and contrastive attentional pooling layers in CoCa are instantly adaptable to flattened frame embeddings, yielding state-of-the-art results on zero-shot video classification and zero-shot text-to-video retrieval. Furthermore, we explore lightweight finetuning on top of VideoCoCa, and achieve strong results on video question-answering and video captioning. 我们探索一种建立基础视频文本模型的有效方法。我们提出的 VideoCoCa 最大限度地重用了预训练的图像文本对比字幕生成器 (CoCa) 模型，并以最少的额外训练使其适应视频文本任务。虽然之前的工作使用各种跨帧融合模块来调整图像文本模型，但我们发现 CoCa 中的生成注意力池和对比注意力池层可以立即适应扁平化的帧嵌入，从而在零样本视频分类和零样本文本到视频检索方面产生最先进的结果。此外，我们在VideoCoCa之上探索了轻量级微调，并在视频问答和视频字幕方面取得了良好的成果。 本文提出VideoCoCa模型，通过复用预训练图像-文本对比模型CoCa，实现视频-文本任务的零样本迁移。 Shen Yan,Tao Zhu,Zirui Wang,Yuan Cao,Mi Zhang,Soham Ghosh,Yonghui Wu,Jiahui Yu cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Zhen Zhao,Lihe Yang,Sifan Long,Jimin Pi,Luping Zhou,Jingdong Wang
title: Augmentation Matters: A Simple-yet-Effective Approach to Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 增强很重要：一种简单而有效的半监督语义分割方法
abstract: Recent studies on semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSS) have seen fast progress. Despite their promising performance, current state-of-the-art methods tend to increasingly complex designs at the cost of introducing more network components and additional training procedures. Differently, in this work, we follow a standard teacher-student framework and propose AugSeg, a simple and clean approach that focuses mainly on data perturbations to boost the SSS performance. We argue that various data augmentations should be adjusted to better adapt to the semi-supervised scenarios instead of directly applying these techniques from supervised learning. Specifically, we adopt a simplified intensity-based augmentation that selects a random number of data transformations with uniformly sampling distortion strengths from a continuous space. Based on the estimated confidence of the model on different unlabeled samples, we also randomly inject labelled information to augment the unlabeled samples in an adaptive manner. Without bells and whistles, our simple AugSeg can readily achieve new state-of-the-art performance on SSS benchmarks under different partition protocols.
summary: Recent studies on semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSS) have seen fast progress. Despite their promising performance, current state-of-the-art methods tend to increasingly complex designs at the cost of introducing more network components and additional training procedures. Differently, in this work, we follow a standard teacher-student framework and propose AugSeg, a simple and clean approach that focuses mainly on data perturbations to boost the SSS performance. We argue that various data augmentations should be adjusted to better adapt to the semi-supervised scenarios instead of directly applying these techniques from supervised learning. Specifically, we adopt a simplified intensity-based augmentation that selects a random number of data transformations with uniformly sampling distortion strengths from a continuous space. Based on the estimated confidence of the model on different unlabeled samples, we also randomly inject labelled information to augment the unlabeled samples in an adaptive manner. Without bells and whistles, our simple AugSeg can readily achieve new state-of-the-art performance on SSS benchmarks under different partition protocols.
abstract_zh: 最近半监督语义分割（SSS）的研究取得了快速进展。尽管它们的性能很有前途，但当前最先进的方法倾向于日益复杂的设计，但代价是引入更多的网络组件和额外的训练程序。不同的是，在这项工作中，我们遵循标准的师生框架，并提出了 AugSeg，这是一种简单而干净的方法，主要关注数据扰动以提高 SSS 性能。我们认为应该调整各种数据增强以更好地适应半监督场景，而不是直接应用监督学习中的这些技术。具体来说，我们采用一种简化的基于强度的增强，它选择随机数量的数据转换，并从连续空间中均匀采样失真强度。基于模型对不同未标记样本的估计置信度，我们还随机注入标记信息以自适应方式增强未标记样本。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们简单的 AugSeg 可以轻松地在不同分区协议下的 SSS 基准上实现新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单有效的半监督语义分割方法AugSeg，通过改进数据增强策略提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法过于复杂且依赖额外组件，而数据增强策略未针对半监督场景优化，需简化设计并调整增强方式。
AI.method: 采用基于强度的随机数据增强，从连续空间均匀采样扰动参数，并根据模型置信度自适应注入标签信息增强未标记样本。
AI.result: AugSeg在多个基准测试中达到新SOTA性能，且无需复杂网络或训练流程。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强策略的优化对半监督语义分割至关重要，简单方法在合理设计下可超越复杂框架。

authors_text: Hongtao Zhong,Zijie Zheng,Leming Jiao,Zuopu Zhou,Chen Sun,Xiaoyang Ma,Vijaykrishnan Narayanan,Huazhong Yang,Kai Ni,Xiao Gong,Xueqing Li
title: Eliminating Leakage in Volatile Memory with Anti-Ferroelectric Transistors
title_zh: 使用反铁电晶体管消除易失性存储器中的泄漏
abstract: Cache serves as a temporary data memory module in many general-purpose processors and domain-specific accelerators. Its density, power, speed, and reliability play a critical role in enhancing the overall system performance and quality of service. Conventional volatile memories, including static random-access memory (SRAM) and embedded dynamic random-access memory (eDRAM) in the complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor technology, have high performance and good reliability. However, the inherent leakage in both SRAM and eDRAM hinders further improvement towards smaller feature sizes and higher energy efficiency. Although the emerging nonvolatile memories can eliminate the leakage efficiently, the penalties of lower speed and degraded reliability are significant. This article reveals a new opportunity towards leakage-free volatile static memory beyond the known paradigms of existing volatile and nonvolatile memories. By engineering a double-well energy landscape with the assistance of a clamping voltage bias, leakage-free and refresh-free state retention of volatile memory is achieved for the first time. This new memory is highlighted by both the ultra-low leakage of nonvolatile memories and the speed, energy, and reliability advantages of volatile memories. A proof-of-concept memory is demonstrated using in-house anti-ferroelectric field-effect transistors (AFeFETs), delivering an extrapolated endurance of about 1012 cycles, a retention time of over 10 years, and no subthreshold channel leakage current. Such a new concept of AFeFET-based memory enables an improved balance between density, power, and reliability beyond all existing memory solutions.
summary: Cache serves as a temporary data memory module in many general-purpose processors and domain-specific accelerators. Its density, power, speed, and reliability play a critical role in enhancing the overall system performance and quality of service. Conventional volatile memories, including static random-access memory (SRAM) and embedded dynamic random-access memory (eDRAM) in the complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor technology, have high performance and good reliability. However, the inherent leakage in both SRAM and eDRAM hinders further improvement towards smaller feature sizes and higher energy efficiency. Although the emerging nonvolatile memories can eliminate the leakage efficiently, the penalties of lower speed and degraded reliability are significant. This article reveals a new opportunity towards leakage-free volatile static memory beyond the known paradigms of existing volatile and nonvolatile memories. By engineering a double-well energy landscape with the assistance of a clamping voltage bias, leakage-free and refresh-free state retention of volatile memory is achieved for the first time. This new memory is highlighted by both the ultra-low leakage of nonvolatile memories and the speed, energy, and reliability advantages of volatile memories. A proof-of-concept memory is demonstrated using in-house anti-ferroelectric field-effect transistors (AFeFETs), delivering an extrapolated endurance of about 1012 cycles, a retention time of over 10 years, and no subthreshold channel leakage current. Such a new concept of AFeFET-based memory enables an improved balance between density, power, and reliability beyond all existing memory solutions.
abstract_zh: 高速缓存在许多通用处理器和特定领域加速器中充当临时数据存储模块。其密度、功率、速度和可靠性在提高整体系统性能和服务质量方面发挥着关键作用。传统的易失性存储器，包括采用互补金属氧化物半导体技术的静态随机存取存储器（SRAM）和嵌入式动态随机存取存储器（eDRAM），具有高性能和良好的可靠性。然而，SRAM 和 eDRAM 固有的泄漏阻碍了向更小特征尺寸和更高能效方向的进一步改进。尽管新兴的非易失性存储器可以有效地消除泄漏，但速度降低和可靠性下降的代价是显着的。本文揭示了超越现有易失性和非易失性存储器的已知范例的无泄漏易失性静态存储器的新机会。通过在钳位电压偏置的帮助下设计双阱能量景观，首次实现了易失性存储器的无泄漏和无刷新状态保留。这种新型存储器的突出特点是非易失性存储器的超低泄漏以及易失性存储器的速度、能量和可靠性优势。使用内部反铁电场效应晶体管 (AFeFET) 演示了概念验证存储器，可提供约 1012 个周期的外推耐久性、超过 10 年的保留时间，并且无亚阈值通道泄漏电流。这种基于 AFeFET 的存储器的新概念能够改善密度、功耗和可靠性之间的平衡，超越所有现有的存储器解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反铁电场效应晶体管（AFeFET）的新颖挥发性静态存储器，实现了无泄漏、无需刷新的状态保持。
AI.motivation: 传统挥发性存储器（如SRAM、eDRAM）存在固有泄漏问题，限制了性能提升；非挥发性存储器虽能消除泄漏，但速度和可靠性较差，亟需平衡密度、功耗和可靠性的新型存储方案。
AI.method: 通过设计双势阱能量景观并结合钳位电压偏置，利用AFeFET实现无泄漏且无需刷新的挥发性存储器原型。
AI.result: 实验验证该存储器具有约10¹²次的耐久性、超过10年的保持时间，且无亚阈值通道泄漏电流。
AI.conclusion: AFeFET存储器在密度、功耗和可靠性方面优于现有方案，为下一代存储技术提供了新方向。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反铁电场效应晶体管（AFeFET）的新颖挥发性静态存储器，实现了无泄漏、无需刷新的状态保持。
motivation: 传统挥发性存储器（如SRAM、eDRAM）存在固有泄漏问题，限制了性能提升；非挥发性存储器虽能消除泄漏，但速度和可靠性较差，亟需平衡密度、功耗和可靠性的新型存储方案。
method: 通过设计双势阱能量景观并结合钳位电压偏置，利用AFeFET实现无泄漏且无需刷新的挥发性存储器原型。
result: 实验验证该存储器具有约10¹²次的耐久性、超过10年的保持时间，且无亚阈值通道泄漏电流。
conclusion: AFeFET存储器在密度、功耗和可靠性方面优于现有方案，为下一代存储技术提供了新方向。
search_text: Eliminating Leakage in Volatile Memory with Anti-Ferroelectric Transistors 使用反铁电晶体管消除易失性存储器中的泄漏 Cache serves as a temporary data memory module in many general-purpose processors and domain-specific accelerators. Its density, power, speed, and reliability play a critical role in enhancing the overall system performance and quality of service. Conventional volatile memories, including static random-access memory (SRAM) and embedded dynamic random-access memory (eDRAM) in the complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor technology, have high performance and good reliability. However, the inherent leakage in both SRAM and eDRAM hinders further improvement towards smaller feature sizes and higher energy efficiency. Although the emerging nonvolatile memories can eliminate the leakage efficiently, the penalties of lower speed and degraded reliability are significant. This article reveals a new opportunity towards leakage-free volatile static memory beyond the known paradigms of existing volatile and nonvolatile memories. By engineering a double-well energy landscape with the assistance of a clamping voltage bias, leakage-free and refresh-free state retention of volatile memory is achieved for the first time. This new memory is highlighted by both the ultra-low leakage of nonvolatile memories and the speed, energy, and reliability advantages of volatile memories. A proof-of-concept memory is demonstrated using in-house anti-ferroelectric field-effect transistors (AFeFETs), delivering an extrapolated endurance of about 1012 cycles, a retention time of over 10 years, and no subthreshold channel leakage current. Such a new concept of AFeFET-based memory enables an improved balance between density, power, and reliability beyond all existing memory solutions. 高速缓存在许多通用处理器和特定领域加速器中充当临时数据存储模块。其密度、功率、速度和可靠性在提高整体系统性能和服务质量方面发挥着关键作用。传统的易失性存储器，包括采用互补金属氧化物半导体技术的静态随机存取存储器（SRAM）和嵌入式动态随机存取存储器（eDRAM），具有高性能和良好的可靠性。然而，SRAM 和 eDRAM 固有的泄漏阻碍了向更小特征尺寸和更高能效方向的进一步改进。尽管新兴的非易失性存储器可以有效地消除泄漏，但速度降低和可靠性下降的代价是显着的。本文揭示了超越现有易失性和非易失性存储器的已知范例的无泄漏易失性静态存储器的新机会。通过在钳位电压偏置的帮助下设计双阱能量景观，首次实现了易失性存储器的无泄漏和无刷新状态保留。这种新型存储器的突出特点是非易失性存储器的超低泄漏以及易失性存储器的速度、能量和可靠性优势。使用内部反铁电场效应晶体管 (AFeFET) 演示了概念验证存储器，可提供约 1012 个周期的外推耐久性、超过 10 年的保留时间，并且无亚阈值通道泄漏电流。这种基于 AFeFET 的存储器的新概念能够改善密度、功耗和可靠性之间的平衡，超越所有现有的存储器解决方案。 本文提出了一种基于反铁电场效应晶体管（AFeFET）的新颖挥发性静态存储器，实现了无泄漏、无需刷新的状态保持。 Hongtao Zhong,Zijie Zheng,Leming Jiao,Zuopu Zhou,Chen Sun,Xiaoyang Ma,Vijaykrishnan Narayanan,Huazhong Yang,Kai Ni,Xiao Gong,Xueqing Li cs.ET

authors_text: Jialiang Lin,Jiaxin Song,Zhangping Zhou,Yidong Chen,Xiaodong Shi
title: MOPRD: A multidisciplinary open peer review dataset
title_zh: MOPRD：多学科开放同行评审数据集
comment: Please cite the version of Neural Computing and Applications
comments: Please cite the version of Neural Computing and Applications
abstract: Open peer review is a growing trend in academic publications. Public access to peer review data can benefit both the academic and publishing communities. It also serves as a great support to studies on review comment generation and further to the realization of automated scholarly paper review. However, most of the existing peer review datasets do not provide data that cover the whole peer review process. Apart from this, their data are not diversified enough as the data are mainly collected from the field of computer science. These two drawbacks of the currently available peer review datasets need to be addressed to unlock more opportunities for related studies. In response, we construct MOPRD, a multidisciplinary open peer review dataset. This dataset consists of paper metadata, multiple version manuscripts, review comments, meta-reviews, author's rebuttal letters, and editorial decisions. Moreover, we propose a modular guided review comment generation method based on MOPRD. Experiments show that our method delivers better performance as indicated by both automatic metrics and human evaluation. We also explore other potential applications of MOPRD, including meta-review generation, editorial decision prediction, author rebuttal generation, and scientometric analysis. MOPRD is a strong endorsement for further studies in peer review-related research and other applications.
summary: Open peer review is a growing trend in academic publications. Public access to peer review data can benefit both the academic and publishing communities. It also serves as a great support to studies on review comment generation and further to the realization of automated scholarly paper review. However, most of the existing peer review datasets do not provide data that cover the whole peer review process. Apart from this, their data are not diversified enough as the data are mainly collected from the field of computer science. These two drawbacks of the currently available peer review datasets need to be addressed to unlock more opportunities for related studies. In response, we construct MOPRD, a multidisciplinary open peer review dataset. This dataset consists of paper metadata, multiple version manuscripts, review comments, meta-reviews, author's rebuttal letters, and editorial decisions. Moreover, we propose a modular guided review comment generation method based on MOPRD. Experiments show that our method delivers better performance as indicated by both automatic metrics and human evaluation. We also explore other potential applications of MOPRD, including meta-review generation, editorial decision prediction, author rebuttal generation, and scientometric analysis. MOPRD is a strong endorsement for further studies in peer review-related research and other applications.
abstract_zh: 公开同行评审是学术出版物中日益增长的趋势。公众获取同行评审数据可以使学术界和出版界受益。这也为审稿意见生成的研究以及进一步实现学术论文自动化审稿提供了大力支持。然而，大多数现有的同行评审数据集并没有提供涵盖整个同行评审过程的数据。除此之外，他们的数据还不够多样化，因为数据主要收集自计算机科学领域。目前可用的同行评审数据集的这两个缺点需要解决，以释放更多相关研究的机会。作为回应，我们构建了 MOPRD，一个多学科开放同行评审数据集。该数据集包含论文元数据、多版本手稿、审稿意见、元审稿、作者的反驳信和编辑决定。此外，我们提出了一种基于MOPRD的模块化引导评论生成方法。实验表明，我们的方法提供了更好的性能，如自动指标和人工评估所示。我们还探索了 MOPRD 的其他潜在应用，包括元评审生成、编辑决策预测、作者反驳生成和科学计量分析。 MOPRD 强烈支持同行评审相关研究和其他应用的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOPRD，一个多学科开放同行评审数据集，并基于该数据集设计模块化引导的评审评论生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有同行评审数据集覆盖流程不完整且学科单一，限制了相关研究的发展，需构建更全面多样化的数据集以推动自动化评审等研究。
AI.method: 构建包含论文元数据、多版本手稿、评审意见、元评审、作者回复及编辑决策的MOPRD数据集，并提出基于该数据集的模块化引导评审评论生成方法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在自动指标和人工评估中表现优于现有方法，同时探索了元评审生成、编辑决策预测等潜在应用。
AI.conclusion: MOPRD为同行评审相关研究及科学计量分析等应用提供了高质量数据支持，推动学术出版领域智能化发展。

Public access to peer review data can benefit both the academic and publishing communities. However, most of the existing peer review datasets do not provide data that cover the whole peer review process. Apart from this, their data are not diversified enough as the data are mainly collected from the field of computer science. authors_text: Yasheng Sun,Hang Zhou,Kaisiyuan Wang,Qianyi Wu,Zhibin Hong,Jingtuo Liu,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang,Ziwei Liu,Hideki Koike
title: Masked Lip-Sync Prediction by Audio-Visual Contextual Exploitation in Transformers
title_zh: 通过变形金刚中的视听上下文开发进行蒙面口型同步预测
comment: Accepted to SIGGRAPH Asia 2022 (Conference Proceedings). Project page: https://hangz-nju-cuhk.github.io/projects/AV-CAT
comments: Accepted to SIGGRAPH Asia 2022 (Conference Proceedings). Project page: https://hangz-nju-cuhk.github.io/projects/AV-CAT
abstract: Previous studies have explored generating accurately lip-synced talking faces for arbitrary targets given audio conditions. However, most of them deform or generate the whole facial area, leading to non-realistic results. In this work, we delve into the formulation of altering only the mouth shapes of the target person. This requires masking a large percentage of the original image and seamlessly inpainting it with the aid of audio and reference frames. To this end, we propose the Audio-Visual Context-Aware Transformer (AV-CAT) framework, which produces accurate lip-sync with photo-realistic quality by predicting the masked mouth shapes. Our key insight is to exploit desired contextual information provided in audio and visual modalities thoroughly with delicately designed Transformers. Specifically, we propose a convolution-Transformer hybrid backbone and design an attention-based fusion strategy for filling the masked parts. It uniformly attends to the textural information on the unmasked regions and the reference frame. Then the semantic audio information is involved in enhancing the self-attention computation. Additionally, a refinement network with audio injection improves both image and lip-sync quality. Extensive experiments validate that our model can generate high-fidelity lip-synced results for arbitrary subjects.
summary: Previous studies have explored generating accurately lip-synced talking faces for arbitrary targets given audio conditions. However, most of them deform or generate the whole facial area, leading to non-realistic results. In this work, we delve into the formulation of altering only the mouth shapes of the target person. This requires masking a large percentage of the original image and seamlessly inpainting it with the aid of audio and reference frames. To this end, we propose the Audio-Visual Context-Aware Transformer (AV-CAT) framework, which produces accurate lip-sync with photo-realistic quality by predicting the masked mouth shapes. Our key insight is to exploit desired contextual information provided in audio and visual modalities thoroughly with delicately designed Transformers. Specifically, we propose a convolution-Transformer hybrid backbone and design an attention-based fusion strategy for filling the masked parts. It uniformly attends to the textural information on the unmasked regions and the reference frame. Then the semantic audio information is involved in enhancing the self-attention computation. Additionally, a refinement network with audio injection improves both image and lip-sync quality. Extensive experiments validate that our model can generate high-fidelity lip-synced results for arbitrary subjects.
abstract_zh: 之前的研究已经探索了在给定音频条件下为任意目标生成精确的口型同步说话面孔。然而，它们中的大多数都会使整个面部区域变形或生成，从而导致不切实际的结果。在这项工作中，我们深入研究了仅改变目​​标人的嘴形的方案。这需要遮盖大部分原始图像，并借助音频和参考帧对其进行无缝修复。 To this end, we propose the Audio-Visual Context-Aware Transformer (AV-CAT) framework, which produces accurate lip-sync with photo-realistic quality by predicting the masked mouth shapes. Our key insight is to exploit desired contextual information provided in audio and visual modalities thoroughly with delicately designed Transformers.具体来说，我们提出了一种卷积-Transformer 混合主干，并设计了一种基于注意力的融合策略来填充屏蔽部分。它统一关注未遮蔽区域和参考框架上的纹理信息。然后语义音频信息参与增强自注意力计算。此外，具有音频注入的细化网络提高了图像和唇形同步质量。大量的实验验证了我们的模型可以为任意受试者生成高保真口型同步结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音频-视觉上下文利用的Transformer框架（AV-CAT），通过仅改变目标人物的嘴唇形状生成高保真度的唇形同步动画。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过变形整个面部区域生成唇形同步动画，导致结果不真实。本文旨在通过仅修改嘴唇区域并结合音频和参考帧实现更逼真的效果。
AI.method: 设计卷积-Transformer混合架构，结合注意力机制融合未遮罩区域与参考帧的纹理信息，并通过音频信息增强自注意力计算，最后使用带音频注入的 refinement 网络提升质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型能够为任意目标生成高保真度的唇形同步动画，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度挖掘音频-视觉上下文信息并精确控制嘴唇区域，AV-CAT框架有效提升了唇形同步动画的逼真度与灵活性。

search_text: Masked Lip-Sync Prediction by Audio-Visual Contextual Exploitation in Transformers 通过变形金刚中的视听上下文开发进行蒙面口型同步预测 Previous studies have explored generating accurately lip-synced talking faces for arbitrary targets given audio conditions. However, most of them deform or generate the whole facial area, leading to non-realistic results. In this work, we delve into the formulation of altering only the mouth shapes of the target person. This requires masking a large percentage of the original image and seamlessly inpainting it with the aid of audio and reference frames. To this end, we propose the Audio-Visual Context-Aware Transformer (AV-CAT) framework, which produces accurate lip-sync with photo-realistic quality by predicting the masked mouth shapes. Our key insight is to exploit desired contextual information provided in audio and visual modalities thoroughly with delicately designed Transformers. Specifically, we propose a convolution-Transformer hybrid backbone and design an attention-based fusion strategy for filling the masked parts. It uniformly attends to the textural information on the unmasked regions and the reference frame. Then the semantic audio information is involved in enhancing the self-attention computation. Additionally, a refinement network with audio injection improves both image and lip-sync quality. Extensive experiments validate that our model can generate high-fidelity lip-synced results for arbitrary subjects. 之前的研究已经探索了在给定音频条件下为任意目标生成精确的口型同步说话面孔。然而，它们中的大多数都会使整个面部区域变形或生成，从而导致不切实际的结果。在这项工作中，我们深入研究了仅改变目​​标人的嘴形的方案。这需要遮盖大部分原始图像，并借助音频和参考帧对其进行无缝修复。 To this end, we propose the Audio-Visual Context-Aware Transformer (AV-CAT) framework, which produces accurate lip-sync with photo-realistic quality by predicting the masked mouth shapes. Our key insight is to exploit desired contextual information provided in audio and visual modalities thoroughly with delicately designed Transformers.具体来说，我们提出了一种卷积-Transformer 混合主干，并设计了一种基于注意力的融合策略来填充屏蔽部分。它统一关注未遮蔽区域和参考框架上的纹理信息。然后语义音频信息参与增强自注意力计算。此外，具有音频注入的细化网络提高了图像和唇形同步质量。大量的实验验证了我们的模型可以为任意受试者生成高保真口型同步结果。 本文提出一种基于音频-视觉上下文利用的Transformer框架（AV-CAT），通过仅改变目标人物的嘴唇形状生成高保真度的唇形同步动画。 Yasheng Sun,Hang Zhou,Kaisiyuan Wang,Qianyi Wu,Zhibin Hong,Jingtuo Liu,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang,Ziwei Liu,Hideki Koike cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR

authors_text: Mohammed Brahimi,Bjoern Haefner,Tarun Yenamandra,Bastian Goldluecke,Daniel Cremers
title: SupeRVol: Super-Resolution Shape and Reflectance Estimation in Inverse Volume Rendering
title_zh: SupeRVol：逆体积渲染中的超分辨率形状和反射率估计
abstract: We propose an end-to-end inverse rendering pipeline called SupeRVol that allows us to recover 3D shape and material parameters from a set of color images in a super-resolution manner. To this end, we represent both the bidirectional reflectance distribution function (BRDF) and the signed distance function (SDF) by multi-layer perceptrons. In order to obtain both the surface shape and its reflectance properties, we revert to a differentiable volume renderer with a physically based illumination model that allows us to decouple reflectance and lighting. This physical model takes into account the effect of the camera's point spread function thereby enabling a reconstruction of shape and material in a super-resolution quality. Experimental validation confirms that SupeRVol achieves state of the art performance in terms of inverse rendering quality. It generates reconstructions that are sharper than the individual input images, making this method ideally suited for 3D modeling from low-resolution imagery.
summary: We propose an end-to-end inverse rendering pipeline called SupeRVol that allows us to recover 3D shape and material parameters from a set of color images in a super-resolution manner. To this end, we represent both the bidirectional reflectance distribution function (BRDF) and the signed distance function (SDF) by multi-layer perceptrons. In order to obtain both the surface shape and its reflectance properties, we revert to a differentiable volume renderer with a physically based illumination model that allows us to decouple reflectance and lighting. This physical model takes into account the effect of the camera's point spread function thereby enabling a reconstruction of shape and material in a super-resolution quality. Experimental validation confirms that SupeRVol achieves state of the art performance in terms of inverse rendering quality. It generates reconstructions that are sharper than the individual input images, making this method ideally suited for 3D modeling from low-resolution imagery.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为 SupeRVol 的端到端逆向渲染管道，它允许我们以超分辨率方式从一组彩色图像中恢复 3D 形状和材料参数。为此，我们通过多层感知器表示双向反射分布函数（BRDF）和符号距离函数（SDF）。为了获得表面形状及其反射率属性，我们恢复到具有基于物理的照明模型的可微分体渲染器，该模型允许我们解耦反射率和照明。该物理模型考虑了相机点扩散函数的影响，从而能够以超分辨率质量重建形状和材料。实验验证证实，SupeRVol 在逆渲染质量方面实现了最先进的性能。它生成的重建结果比单个输入图像更清晰，使得该方法非常适合低分辨率图像的 3D 建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的逆向渲染流水线SupeRVol，通过多层感知机表示BRDF和SDF，并利用可微分体积渲染器实现高分辨率的3D形状和材质参数恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从低分辨率图像中重建高精度的3D形状与材质，且难以分离反射率与光照影响，需提升超分辨率重建质量以满足3D建模需求。
AI.method: 采用多层感知机建模BRDF和SDF，结合考虑相机点扩散函数的物理光照模型的可微分体积渲染器，实现反射率与光照的解耦及超分辨率重建。
AI.result: 实验验证SupeRVol在逆向渲染质量上达到SOTA，重建结果锐度优于输入图像，适用于低分辨率图像的3D建模。
AI.conclusion: SupeRVol通过物理驱动的神经网络与体积渲染结合，有效实现了从低分辨率图像中恢复高保真3D形状与材质，为逆向渲染提供了新方法。

To this end, we represent both the bidirectional reflectance distribution function (BRDF) and the signed distance function (SDF) by multi-layer perceptrons. This physical model takes into account the effect of the camera's point spread function thereby enabling a reconstruction of shape and material in a super-resolution quality. Experimental validation confirms that SupeRVol achieves state of the art performance in terms of inverse rendering quality.
