search_text: Frugal Reinforcement-based Active Learning 基于节俭强化的主动学习 Most of the existing learning models, particularly deep neural networks, are reliant on large datasets whose hand-labeling is expensive and time demanding. A current trend is to make the learning of these models frugal and less dependent on large collections of labeled data. Among the existing solutions, deep active learning is currently witnessing a major interest and its purpose is to train deep networks using as few labeled samples as possible. However, the success of active learning is highly dependent on how critical are these samples when training models. In this paper, we devise a novel active learning approach for label-efficient training. The proposed method is iterative and aims at minimizing a constrained objective function that mixes diversity, representativity and uncertainty criteria. The proposed approach is probabilistic and unifies all these criteria in a single objective function whose solution models the probability of relevance of samples (i.e., how critical) when learning a decision function. We also introduce a novel weighting mechanism based on reinforcement learning, which adaptively balances these criteria at each training iteration, using a particular stateless Q-learning model. Extensive experiments conducted on staple image classification data, including Object-DOTA, show the effectiveness of our proposed model w.r.t. several baselines including random, uncertainty and flat as well as other work. 大多数现有的学习模型，特别是深度神经网络，都依赖于大型数据集，而这些数据集的手工标记成本高昂且耗时。当前的趋势是使这些模型的学习变得节俭并且减少对大量标记数据的依赖。在现有的解决方案中，深度主动学习目前引起了人们的广泛兴趣，其目的是使用尽可能少的标记样本来训练深度网络。然而，主动学习的成功很大程度上取决于这些样本在训练模型时的重要性。在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的主动学习方法，用于标签高效的训练。所提出的方法是迭代的，旨在最小化混合多样性、代表性和不确定性标准的约束目标函数。所提出的方法是概率性的，并将所有这些标准统一在一个目标函数中，其解决方案对学习决策函数时样本的相关性概率（即关键程度）进行建模。我们还引入了一种基于强化学习的新颖加权机制，该机制使用特定的无状态 Q 学习模型在每次训练迭代中自适应地平衡这些标准。对主要图像分类数据（包括 Object-DOTA）进行的广泛实验表明了我们提出的模型的有效性。一些基线包括随机、不确定性和平坦以及其他工作。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的高效主动学习方法，通过统一多样性、代表性和不确定性准则，减少深度学习对大规模标注数据的依赖。 Sebastien Deschamps,Hichem Sahbi cs.CV

authors_text: Kai Lagemann,Christian Lagemann,Bernd Taschler,Sach Mukherjee
title: Deep Learning of Causal Structures in High Dimensions
title_zh: 高维因果结构的深度学习
abstract: Recent years have seen rapid progress at the intersection between causality and machine learning. Motivated by scientific applications involving high-dimensional data, in particular in biomedicine, we propose a deep neural architecture for learning causal relationships between variables from a combination of empirical data and prior causal knowledge. We combine convolutional and graph neural networks within a causal risk framework to provide a flexible and scalable approach. Empirical results include linear and nonlinear simulations (where the underlying causal structures are known and can be directly compared against), as well as a real biological example where the models are applied to high-dimensional molecular data and their output compared against entirely unseen validation experiments. These results demonstrate the feasibility of using deep learning approaches to learn causal networks in large-scale problems spanning thousands of variables.
summary: Recent years have seen rapid progress at the intersection between causality and machine learning. Motivated by scientific applications involving high-dimensional data, in particular in biomedicine, we propose a deep neural architecture for learning causal relationships between variables from a combination of empirical data and prior causal knowledge. We combine convolutional and graph neural networks within a causal risk framework to provide a flexible and scalable approach. Empirical results include linear and nonlinear simulations (where the underlying causal structures are known and can be directly compared against), as well as a real biological example where the models are applied to high-dimensional molecular data and their output compared against entirely unseen validation experiments. These results demonstrate the feasibility of using deep learning approaches to learn causal networks in large-scale problems spanning thousands of variables.
abstract_zh: 近年来，因果关系和机器学习之间的交叉领域取得了快速进展。受涉及高维数据的科学应用（特别是在生物医学领域）的推动，我们提出了一种深度神经架构，用于从经验数据和先验因果知识的组合中学习变量之间的因果关系。我们将卷积和图神经网络结合在因果风险框架内，以提供灵活且可扩展的方法。经验结果包括线性和非线性模拟（其中潜在的因果结构已知并且可以直接进行比较），以及真实的生物学示例，其中模型应用于高维分子数据，并将其输出与完全看不见的验证实验进行比较。这些结果证明了使用深度学习方法来学习涉及数千个变量的大规模问题中的因果网络的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度神经网络架构，用于从高维数据中学习变量间的因果关系，并结合先验因果知识进行建模。
AI.motivation: 高维数据（如生物医学领域）的因果关系学习存在挑战，需结合数据与先验知识以提高模型可靠性。
AI.method: 融合卷积神经网络与图神经网络，构建因果风险框架，实现对线性及非线性因果结构的灵活建模。
AI.result: 在已知因果结构的仿真数据和高维分子生物数据上验证了方法有效性，结果与独立验证实验一致。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法可有效用于大规模高维因果网络学习，为复杂系统建模提供新思路。

authors_text: Manu Srinath Halvagal,Axel Laborieux,Friedemann Zenke
title: Implicit variance regularization in non-contrastive SSL
title_zh: 非对比 SSL 中的隐式方差正则化
abstract: Non-contrastive SSL methods like BYOL and SimSiam rely on asymmetric predictor networks to avoid representational collapse without negative samples. Yet, how predictor networks facilitate stable learning is not fully understood. While previous theoretical analyses assumed Euclidean losses, most practical implementations rely on cosine similarity. To gain further theoretical insight into non-contrastive SSL, we analytically study learning dynamics in conjunction with Euclidean and cosine similarity in the eigenspace of closed-form linear predictor networks. We show that both avoid collapse through implicit variance regularization albeit through different dynamical mechanisms. Moreover, we find that the eigenvalues act as effective learning rate multipliers and propose a family of isotropic loss functions (IsoLoss) that equalize convergence rates across eigenmodes. Empirically, IsoLoss speeds up the initial learning dynamics and increases robustness, thereby allowing us to dispense with the EMA target network typically used with non-contrastive methods. Our analysis sheds light on the variance regularization mechanisms of non-contrastive SSL and lays the theoretical grounds for crafting novel loss functions that shape the learning dynamics of the predictor's spectrum.
summary: Non-contrastive SSL methods like BYOL and SimSiam rely on asymmetric predictor networks to avoid representational collapse without negative samples. Yet, how predictor networks facilitate stable learning is not fully understood. While previous theoretical analyses assumed Euclidean losses, most practical implementations rely on cosine similarity. To gain further theoretical insight into non-contrastive SSL, we analytically study learning dynamics in conjunction with Euclidean and cosine similarity in the eigenspace of closed-form linear predictor networks. We show that both avoid collapse through implicit variance regularization albeit through different dynamical mechanisms. Moreover, we find that the eigenvalues act as effective learning rate multipliers and propose a family of isotropic loss functions (IsoLoss) that equalize convergence rates across eigenmodes. Empirically, IsoLoss speeds up the initial learning dynamics and increases robustness, thereby allowing us to dispense with the EMA target network typically used with non-contrastive methods. Our analysis sheds light on the variance regularization mechanisms of non-contrastive SSL and lays the theoretical grounds for crafting novel loss functions that shape the learning dynamics of the predictor's spectrum.
abstract_zh: BYOL 和 SimSiam 等非对比 SSL 方法依靠非对称预测网络来避免在没有负样本的情况下表征崩溃。然而，预测网络如何促进稳定学习尚不完全清楚。虽然之前的理论分析假设欧几里德损失，但大多数实际实现依赖于余弦相似性。为了获得对非对比 SSL 的进一步理论见解，我们结合封闭式线性预测网络特征空间中的欧几里得和余弦相似度来分析研究学习动态。我们表明，尽管通过不同的动力学机制，但两者都通过隐式方差正则化避免了崩溃。此外，我们发现特征值充当有效的学习率乘数，并提出了一系列各向同性损失函数（IsoLoss），可以均衡特征模式之间的收敛率。根据经验，IsoLoss 加快了初始学习动态并提高了鲁棒性，从而使我们能够省去通常与非对比方法一起使用的 EMA 目标网络。我们的分析揭示了非对比 SSL 的方差正则化机制，并为构建新的损失函数奠定了理论基础，这些损失函数塑造了预测器频谱的学习动态。

AI.tldr: 本文研究非对比自监督学习（SSL）中预测网络的隐式方差正则化机制，并分析其学习动态。
AI.motivation: 现有非对比SSL方法（如BYOL/SimSiam）依赖不对称预测网络避免表示崩溃，但其稳定学习机制尚不明确，且理论分析与实际使用的余弦相似度存在差异。
AI.method: 在闭式线性预测网络的特征空间中，结合欧几里得损失与余弦相似度分析学习动态，提出等化收敛速率的Isoloss损失函数族。
AI.result: 发现两种相似度均通过不同动态机制实现隐式方差正则化；特征值作为学习率乘数，Isoloss加速初始学习并提升鲁棒性，可替代EMA目标网络。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了非对比SSL的方差正则化本质，为设计调控预测网络谱学习动态的新损失函数提供理论基础。

Our analysis sheds light on the variance regularization mechanisms of non-contrastive SSL and lays the theoretical grounds for crafting novel loss functions that shape the learning dynamics of the predictor's spectrum. BYOL 和 SimSiam 等非对比 SSL 方法依靠非对称预测网络来避免在没有负样本的情况下表征崩溃。然而，预测网络如何促进稳定学习尚不完全清楚。虽然之前的理论分析假设欧几里德损失，但大多数实际实现依赖于余弦相似性。为了获得对非对比 SSL 的进一步理论见解，我们结合封闭式线性预测网络特征空间中的欧几里得和余弦相似度来分析研究学习动态。我们表明，尽管通过不同的动力学机制，但两者都通过隐式方差正则化避免了崩溃。此外，我们发现特征值充当有效的学习率乘数，并提出了一系列各向同性损失函数（IsoLoss），可以均衡特征模式之间的收敛率。根据经验，IsoLoss 加快了初始学习动态并提高了鲁棒性，从而使我们能够省去通常与非对比方法一起使用的 EMA 目标网络。我们的分析揭示了非对比 SSL 的方差正则化机制，并为构建新的损失函数奠定了理论基础，这些损失函数塑造了预测器频谱的学习动态。 本文研究非对比自监督学习（SSL）中预测网络的隐式方差正则化机制，并分析其学习动态。 Manu Srinath Halvagal,Axel Laborieux,Friedemann Zenke cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Dan A Allwood,Matthew O A Ellis,David Griffin,Thomas J Hayward,Luca Manneschi,Mohammad F KH Musameh,Simon O'Keefe,Susan Stepney,Charles Swindells,Martin A Trefzer,Eleni Vasilaki,Guru Venkat,Ian Vidamour,Chester Wringe
title: A perspective on physical reservoir computing with nanomagnetic devices
title_zh: 纳米磁性器件物理储层计算的视角
abstract: Neural networks have revolutionized the area of artificial intelligence and introduced transformative applications to almost every scientific field and industry. However, this success comes at a great price; the energy requirements for training advanced models are unsustainable. One promising way to address this pressing issue is by developing low-energy neuromorphic hardware that directly supports the algorithm's requirements. The intrinsic non-volatility, non-linearity, and memory of spintronic devices make them appealing candidates for neuromorphic devices. Here we focus on the reservoir computing paradigm, a recurrent network with a simple training algorithm suitable for computation with spintronic devices since they can provide the properties of non-linearity and memory. We review technologies and methods for developing neuromorphic spintronic devices and conclude with critical open issues to address before such devices become widely used.
summary: Neural networks have revolutionized the area of artificial intelligence and introduced transformative applications to almost every scientific field and industry. However, this success comes at a great price; the energy requirements for training advanced models are unsustainable. One promising way to address this pressing issue is by developing low-energy neuromorphic hardware that directly supports the algorithm's requirements. The intrinsic non-volatility, non-linearity, and memory of spintronic devices make them appealing candidates for neuromorphic devices. Here we focus on the reservoir computing paradigm, a recurrent network with a simple training algorithm suitable for computation with spintronic devices since they can provide the properties of non-linearity and memory. We review technologies and methods for developing neuromorphic spintronic devices and conclude with critical open issues to address before such devices become widely used.
abstract_zh: 神经网络彻底改变了人工智能领域，并将变革性应用引入几乎每个科学领域和行业。然而，这种成功是付出了巨大代价的。训练高级模型的能源需求是不可持续的。解决这一紧迫问题的一种有希望的方法是开发直接支持算法要求的低能量神经形态硬件。自旋电子器件固有的非易失性、非线性和记忆性使它们成为神经形态器件的有吸引力的候选者。在这里，我们重点关注储层计算范式，这是一种具有简单训练算法的循环网络，适合使用自旋电子设备进行计算，因为它们可以提供非线性和记忆特性。我们回顾了开发神经形态自旋电子设备的技术和方法，并总结了在此类设备广泛使用之前需要解决的关键开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用纳米磁性器件实现物理储库计算的前景。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在人工智能领域取得了巨大成功，但其训练过程能耗过高，因此需要开发低能耗的类脑硬件。
AI.method: 本文回顾了开发类脑自旋电子器件的技术和方法，并重点介绍了储库计算范式。
AI.result: 总结了当前在开发类脑自旋电子器件方面取得的进展，并指出了实现广泛应用前需解决的关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 纳米磁性器件在储库计算中具有巨大潜力，但仍需解决一些关键问题以推动其广泛应用。

authors_text: Henry Soldano,Guillaume Santini,Stella Zevio
title: Closed pattern mining of interval data and distributional data
title_zh: 区间数据和分布数据的闭合模式挖掘
abstract: We discuss pattern languages for closed pattern mining and learning of interval data and distributional data. We first introduce pattern languages relying on pairs of intersection-based constraints or pairs of inclusion based constraints, or both, applied to intervals. We discuss the encoding of such interval patterns as itemsets thus allowing to use closed itemsets mining and formal concept analysis programs. We experiment these languages on clustering and supervised learning tasks. Then we show how to extend the approach to address distributional data.
summary: We discuss pattern languages for closed pattern mining and learning of interval data and distributional data. We first introduce pattern languages relying on pairs of intersection-based constraints or pairs of inclusion based constraints, or both, applied to intervals. We discuss the encoding of such interval patterns as itemsets thus allowing to use closed itemsets mining and formal concept analysis programs. We experiment these languages on clustering and supervised learning tasks. Then we show how to extend the approach to address distributional data.
abstract_zh: 我们讨论用于封闭模式挖掘以及区间数据和分布数据学习的模式语言。我们首先引入依赖于应用于区间的基于交集的约束对或基于包含的约束对或两者的模式语言。我们讨论将此类区间模式编码为项集，从而允许使用封闭项集挖掘和形式概念分析程序。我们在聚类和监督学习任务中对这些语言进行了实验。然后我们展示如何扩展该方法来处理分布式数据。

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了区间数据和分布数据的闭合模式挖掘和学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的模式挖掘方法主要针对离散数据，难以处理区间数据和分布数据，因此需要新的模式语言和方法。
AI.method: 引入基于交集约束或包含约束的模式语言，将区间模式编码为项集，利用闭合项集挖掘和形式概念分析程序进行处理，并扩展到分布数据。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在聚类和监督学习任务中有效，并成功扩展到分布数据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为区间数据和分布数据的模式挖掘提供了新的方法和工具，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Felipe Perez Stoppa,Ester Vidaña-Vila,Joan Navarro
title: Album cover art image generation with Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络生成专辑封面艺术图像
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) were introduced by Goodfellow in 2014, and since then have become popular for constructing generative artificial intelligence models. However, the drawbacks of such networks are numerous, like their longer training times, their sensitivity to hyperparameter tuning, several types of loss and optimization functions and other difficulties like mode collapse. Current applications of GANs include generating photo-realistic human faces, animals and objects. However, I wanted to explore the artistic ability of GANs in more detail, by using existing models and learning from them. This dissertation covers the basics of neural networks and works its way up to the particular aspects of GANs, together with experimentation and modification of existing available models, from least complex to most. The intention is to see if state of the art GANs (specifically StyleGAN2) can generate album art covers and if it is possible to tailor them by genre. This was attempted by first familiarizing myself with 3 existing GANs architectures, including the state of the art StyleGAN2. The StyleGAN2 code was used to train a model with a dataset containing 80K album cover images, then used to style images by picking curated images and mixing their styles.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) were introduced by Goodfellow in 2014, and since then have become popular for constructing generative artificial intelligence models. However, the drawbacks of such networks are numerous, like their longer training times, their sensitivity to hyperparameter tuning, several types of loss and optimization functions and other difficulties like mode collapse. Current applications of GANs include generating photo-realistic human faces, animals and objects. However, I wanted to explore the artistic ability of GANs in more detail, by using existing models and learning from them. This dissertation covers the basics of neural networks and works its way up to the particular aspects of GANs, together with experimentation and modification of existing available models, from least complex to most. The intention is to see if state of the art GANs (specifically StyleGAN2) can generate album art covers and if it is possible to tailor them by genre. This was attempted by first familiarizing myself with 3 existing GANs architectures, including the state of the art StyleGAN2. The StyleGAN2 code was used to train a model with a dataset containing 80K album cover images, then used to style images by picking curated images and mixing their styles.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络 (GAN) 由 Goodfellow 于 2014 年提出，自此在构建生成人工智能模型中变得流行。然而，此类网络的缺点很多，例如训练时间较长、对超参数调整的敏感性、多种类型的损失和优化函数以及模式崩溃等其他困​​难。 GAN 目前的应用包括生成逼真的人脸、动物和物体。然而，我想通过使用现有模型并向它们学习，更详细地探索 GAN 的艺术能力。本论文涵盖了神经网络的基础知识，并逐步深入到 GAN 的特定方面，以及对现有可用模型（从最简单到最复杂）的实验和修改。目的是看看最先进的 GAN（特别是 StyleGAN2）是否可以生成专辑封面，以及是否可以按流派对其进行定制。为此，我首先熟悉了 3 个现有的 GAN 架构，包括最先进的 StyleGAN2。 StyleGAN2 代码用于使用包含 80K 专辑封面图像的数据集训练模型，然后通过选择精选图像并混合其风格来设计图像风格。

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨使用生成对抗网络（特别是StyleGAN2）生成专辑封面艺术图像，并研究其根据音乐类型进行定制的可行性。
AI.motivation: 尽管GAN在图像生成领域取得进展，但其训练难度和模式崩溃等问题仍存在。作者希望探索GAN在艺术创作中的潜力，尤其是专辑封面设计的个性化生成。
AI.method: 通过研究三种GAN架构（包括StyleGAN2），使用80K张专辑封面图像训练模型，并通过混合不同图像风格实现定制化生成。
AI.result: 成功训练出可生成专辑封面的StyleGAN2模型，并实现基于音乐类型的风格混合，但存在生成多样性不足等挑战。
AI.conclusion: GAN在艺术创作领域具有潜力，但需进一步优化模型稳定性与多样性以满足实际应用需求。

However, I wanted to explore the artistic ability of GANs in more detail, by using existing models and learning from them. This dissertation covers the basics of neural networks and works its way up to the particular aspects of GANs, together with experimentation and modification of existing available models, from least complex to most. The intention is to see if state of the art GANs (specifically StyleGAN2) can generate album art covers and if it is possible to tailor them by genre. This was attempted by first familiarizing myself with 3 existing GANs architectures, including the state of the art StyleGAN2. The StyleGAN2 code was used to train a model with a dataset containing 80K album cover images, then used to style images by picking curated images and mixing their styles. 生成对抗网络 (GAN) 由 Goodfellow 于 2014 年提出，自此在构建生成人工智能模型中变得流行。然而，此类网络的缺点很多，例如训练时间较长、对超参数调整的敏感性、多种类型的损失和优化函数以及模式崩溃等其他困​​难。 GAN 目前的应用包括生成逼真的人脸、动物和物体。然而，我想通过使用现有模型并向它们学习，更详细地探索 GAN 的艺术能力。本论文涵盖了神经网络的基础知识，并逐步深入到 GAN 的特定方面，以及对现有可用模型（从最简单到最复杂）的实验和修改。目的是看看最先进的 GAN（特别是 StyleGAN2）是否可以生成专辑封面，以及是否可以按流派对其进行定制。为此，我首先熟悉了 3 个现有的 GAN 架构，包括最先进的 StyleGAN2。 StyleGAN2 代码用于使用包含 80K 专辑封面图像的数据集训练模型，然后通过选择精选图像并混合其风格来设计图像风格。 本论文探讨使用生成对抗网络（特别是StyleGAN2）生成专辑封面艺术图像，并研究其根据音乐类型进行定制的可行性。 Felipe Perez Stoppa,Ester Vidaña-Vila,Joan Navarro cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Andrés Villa,Juan León Alcázar,Motasem Alfarra,Kumail Alhamoud,Julio Hurtado,Fabian Caba Heilbron,Alvaro Soto,Bernard Ghanem
title: PIVOT: Prompting for Video Continual Learning
title_zh: PIVOT：提示视频持续学习
abstract: Modern machine learning pipelines are limited due to data availability, storage quotas, privacy regulations, and expensive annotation processes. These constraints make it difficult or impossible to train and update large-scale models on such dynamic annotated sets. Continual learning directly approaches this problem, with the ultimate goal of devising methods where a deep neural network effectively learns relevant patterns for new (unseen) classes, without significantly altering its performance on previously learned ones. In this paper, we address the problem of continual learning for video data. We introduce PIVOT, a novel method that leverages extensive knowledge in pre-trained models from the image domain, thereby reducing the number of trainable parameters and the associated forgetting. Unlike previous methods, ours is the first approach that effectively uses prompting mechanisms for continual learning without any in-domain pre-training. Our experiments show that PIVOT improves state-of-the-art methods by a significant 27% on the 20-task ActivityNet setup.
summary: Modern machine learning pipelines are limited due to data availability, storage quotas, privacy regulations, and expensive annotation processes. These constraints make it difficult or impossible to train and update large-scale models on such dynamic annotated sets. Continual learning directly approaches this problem, with the ultimate goal of devising methods where a deep neural network effectively learns relevant patterns for new (unseen) classes, without significantly altering its performance on previously learned ones. In this paper, we address the problem of continual learning for video data. We introduce PIVOT, a novel method that leverages extensive knowledge in pre-trained models from the image domain, thereby reducing the number of trainable parameters and the associated forgetting. Unlike previous methods, ours is the first approach that effectively uses prompting mechanisms for continual learning without any in-domain pre-training. Our experiments show that PIVOT improves state-of-the-art methods by a significant 27% on the 20-task ActivityNet setup.
abstract_zh: 由于数据可用性、存储配额、隐私法规和昂贵的注释过程，现代机器学习管道受到限制。这些限制使得在此类动态注释集上训练和更新大规模模型变得困难或不可能。持续学习直接解决这个问题，其最终目标是设计一种方法，让深度神经网络有效地学习新的（未见过的）类的相关模式，而不会显着改变其对先前学习的类的性能。在本文中，我们解决了视频数据的持续学习问题。我们引入了 PIVOT，这是一种新颖的方法，它利用图像领域预训练模型的广泛知识，从而减少可训练参数的数量和相关的遗忘。与以前的方法不同，我们的方法是第一个有效地使用提示机制进行持续学习而无需任何域内预训练的方法。我们的实验表明，PIVOT 在 20 任务 ActivityNet 设置上将最先进的方法显着提高了 27%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PIVOT方法，通过提示机制解决视频持续学习问题，减少参数量并降低遗忘率。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习因数据存储、隐私和标注成本限制难以动态更新模型，而持续学习需在不遗忘旧知识的前提下学习新类别。
AI.method: 利用图像领域预训练模型的知识，设计无需领域内预训练的提示机制，减少可训练参数及遗忘。
AI.result: 在20任务的ActivityNet数据集上，PIVOT相较现有方法性能提升27%。
AI.conclusion: PIVOT通过提示机制有效解决视频持续学习问题，验证了跨领域预训练模型与提示结合的有效性。

authors_text: Fabian Wagner,Mareike Thies,Laura Pfaff,Noah Maul,Sabrina Pechmann,Mingxuan Gu,Jonas Utz,Oliver Aust,Daniela Weidner,Georgiana Neag,Stefan Uderhardt,Jang-Hwan Choi,Andreas Maier
title: Noise2Contrast: Multi-Contrast Fusion Enables Self-Supervised Tomographic Image Denoising
title_zh: Noise2Contrast：多对比度融合实现自监督断层扫描图像去噪
abstract: Self-supervised image denoising techniques emerged as convenient methods that allow training denoising models without requiring ground-truth noise-free data. Existing methods usually optimize loss metrics that are calculated from multiple noisy realizations of similar images, e.g., from neighboring tomographic slices. However, those approaches fail to utilize the multiple contrasts that are routinely acquired in medical imaging modalities like MRI or dual-energy CT. In this work, we propose the new self-supervised training scheme Noise2Contrast that combines information from multiple measured image contrasts to train a denoising model. We stack denoising with domain-transfer operators to utilize the independent noise realizations of different image contrasts to derive a self-supervised loss. The trained denoising operator achieves convincing quantitative and qualitative results, outperforming state-of-the-art self-supervised methods by 4.7-11.0%/4.8-7.3% (PSNR/SSIM) on brain MRI data and by 43.6-50.5%/57.1-77.1% (PSNR/SSIM) on dual-energy CT X-ray microscopy data with respect to the noisy baseline. Our experiments on different real measured data sets indicate that Noise2Contrast training generalizes to other multi-contrast imaging modalities.
summary: Self-supervised image denoising techniques emerged as convenient methods that allow training denoising models without requiring ground-truth noise-free data. Existing methods usually optimize loss metrics that are calculated from multiple noisy realizations of similar images, e.g., from neighboring tomographic slices. However, those approaches fail to utilize the multiple contrasts that are routinely acquired in medical imaging modalities like MRI or dual-energy CT. In this work, we propose the new self-supervised training scheme Noise2Contrast that combines information from multiple measured image contrasts to train a denoising model. We stack denoising with domain-transfer operators to utilize the independent noise realizations of different image contrasts to derive a self-supervised loss. The trained denoising operator achieves convincing quantitative and qualitative results, outperforming state-of-the-art self-supervised methods by 4.7-11.0%/4.8-7.3% (PSNR/SSIM) on brain MRI data and by 43.6-50.5%/57.1-77.1% (PSNR/SSIM) on dual-energy CT X-ray microscopy data with respect to the noisy baseline. Our experiments on different real measured data sets indicate that Noise2Contrast training generalizes to other multi-contrast imaging modalities.
abstract_zh: 自监督图像去噪技术作为方便的方法出现，允许训练去噪模型而不需要真实的无噪声数据。现有方法通常优化从相似图像的多个噪声实现（例如，从相邻断层摄影切片）计算出的损失度量。然而，这些方法未能利用在 MRI 或双能 CT 等医学成像模式中常规获取的多重对比。在这项工作中，我们提出了新的自监督训练方案 Noise2Contrast，它结合了多个测量图像对比度的信息来训练去噪模型。我们将去噪与域转移算子叠加起来，利用不同图像对比度的独立噪声实现来导出自监督损失。经过训练的去噪操作员取得了令人信服的定量和定性结果，相对于噪声基线，脑部 MRI 数据的性能优于最先进的自监督方法 4.7-11.0%/4.8-7.3% (PSNR/SSIM)，双能 CT X 射线显微镜数据的性能优于最先进的自监督方法 43.6-50.5%/57.1-77.1% (PSNR/SSIM)。我们对不同真实测量数据集的实验表明，Noise2Contrast 训练可以推广到其他多对比成像模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多对比度融合的自监督断层图像去噪方法Noise2Contrast。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督去噪方法未能有效利用医学影像中常见的多对比度数据（如MRI或双能CT），导致去噪效果受限。
AI.method: 通过堆叠去噪与领域迁移算子，利用不同对比度图像的独立噪声实现构建自监督损失函数，实现多对比度信息融合。
AI.result: 在脑部MRI数据上优于现有方法4.7-11.0%/4.8-7.3%（PSNR/SSIM），在双能CT数据上提升43.6-50.5%/57.1-77.1%（PSNR/SSIM）。
AI.conclusion: Noise2Contrast方法在多种多对比度成像模态中展现出良好的泛化能力与去噪性能。
